authors_text: Prashant Pandey,Mustafa Chasmai,Tanuj Sur,Brejesh Lall
title: Robust Prototypical Few-Shot Organ Segmentation with Regularized Neural-ODEs
title_zh: 具有正则化神经常微分方程的鲁棒原型少样本器官分割
abstract: Despite the tremendous progress made by deep learning models in image semantic segmentation, they typically require large annotated examples, and increasing attention is being diverted to problem settings like Few-Shot Learning (FSL) where only a small amount of annotation is needed for generalisation to novel classes. This is especially seen in medical domains where dense pixel-level annotations are expensive to obtain. In this paper, we propose Regularized Prototypical Neural Ordinary Differential Equation (R-PNODE), a method that leverages intrinsic properties of Neural-ODEs, assisted and enhanced by additional cluster and consistency losses to perform Few-Shot Segmentation (FSS) of organs. R-PNODE constrains support and query features from the same classes to lie closer in the representation space thereby improving the performance over the existing Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) based FSS methods. We further demonstrate that while many existing Deep CNN based methods tend to be extremely vulnerable to adversarial attacks, R-PNODE exhibits increased adversarial robustness for a wide array of these attacks. We experiment with three publicly available multi-organ segmentation datasets in both in-domain and cross-domain FSS settings to demonstrate the efficacy of our method. In addition, we perform experiments with seven commonly used adversarial attacks in various settings to demonstrate R-PNODE's robustness. R-PNODE outperforms the baselines for FSS by significant margins and also shows superior performance for a wide array of attacks varying in intensity and design.

This is especially seen in medical domains where dense pixel-level annotations are expensive to obtain. In this paper, we propose Regularized Prototypical Neural Ordinary Differential Equation (R-PNODE), a method that leverages intrinsic properties of Neural-ODEs, assisted and enhanced by additional cluster and consistency losses to perform Few-Shot Segmentation (FSS) of organs. R-PNODE constrains support and query features from the same classes to lie closer in the representation space thereby improving the performance over the existing Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) based FSS methods. We further demonstrate that while many existing Deep CNN based methods tend to be extremely vulnerable to adversarial attacks, R-PNODE exhibits increased adversarial robustness for a wide array of these attacks. We experiment with three publicly available multi-organ segmentation datasets in both in-domain and cross-domain FSS settings to demonstrate the efficacy of our method. In addition, we perform experiments with seven commonly used adversarial attacks in various settings to demonstrate R-PNODE's robustness. R-PNODE outperforms the baselines for FSS by significant margins and also shows superior performance for a wide array of attacks varying in intensity and design.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度学习模型在图像语义分割方面取得了巨大进步，但它们通常需要大量带注释的示例，并且越来越多的注意力被转移到少样本学习（FSL）等问题设置上，其中只需要少量注释即可泛化到新类别。这在医学领域尤其明显，因为获得密集的像素级注释的成本很高。在本文中，我们提出了正则化原型神经常微分方程（R-PNODE），这是一种利用神经常微分方程的内在特性，通过额外的聚类和一致性损失辅助和增强来执行器官的少样本分割（FSS）的方法。 R-PNODE 将来自同一类的支持和查询特征限制在表示空间中更接近，从而提高了现有基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的 FSS 方法的性能。我们进一步证明，虽然许多现有的基于深度 CNN 的方法往往极易受到对抗性攻击，但 R-PNODE 对各种此类攻击表现出更高的对抗性鲁棒性。我们在域内和跨域 FSS 设置中对三个公开可用的多器官分割数据集进行了实验，以证明我们方法的有效性。此外，我们还在各种设置中对七种常用的对抗性攻击进行了实验，以证明 R-PNODE 的鲁棒性。 R-PNODE 的性能明显优于 FSS 的基线，并且对于强度和设计各异的各种攻击也显示出卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于正则化神经常微分方程（R-PNODE）的方法，用于解决医学图像中器官的少样本分割问题。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习模型需要大量标注数据，而医学领域获取密集像素级标注成本高昂。现有方法在少样本分割任务中易受对抗攻击影响，亟需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计R-PNODE框架，结合神经常微分方程的内在特性，并引入聚类损失和一致性损失，约束同类支持集与查询集特征在表示空间中的接近性。
AI.result: 在三个公开多器官数据集上，R-PNODE在域内和跨域少样本分割任务中显著优于基线方法，并在七种对抗攻击场景中展现更强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: R-PNODE通过正则化神经常微分方程有效提升了少样本分割性能与对抗鲁棒性，为医学图像分析提供了更高效可靠的技术方案。

authors_text: Shi-Xue Zhang,Xiaobin Zhu,Lei Chen,Jie-Bo Hou,Xu-Cheng Yin
title: Arbitrary Shape Text Detection via Segmentation with Probability Maps
title_zh: 通过概率图分割进行任意形状文本检测
comment: Accepted by TPAMI 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1812.01393 by other authors
comments: Accepted by TPAMI 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1812.01393 by other authors
abstract: Arbitrary shape text detection is a challenging task due to the significantly varied sizes and aspect ratios, arbitrary orientations or shapes, inaccurate annotations, etc. Due to the scalability of pixel-level prediction, segmentation-based methods can adapt to various shape texts and hence attracted considerable attention recently. However, accurate pixel-level annotations of texts are formidable, and the existing datasets for scene text detection only provide coarse-grained boundary annotations. Consequently, numerous misclassified text pixels or background pixels inside annotations always exist, degrading the performance of segmentation-based text detection methods. Generally speaking, whether a pixel belongs to text or not is highly related to the distance with the adjacent annotation boundary. With this observation, in this paper, we propose an innovative and robust segmentation-based detection method via probability maps for accurately detecting text instances. To be concrete, we adopt a Sigmoid Alpha Function (SAF) to transfer the distances between boundaries and their inside pixels to a probability map. However, one probability map can not cover complex probability distributions well because of the uncertainty of coarse-grained text boundary annotations. Therefore, we adopt a group of probability maps computed by a series of Sigmoid Alpha Functions to describe the possible probability distributions. In addition, we propose an iterative model to learn to predict and assimilate probability maps for providing enough information to reconstruct text instances. Finally, simple region growth algorithms are adopted to aggregate probability maps to complete text instances. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of detection accuracy on several benchmarks.
summary: Arbitrary shape text detection is a challenging task due to the significantly varied sizes and aspect ratios, arbitrary orientations or shapes, inaccurate annotations, etc. Due to the scalability of pixel-level prediction, segmentation-based methods can adapt to various shape texts and hence attracted considerable attention recently. However, accurate pixel-level annotations of texts are formidable, and the existing datasets for scene text detection only provide coarse-grained boundary annotations. Consequently, numerous misclassified text pixels or background pixels inside annotations always exist, degrading the performance of segmentation-based text detection methods. Generally speaking, whether a pixel belongs to text or not is highly related to the distance with the adjacent annotation boundary. With this observation, in this paper, we propose an innovative and robust segmentation-based detection method via probability maps for accurately detecting text instances. To be concrete, we adopt a Sigmoid Alpha Function (SAF) to transfer the distances between boundaries and their inside pixels to a probability map. However, one probability map can not cover complex probability distributions well because of the uncertainty of coarse-grained text boundary annotations. Therefore, we adopt a group of probability maps computed by a series of Sigmoid Alpha Functions to describe the possible probability distributions. In addition, we propose an iterative model to learn to predict and assimilate probability maps for providing enough information to reconstruct text instances. Finally, simple region growth algorithms are adopted to aggregate probability maps to complete text instances. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of detection accuracy on several benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 由于尺寸和长宽比的显着变化、任意方向或形状、不准确的注释等，任意形状文本检测是一项具有挑战性的任务。由于像素级预测的可扩展性，基于分割的方法可以适应各种形状文本，因此最近引起了相当大的关注。然而，准确的文本像素级注释是非常困难的，并且现有的场景文本检测数据集仅提供粗粒度的边界注释。因此，注释中始终存在大量错误分类的文本像素或背景像素，从而降低了基于分割的文本检测方法的性能。一般来说，一个像素是否属于文本与与相邻标注边界的距离密切相关。根据这一观察，在本文中，我们提出了一种创新且稳健的基于分割的检测方法，通过概率图来准确检测文本实例。具体来说，我们采用 Sigmoid Alpha 函数（SAF）将边界与其内部像素之间的距离转换为概率图。然而，由于粗粒度文本边界标注的不确定性，一张概率图无法很好地覆盖复杂的概率分布。因此，我们采用一组由一系列 Sigmoid Alpha 函数计算得到的概率图来描述可能的概率分布。此外，我们提出了一种迭代模型来学习预测和同化概率图，以提供足够的信息来重建文本实例。最后，采用简单的区域增长算法来聚合概率图以完成文本实例。实验结果表明，我们的方法在多个基准测试的检测精度方面实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率图的分割方法，用于解决任意形状文本检测中的标注不准确问题。
AI.motivation: 现有分割方法因依赖像素级标注而受限，而实际数据集仅提供粗粒度边界标注，导致文本与背景像素误分类，影响检测性能。
AI.method: 采用Sigmoid Alpha函数将边界距离转化为概率图，通过多组概率图描述分布不确定性，并结合迭代模型预测与区域增长算法完成文本实例重建。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中达到最先进水平，显著提升检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效应对粗粒度标注的不确定性，通过概率图建模和迭代优化提升了复杂场景下文本检测的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Qingqing Huang,Aren Jansen,Joonseok Lee,Ravi Ganti,Judith Yue Li,Daniel P. W. Ellis
title: MuLan: A Joint Embedding of Music Audio and Natural Language
title_zh: MuLan：音乐音频和自然语言的联合嵌入
abstract: Music tagging and content-based retrieval systems have traditionally been constructed using pre-defined ontologies covering a rigid set of music attributes or text queries. This paper presents MuLan: a first attempt at a new generation of acoustic models that link music audio directly to unconstrained natural language music descriptions. MuLan takes the form of a two-tower, joint audio-text embedding model trained using 44 million music recordings (370K hours) and weakly-associated, free-form text annotations. Through its compatibility with a wide range of music genres and text styles (including conventional music tags), the resulting audio-text representation subsumes existing ontologies while graduating to true zero-shot functionalities. We demonstrate the versatility of the MuLan embeddings with a range of experiments including transfer learning, zero-shot music tagging, language understanding in the music domain, and cross-modal retrieval applications.
summary: Music tagging and content-based retrieval systems have traditionally been constructed using pre-defined ontologies covering a rigid set of music attributes or text queries. This paper presents MuLan: a first attempt at a new generation of acoustic models that link music audio directly to unconstrained natural language music descriptions. MuLan takes the form of a two-tower, joint audio-text embedding model trained using 44 million music recordings (370K hours) and weakly-associated, free-form text annotations. Through its compatibility with a wide range of music genres and text styles (including conventional music tags), the resulting audio-text representation subsumes existing ontologies while graduating to true zero-shot functionalities. We demonstrate the versatility of the MuLan embeddings with a range of experiments including transfer learning, zero-shot music tagging, language understanding in the music domain, and cross-modal retrieval applications.
abstract_zh: 传统上，音乐标签和基于内容的检索系统是使用涵盖一组严格的音乐属性或文本查询的预定义本体构建的。本文介绍了 MuLan：新一代声学模型的首次尝试，该模型将音乐音频直接链接到不受约束的自然语言音乐描述。 MuLan 采用两塔联合音频文本嵌入模型的形式，使用 4400 万个音乐录音（37 万小时）和弱关联的自由格式文本注释进行训练。通过与各种音乐流派和文本样式（包括传统音乐标签）的兼容性，生成的音频文本表示包含现有本体，同时逐渐实现真正的零样本功能。我们通过一系列实验展示了 MuLan 嵌入的多功能性，包括迁移学习、零样本音乐标记、音乐领域的语言理解和跨模态检索应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MuLan模型，通过联合嵌入音乐音频与自然语言描述，实现音乐与文本的跨模态表示学习。
AI.motivation: 传统音乐标签系统依赖预定义的固定属性集，难以适应开放式的自然语言描述和跨领域应用需求。
AI.method: 采用双塔结构的联合嵌入模型，基于4400万首音乐录音和弱关联文本注释进行训练，兼容多种音乐流派和文本风格。
AI.result: 实现零样本音乐标签、跨模态检索等任务，优于现有基于预定义本体的系统，在迁移学习和语言理解任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: MuLan通过直接关联音频与自然语言描述，突破了传统音乐信息检索系统的限制，为开放域音乐理解提供了新范式。

authors_text: Zi'an Xu,Yin Dai,Fayu Liu,Boyuan Wu,Weibing Chen,Lifu Shi
title: Segmentation of Parotid Gland Tumors Using Multimodal MRI and Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 使用多模态 MRI 和对比学习对腮腺肿瘤进行分割
abstract: Parotid gland tumor is a common type of head and neck tumor. Segmentation of the parotid glands and tumors by MR images is important for the treatment of parotid gland tumors. However, segmentation of the parotid glands is particularly challenging due to their variable shape and low contrast with surrounding structures. Recently deep learning has developed rapidly, which can handle complex problems. However, most of the current deep learning methods for processing medical images are still based on supervised learning. Compared with natural images, medical images are difficult to acquire and costly to label. Contrastive learning, as an unsupervised learning method, can more effectively utilize unlabeled medical images. In this paper, we used a Transformer-based contrastive learning method and innovatively trained the contrastive learning network with transfer learning. Then, the output model was transferred to the downstream parotid segmentation task, which improved the performance of the parotid segmentation model on the test set. The improved DSC was 89.60%, MPA was 99.36%, MIoU was 85.11%, and HD was 2.98. All four metrics showed significant improvement compared to the results of using a supervised learning model as a pre-trained model for the parotid segmentation network. In addition, we found that the improvement of the segmentation network by the contrastive learning model was mainly in the encoder part, so this paper also tried to build a contrastive learning network for the decoder part and discussed the problems encountered in the process of building.
summary: Parotid gland tumor is a common type of head and neck tumor. Segmentation of the parotid glands and tumors by MR images is important for the treatment of parotid gland tumors. However, segmentation of the parotid glands is particularly challenging due to their variable shape and low contrast with surrounding structures. Recently deep learning has developed rapidly, which can handle complex problems. However, most of the current deep learning methods for processing medical images are still based on supervised learning. Compared with natural images, medical images are difficult to acquire and costly to label. Contrastive learning, as an unsupervised learning method, can more effectively utilize unlabeled medical images. In this paper, we used a Transformer-based contrastive learning method and innovatively trained the contrastive learning network with transfer learning. Then, the output model was transferred to the downstream parotid segmentation task, which improved the performance of the parotid segmentation model on the test set. The improved DSC was 89.60%, MPA was 99.36%, MIoU was 85.11%, and HD was 2.98. All four metrics showed significant improvement compared to the results of using a supervised learning model as a pre-trained model for the parotid segmentation network. In addition, we found that the improvement of the segmentation network by the contrastive learning model was mainly in the encoder part, so this paper also tried to build a contrastive learning network for the decoder part and discussed the problems encountered in the process of building.
abstract_zh: 腮腺肿瘤是头颈部肿瘤的常见类型。通过磁共振图像分割腮腺和肿瘤对于腮腺肿瘤的治疗很重要。然而，腮腺的分割特别具有挑战性，因为它们的形状可变且与周围结构的对比度较低。近年来深度学习发展迅速，可以处理复杂的问题。然而，目前大多数处理医学图像的深度学习方法仍然基于监督学习。与自然图像相比，医学图像获取困难且标记成本高。对比学习作为一种无监督学习方法，可以更有效地利用未标记的医学图像。在本文中，我们采用了基于 Transformer 的对比学习方法，创新性地用迁移学习来训练对比学习网络。然后，将输出模型转移到下游腮腺分割任务，提高了腮腺分割模型在测试集上的性能。改进后的DSC为89.60%，MPA为99.36%，MIoU为85.11%，HD为2.98。与使用监督学习模型作为腮腺分割网络的预训练模型的结果相比，所有四个指标都显示出显着的改进。另外，我们发现对比学习模型对分割网络的改进主要在编码器部分，因此本文也尝试为解码器部分构建对比学习网络，并讨论构建过程中遇到的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的对比学习方法，用于改进腮腺肿瘤的MRI图像分割。
AI.motivation: 医疗图像标注成本高且困难，传统监督学习依赖标注数据，而对比学习可有效利用未标注数据提升分割性能。
AI.method: 采用Transformer架构的对比学习模型，结合迁移学习预训练网络，并将其应用于下游分割任务，同时探索解码器部分的对比学习网络构建。
AI.result: 在测试集上DSC达89.60%、MPA达99.36%、MIoU达85.11%、HD为2.98，显著优于传统监督预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习在编码器部分显著提升分割性能，但解码器对比学习网络构建过程中存在技术挑战需进一步研究。

However, segmentation of the parotid glands is particularly challenging due to their variable shape and low contrast with surrounding structures. However, most of the current deep learning methods for processing medical images are still based on supervised learning. authors_text: Shrutina Agarwal,Sriram Ganapathy,Naoya Takahashi
title: Leveraging Symmetrical Convolutional Transformer Networks for Speech to Singing Voice Style Transfer
title_zh: 利用对称卷积变压器网络进行语音到歌声的风格转换
abstract: In this paper, we propose a model to perform style transfer of speech to singing voice. Contrary to the previous signal processing-based methods, which require high-quality singing templates or phoneme synchronization, we explore a data-driven approach for the problem of converting natural speech to singing voice. We develop a novel neural network architecture, called SymNet, which models the alignment of the input speech with the target melody while preserving the speaker identity and naturalness. The proposed SymNet model is comprised of symmetrical stack of three types of layers - convolutional, transformer, and self-attention layers. The paper also explores novel data augmentation and generative loss annealing methods to facilitate the model training. Experiments are performed on the NUS and NHSS datasets which consist of parallel data of speech and singing voice. In these experiments, we show that the proposed SymNet model improves the objective reconstruction quality significantly over the previously published methods and baseline architectures. Further, a subjective listening test confirms the improved quality of the audio obtained using the proposed approach (absolute improvement of 0.37 in mean opinion score measure over the baseline system).
summary: In this paper, we propose a model to perform style transfer of speech to singing voice. Contrary to the previous signal processing-based methods, which require high-quality singing templates or phoneme synchronization, we explore a data-driven approach for the problem of converting natural speech to singing voice. We develop a novel neural network architecture, called SymNet, which models the alignment of the input speech with the target melody while preserving the speaker identity and naturalness. The proposed SymNet model is comprised of symmetrical stack of three types of layers - convolutional, transformer, and self-attention layers. The paper also explores novel data augmentation and generative loss annealing methods to facilitate the model training. Experiments are performed on the NUS and NHSS datasets which consist of parallel data of speech and singing voice. In these experiments, we show that the proposed SymNet model improves the objective reconstruction quality significantly over the previously published methods and baseline architectures. Further, a subjective listening test confirms the improved quality of the audio obtained using the proposed approach (absolute improvement of 0.37 in mean opinion score measure over the baseline system).
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种将语音风格迁移到歌声的模型。与之前基于信号处理的方法需要高质量的歌唱模板或音素同步相反，我们探索了一种数据驱动的方法来解决将自然语音转换为歌声的问题。我们开发了一种新颖的神经网络架构，称为 SymNet，它对输入语音与目标旋律的对齐进行建模，同时保留说话者的身份和自然度。所提出的 SymNet 模型由三种类型的层的对称堆栈组成：卷积层、变换器层和自注意力层。本文还探索了新颖的数据增强和生成损失退火方法以促进模型训练。在 NUS 和 NHSS 数据集上进行了实验，该数据集由语音和歌声的并行数据组成。在这些实验中，我们表明，与之前发布的方法和基线架构相比，所提出的 SymNet 模型显着提高了客观重建质量。此外，主观听力测试证实了使用所提出的方法获得的音频质量得到了提高（平均意见得分测量相对于基线系统绝对提高了 0.37）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对称卷积变换器网络（SymNet）的语音到歌唱风格迁移模型，无需高质量模板即可实现自然语音到歌唱语音的转换。
AI.motivation: 传统信号处理方法依赖高质量歌唱模板或音素同步，限制了应用灵活性，需探索数据驱动的端到端解决方案。
AI.method: 设计SymNet架构，包含卷积层、变换器层和自注意力层的对称堆叠，并引入数据增强和生成损失退火技术优化训练。
AI.result: 在NUS和NHSS数据集上，SymNet在客观重建质量上显著优于现有方法，主观测试MOS评分提升0.37。
AI.conclusion: SymNet通过融合多类型网络层和创新训练策略，有效实现了语音到歌唱风格的高质量迁移，验证了数据驱动方法的优越性。

search_text: Leveraging Symmetrical Convolutional Transformer Networks for Speech to Singing Voice Style Transfer 利用对称卷积变压器网络进行语音到歌声的风格转换 In this paper, we propose a model to perform style transfer of speech to singing voice. Contrary to the previous signal processing-based methods, which require high-quality singing templates or phoneme synchronization, we explore a data-driven approach for the problem of converting natural speech to singing voice. We develop a novel neural network architecture, called SymNet, which models the alignment of the input speech with the target melody while preserving the speaker identity and naturalness. The proposed SymNet model is comprised of symmetrical stack of three types of layers - convolutional, transformer, and self-attention layers. The paper also explores novel data augmentation and generative loss annealing methods to facilitate the model training. Experiments are performed on the NUS and NHSS datasets which consist of parallel data of speech and singing voice. In these experiments, we show that the proposed SymNet model improves the objective reconstruction quality significantly over the previously published methods and baseline architectures. Further, a subjective listening test confirms the improved quality of the audio obtained using the proposed approach (absolute improvement of 0.37 in mean opinion score measure over the baseline system). 在本文中，我们提出了一种将语音风格迁移到歌声的模型。与之前基于信号处理的方法需要高质量的歌唱模板或音素同步相反，我们探索了一种数据驱动的方法来解决将自然语音转换为歌声的问题。我们开发了一种新颖的神经网络架构，称为 SymNet，它对输入语音与目标旋律的对齐进行建模，同时保留说话者的身份和自然度。所提出的 SymNet 模型由三种类型的层的对称堆栈组成：卷积层、变换器层和自注意力层。本文还探索了新颖的数据增强和生成损失退火方法以促进模型训练。在 NUS 和 NHSS 数据集上进行了实验，该数据集由语音和歌声的并行数据组成。在这些实验中，我们表明，与之前发布的方法和基线架构相比，所提出的 SymNet 模型显着提高了客观重建质量。此外，主观听力测试证实了使用所提出的方法获得的音频质量得到了提高（平均意见得分测量相对于基线系统绝对提高了 0.37）。 本文提出一种基于对称卷积变换器网络（SymNet）的语音到歌唱风格迁移模型，无需高质量模板即可实现自然语音到歌唱语音的转换。 Shrutina Agarwal,Sriram Ganapathy,Naoya Takahashi cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Yuki Endo
title: User-Controllable Latent Transformer for StyleGAN Image Layout Editing
title_zh: 用于 StyleGAN 图像布局编辑的用户可控潜在变压器
comment: Accepted to Pacific Graphics 2022, project page: http://www.cgg.cs.tsukuba.ac.jp/~endo/projects/UserControllableLT
comments: Accepted to Pacific Graphics 2022, project page: http://www.cgg.cs.tsukuba.ac.jp/~endo/projects/UserControllableLT
abstract: Latent space exploration is a technique that discovers interpretable latent directions and manipulates latent codes to edit various attributes in images generated by generative adversarial networks (GANs). However, in previous work, spatial control is limited to simple transformations (e.g., translation and rotation), and it is laborious to identify appropriate latent directions and adjust their parameters. In this paper, we tackle the problem of editing the StyleGAN image layout by annotating the image directly. To do so, we propose an interactive framework for manipulating latent codes in accordance with the user inputs. In our framework, the user annotates a StyleGAN image with locations they want to move or not and specifies a movement direction by mouse dragging. From these user inputs and initial latent codes, our latent transformer based on a transformer encoder-decoder architecture estimates the output latent codes, which are fed to the StyleGAN generator to obtain a result image. To train our latent transformer, we utilize synthetic data and pseudo-user inputs generated by off-the-shelf StyleGAN and optical flow models, without manual supervision. Quantitative and qualitative evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness of our method over existing methods.
summary: Latent space exploration is a technique that discovers interpretable latent directions and manipulates latent codes to edit various attributes in images generated by generative adversarial networks (GANs). However, in previous work, spatial control is limited to simple transformations (e.g., translation and rotation), and it is laborious to identify appropriate latent directions and adjust their parameters. In this paper, we tackle the problem of editing the StyleGAN image layout by annotating the image directly. To do so, we propose an interactive framework for manipulating latent codes in accordance with the user inputs. In our framework, the user annotates a StyleGAN image with locations they want to move or not and specifies a movement direction by mouse dragging. From these user inputs and initial latent codes, our latent transformer based on a transformer encoder-decoder architecture estimates the output latent codes, which are fed to the StyleGAN generator to obtain a result image. To train our latent transformer, we utilize synthetic data and pseudo-user inputs generated by off-the-shelf StyleGAN and optical flow models, without manual supervision. Quantitative and qualitative evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness of our method over existing methods.
abstract_zh: 潜在空间探索是一种发现可解释的潜在方向并操纵潜在代码来编辑生成对抗网络（GAN）生成的图像中的各种属性的技术。然而，在以前的工作中，空间控制仅限于简单的变换（例如平移和旋转），并且识别适当的潜在方向并调整其参数是很费力的。在本文中，我们通过直接注释图像来解决编辑 StyleGAN 图像布局的问题。为此，我们提出了一个交互式框架，用于根据用户输入操作潜在代码。在我们的框架中，用户用他们想要移动或不移动的位置注释 StyleGAN 图像，并通过鼠标拖动指定移动方向。根据这些用户输入和初始潜在代码，我们基于 Transformer 编码器-解码器架构的潜在 Transformer 估计输出潜在代码，这些代码被馈送到 StyleGAN 生成器以获得结果图像。为了训练我们的潜在变压器，我们利用由现成的 StyleGAN 和光流模型生成的合成数据和伪用户输入，无需人工监督。定量和定性评估证明了我们的方法相对于现有方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于用户直接标注的交互式框架，用于控制StyleGAN生成图像的布局编辑。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在StyleGAN图像布局编辑中空间控制能力有限，且需繁琐的手动调整，难以满足直观编辑需求。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer编码器-解码器架构的潜在空间转换器，通过用户标注的移动区域和鼠标拖拽方向，结合初始潜在代码生成编辑后的潜在代码。
AI.result: 定量与定性评估表明，该方法在图像布局编辑任务上优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过用户直接交互和合成数据训练，实现了高效直观的StyleGAN图像布局编辑，推动了潜在空间编辑技术的发展。

authors_text: Danfei Xu,Yuxiao Chen,Boris Ivanovic,Marco Pavone
title: BITS: Bi-level Imitation for Traffic Simulation
title_zh: BITS：交通模拟的双层模拟
abstract: Simulation is the key to scaling up validation and verification for robotic systems such as autonomous vehicles. Despite advances in high-fidelity physics and sensor simulation, a critical gap remains in simulating realistic behaviors of road users. This is because, unlike simulating physics and graphics, devising first principle models for human-like behaviors is generally infeasible. In this work, we take a data-driven approach and propose a method that can learn to generate traffic behaviors from real-world driving logs. The method achieves high sample efficiency and behavior diversity by exploiting the bi-level hierarchy of driving behaviors by decoupling the traffic simulation problem into high-level intent inference and low-level driving behavior imitation. The method also incorporates a planning module to obtain stable long-horizon behaviors. We empirically validate our method, named Bi-level Imitation for Traffic Simulation (BITS), with scenarios from two large-scale driving datasets and show that BITS achieves balanced traffic simulation performance in realism, diversity, and long-horizon stability. We also explore ways to evaluate behavior realism and introduce a suite of evaluation metrics for traffic simulation. Finally, as part of our core contributions, we develop and open source a software tool that unifies data formats across different driving datasets and converts scenes from existing datasets into interactive simulation environments. For additional information and videos, see https://sites.google.com/view/nvr-bits2022/home
summary: Simulation is the key to scaling up validation and verification for robotic systems such as autonomous vehicles. Despite advances in high-fidelity physics and sensor simulation, a critical gap remains in simulating realistic behaviors of road users. This is because, unlike simulating physics and graphics, devising first principle models for human-like behaviors is generally infeasible. In this work, we take a data-driven approach and propose a method that can learn to generate traffic behaviors from real-world driving logs. The method achieves high sample efficiency and behavior diversity by exploiting the bi-level hierarchy of driving behaviors by decoupling the traffic simulation problem into high-level intent inference and low-level driving behavior imitation. The method also incorporates a planning module to obtain stable long-horizon behaviors. We empirically validate our method, named Bi-level Imitation for Traffic Simulation (BITS), with scenarios from two large-scale driving datasets and show that BITS achieves balanced traffic simulation performance in realism, diversity, and long-horizon stability. We also explore ways to evaluate behavior realism and introduce a suite of evaluation metrics for traffic simulation. Finally, as part of our core contributions, we develop and open source a software tool that unifies data formats across different driving datasets and converts scenes from existing datasets into interactive simulation environments. For additional information and videos, see https://sites.google.com/view/nvr-bits2022/home
abstract_zh: 仿真是扩大自动驾驶汽车等机器人系统验证和验证规模的关键。尽管高保真物理和传感器模拟取得了进步，但在模拟道路使用者的真实行为方面仍然存在关键差距。这是因为，与模拟物理和图形不同，为类人行为设计第一原理模型通常是不可行的。在这项工作中，我们采用数据驱动的方法，并提出了一种可以学习从现实世界的驾驶日志生成交通行为的方法。该方法通过将交通模拟问题解耦为高层意图推断和低层驾驶行为模仿，利用驾驶行为的双层层次结构，实现了高样本效率和行为多样性。该方法还结合了一个规划模块来获得稳定的长期行为。我们利用两个大型驾驶数据集的场景对我们的方法进行了实证验证，该方法称为交通模拟双层模拟（BITS），并表明 BITS 在真实性、多样性和长期稳定性方面实现了平衡的交通模拟性能。我们还探索了评估行为真实性的方法，并引入了一套用于交通模拟的评估指标。最后，作为我们核心贡献的一部分，我们开发并开源了一个软件工具，该工具可以统一不同驾驶数据集的数据格式，并将现有数据集的场景转换为交互式模拟环境。有关更多信息和视频，请参阅 https://sites.google.com/view/nvr-bits2022/home

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于双层次模仿学习的交通模拟方法（BITS），通过分析真实驾驶数据生成具有现实性、多样性和长期稳定性的交通行为。
AI.motivation: 尽管物理和传感器仿真技术已取得进展，但模拟真实道路用户行为仍存在关键挑战，传统基于物理原理的建模方法难以捕捉人类驾驶行为的复杂性。
AI.method: 采用双层次架构，将交通模拟分解为高层意图推断与底层驾驶行为模仿，并引入规划模块确保长期行为稳定性，通过大规模驾驶数据集验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在两个大规模数据集上验证了BITS在现实性、行为多样性和长期稳定性方面的平衡表现，开发了行为真实性评估指标及跨数据集格式统一工具。
AI.conclusion: BITS通过双层次模仿学习有效解决了交通行为模拟难题，并提供了可复用的开源工具与评估体系，为自动驾驶验证提供了新思路。

motivation: 尽管物理和传感器仿真技术已取得进展，但模拟真实道路用户行为仍存在关键挑战，传统基于物理原理的建模方法难以捕捉人类驾驶行为的复杂性。
method: 采用双层次架构，将交通模拟分解为高层意图推断与底层驾驶行为模仿，并引入规划模块确保长期行为稳定性，通过大规模驾驶数据集验证方法有效性。
result: 在两个大规模数据集上验证了BITS在现实性、行为多样性和长期稳定性方面的平衡表现，开发了行为真实性评估指标及跨数据集格式统一工具。
conclusion: BITS通过双层次模仿学习有效解决了交通行为模拟难题，并提供了可复用的开源工具与评估体系，为自动驾驶验证提供了新思路。
search_text: BITS: Bi-level Imitation for Traffic Simulation BITS：交通模拟的双层模拟 Simulation is the key to scaling up validation and verification for robotic systems such as autonomous vehicles. Despite advances in high-fidelity physics and sensor simulation, a critical gap remains in simulating realistic behaviors of road users. This is because, unlike simulating physics and graphics, devising first principle models for human-like behaviors is generally infeasible. In this work, we take a data-driven approach and propose a method that can learn to generate traffic behaviors from real-world driving logs. The method achieves high sample efficiency and behavior diversity by exploiting the bi-level hierarchy of driving behaviors by decoupling the traffic simulation problem into high-level intent inference and low-level driving behavior imitation. The method also incorporates a planning module to obtain stable long-horizon behaviors. We empirically validate our method, named Bi-level Imitation for Traffic Simulation (BITS), with scenarios from two large-scale driving datasets and show that BITS achieves balanced traffic simulation performance in realism, diversity, and long-horizon stability. We also explore ways to evaluate behavior realism and introduce a suite of evaluation metrics for traffic simulation. Finally, as part of our core contributions, we develop and open source a software tool that unifies data formats across different driving datasets and converts scenes from existing datasets into interactive simulation environments. For additional information and videos, see https://sites.google.com/view/nvr-bits2022/home 仿真是扩大自动驾驶汽车等机器人系统验证和验证规模的关键。尽管高保真物理和传感器模拟取得了进步，但在模拟道路使用者的真实行为方面仍然存在关键差距。这是因为，与模拟物理和图形不同，为类人行为设计第一原理模型通常是不可行的。在这项工作中，我们采用数据驱动的方法，并提出了一种可以学习从现实世界的驾驶日志生成交通行为的方法。该方法通过将交通模拟问题解耦为高层意图推断和低层驾驶行为模仿，利用驾驶行为的双层层次结构，实现了高样本效率和行为多样性。该方法还结合了一个规划模块来获得稳定的长期行为。我们利用两个大型驾驶数据集的场景对我们的方法进行了实证验证，该方法称为交通模拟双层模拟（BITS），并表明 BITS 在真实性、多样性和长期稳定性方面实现了平衡的交通模拟性能。我们还探索了评估行为真实性的方法，并引入了一套用于交通模拟的评估指标。最后，作为我们核心贡献的一部分，我们开发并开源了一个软件工具，该工具可以统一不同驾驶数据集的数据格式，并将现有数据集的场景转换为交互式模拟环境。有关更多信息和视频，请参阅 https://sites.google.com/view/nvr-bits2022/home 本文提出了一种基于双层次模仿学习的交通模拟方法（BITS），通过分析真实驾驶数据生成具有现实性、多样性和长期稳定性的交通行为。 Danfei Xu,Yuxiao Chen,Boris Ivanovic,Marco Pavone cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Xixi Wang,Xiao Wang,Bo Jiang,Bin Luo
title: Few-Shot Learning Meets Transformer: Unified Query-Support Transformers for Few-Shot Classification
title_zh: Few-Shot 学习遇到 Transformer：用于少样本分类的统一查询支持 Transformer
abstract: Few-shot classification which aims to recognize unseen classes using very limited samples has attracted more and more attention. Usually, it is formulated as a metric learning problem. The core issue of few-shot classification is how to learn (1) consistent representations for images in both support and query sets and (2) effective metric learning for images between support and query sets. In this paper, we show that the two challenges can be well modeled simultaneously via a unified Query-Support TransFormer (QSFormer) model. To be specific,the proposed QSFormer involves global query-support sample Transformer (sampleFormer) branch and local patch Transformer (patchFormer) learning branch. sampleFormer aims to capture the dependence of samples in support and query sets for image representation. It adopts the Encoder, Decoder and Cross-Attention to respectively model the Support, Query (image) representation and Metric learning for few-shot classification task. Also, as a complementary to global learning branch, we adopt a local patch Transformer to extract structural representation for each image sample by capturing the long-range dependence of local image patches. In addition, a novel Cross-scale Interactive Feature Extractor (CIFE) is proposed to extract and fuse multi-scale CNN features as an effective backbone module for the proposed few-shot learning method. All modules are integrated into a unified framework and trained in an end-to-end manner. Extensive experiments on four popular datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed QSFormer.

To be specific,the proposed QSFormer involves global query-support sample Transformer (sampleFormer) branch and local patch Transformer (patchFormer) learning branch. sampleFormer aims to capture the dependence of samples in support and query sets for image representation. It adopts the Encoder, Decoder and Cross-Attention to respectively model the Support, Query (image) representation and Metric learning for few-shot classification task. Also, as a complementary to global learning branch, we adopt a local patch Transformer to extract structural representation for each image sample by capturing the long-range dependence of local image patches. In addition, a novel Cross-scale Interactive Feature Extractor (CIFE) is proposed to extract and fuse multi-scale CNN features as an effective backbone module for the proposed few-shot learning method. All modules are integrated into a unified framework and trained in an end-to-end manner. Extensive experiments on four popular datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed QSFormer.
abstract_zh: 旨在使用非常有限的样本识别未见过的类的小样本分类引起了越来越多的关注。通常，它被表述为度量学习问题。少样本分类的核心问题是如何学习（1）支持集和查询集中图像的一致表示以及（2）支持集和查询集之间图像的有效度量学习。在本文中，我们表明可以通过统一的查询支持 TransFormer (QSFormer) 模型同时对这两个挑战进行很好的建模。具体来说，所提出的QSFormer涉及全局查询支持样本Transformer（sampleFormer）分支和局部补丁Transformer（patchFormer）学习分支。 SampleFormer 旨在捕获图像表示的支持集和查询集中样本的依赖性。它采用编码器、解码器和交叉注意力分别对小样本分类任务的支持、查询（图像）表示和度量学习进行建模。此外，作为全局学习分支的补充，我们采用局部补丁 Transformer 通过捕获局部图像补丁的远程依赖性来提取每个图像样本的结构表示。此外，还提出了一种新颖的跨尺度交互式特征提取器（CIFE）来提取和融合多尺度 CNN 特征，作为所提出的少样本学习方法的有效骨干模块。所有模块都集成到统一的框架中，并以端到端的方式进行训练。对四个流行数据集的广泛实验证明了所提出的 QSFormer 的有效性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的Query-Support Transformer（QSFormer）模型，用于解决少样本分类任务中的表示学习与度量学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本分类方法难以同时处理支持集与查询集的表示一致性及跨集度量学习，需设计统一框架解决双重挑战。
AI.method: QSFormer包含全局sampleFormer分支（建模样本间依赖关系）与局部patchFormer分支（提取图像结构特征），并引入跨尺度特征提取器（CIFE）融合多尺度特征，通过端到端训练实现统一框架。
AI.result: 在四个主流数据集上实验验证了QSFormer的有效性，优于现有少样本分类方法。
AI.conclusion: QSFormer通过联合建模全局样本依赖与局部结构特征，为少样本分类提供了更优的统一解决方案。

search_text: Few-Shot Learning Meets Transformer: Unified Query-Support Transformers for Few-Shot Classification Few-Shot 学习遇到 Transformer：用于少样本分类的统一查询支持 Transformer Few-shot classification which aims to recognize unseen classes using very limited samples has attracted more and more attention. Usually, it is formulated as a metric learning problem. The core issue of few-shot classification is how to learn (1) consistent representations for images in both support and query sets and (2) effective metric learning for images between support and query sets. In this paper, we show that the two challenges can be well modeled simultaneously via a unified Query-Support TransFormer (QSFormer) model. To be specific,the proposed QSFormer involves global query-support sample Transformer (sampleFormer) branch and local patch Transformer (patchFormer) learning branch. sampleFormer aims to capture the dependence of samples in support and query sets for image representation. It adopts the Encoder, Decoder and Cross-Attention to respectively model the Support, Query (image) representation and Metric learning for few-shot classification task. Also, as a complementary to global learning branch, we adopt a local patch Transformer to extract structural representation for each image sample by capturing the long-range dependence of local image patches. In addition, a novel Cross-scale Interactive Feature Extractor (CIFE) is proposed to extract and fuse multi-scale CNN features as an effective backbone module for the proposed few-shot learning method. All modules are integrated into a unified framework and trained in an end-to-end manner. Extensive experiments on four popular datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed QSFormer. 旨在使用非常有限的样本识别未见过的类的小样本分类引起了越来越多的关注。通常，它被表述为度量学习问题。少样本分类的核心问题是如何学习（1）支持集和查询集中图像的一致表示以及（2）支持集和查询集之间图像的有效度量学习。在本文中，我们表明可以通过统一的查询支持 TransFormer (QSFormer) 模型同时对这两个挑战进行很好的建模。具体来说，所提出的QSFormer涉及全局查询支持样本Transformer（sampleFormer）分支和局部补丁Transformer（patchFormer）学习分支。 SampleFormer 旨在捕获图像表示的支持集和查询集中样本的依赖性。它采用编码器、解码器和交叉注意力分别对小样本分类任务的支持、查询（图像）表示和度量学习进行建模。此外，作为全局学习分支的补充，我们采用局部补丁 Transformer 通过捕获局部图像补丁的远程依赖性来提取每个图像样本的结构表示。此外，还提出了一种新颖的跨尺度交互式特征提取器（CIFE）来提取和融合多尺度 CNN 特征，作为所提出的少样本学习方法的有效骨干模块。所有模块都集成到统一的框架中，并以端到端的方式进行训练。对四个流行数据集的广泛实验证明了所提出的 QSFormer 的有效性和优越性。 本文提出一种统一的Query-Support Transformer（QSFormer）模型，用于解决少样本分类任务中的表示学习与度量学习问题。 Xixi Wang,Xiao Wang,Bo Jiang,Bin Luo cs.CV

authors_text: Wei Xu,Zaifeng Gao,Liezhong Ge
title: New research paradigms and agenda of human factors science in the intelligence era
title_zh: 智能时代人为因素科学的新研究范式与议程
abstract: This paper proposes the innovative concept of "human factors science" to characterize engineering psychology, human factors engineering, human-computer interaction, and other similar fields. Although the perspectives in these fields differ, they share a common approach: "human-centered design." In the AI era, the human-machine relationship presents a trans-era evolution to "human-AI teaming." The change has raised challenges for human factors science, compelling us to re-examine current research paradigms and agendas. Based on our previous work, this paper proposes three research paradigms: (1) human-AI joint cognitive systems: this regards an intelligent agent as a cognitive agent with a certain level of cognitive capabilities. A human-AI system can be characterized as a joint cognitive system in which humans and intelligent agents work as teammates for collaboration; (2) human-AI joint cognitive ecosystems: an intelligent ecosystem with multiple human-AI systems can be represented as a human-AI joint cognitive ecosystem. The overall performance of the ecosystem depends on optima collaboration and design across the multiple human-AI systems; (3) intelligent sociotechnical systems (iSTS): human-AI systems are design, developed, and deployed in an iSTS environment. The successful design, development, and deployment of a human-AI system within an iSTS environment depends on the synergistic optimization between the subsystems. This paper looks forward to the future research agenda of human factors science from three aspects: human-AI interaction, intelligent human-machine interface, and human-AI teaming. Analyses show that the three new research paradigms will benefit future research in human factors science. We believe the proposed research paradigms and the future research agenda will mutually promote each other, further advancing human factors science in the AI era.
summary: This paper proposes the innovative concept of "human factors science" to characterize engineering psychology, human factors engineering, human-computer interaction, and other similar fields. Although the perspectives in these fields differ, they share a common approach: "human-centered design." In the AI era, the human-machine relationship presents a trans-era evolution to "human-AI teaming." The change has raised challenges for human factors science, compelling us to re-examine current research paradigms and agendas. Based on our previous work, this paper proposes three research paradigms: (1) human-AI joint cognitive systems: this regards an intelligent agent as a cognitive agent with a certain level of cognitive capabilities. A human-AI system can be characterized as a joint cognitive system in which humans and intelligent agents work as teammates for collaboration; (2) human-AI joint cognitive ecosystems: an intelligent ecosystem with multiple human-AI systems can be represented as a human-AI joint cognitive ecosystem. The overall performance of the ecosystem depends on optima collaboration and design across the multiple human-AI systems; (3) intelligent sociotechnical systems (iSTS): human-AI systems are design, developed, and deployed in an iSTS environment. The successful design, development, and deployment of a human-AI system within an iSTS environment depends on the synergistic optimization between the subsystems. This paper looks forward to the future research agenda of human factors science from three aspects: human-AI interaction, intelligent human-machine interface, and human-AI teaming. Analyses show that the three new research paradigms will benefit future research in human factors science. We believe the proposed research paradigms and the future research agenda will mutually promote each other, further advancing human factors science in the AI era.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了“人因科学”的创新概念，以表征工程心理学、人因工程、人机交互等类似领域。尽管这些领域的观点不同，但他们有一个共同的方法：“以人为本的设计”。人工智能时代，人机关系呈现出向“人机协作”的跨时代演变。这一变化给人因科学带来了挑战，迫使我们重新审视当前的研究范式和议程。基于我们之前的工作，本文提出了三种研究范式：（1）人机联合认知系统：将智能体视为具有一定认知能力的认知体。人类-人工智能系统可以被描述为一个联合认知系统，其中人类和智能体作为队友进行协作； （2）人-AI联合认知生态系统：具有多个人-AI系统的智能生态系统可以表示为人-AI联合认知生态系统。生态系统的整体性能取决于多个人类人工智能系统的最佳协作和设计； (3)智能社会技术系统(iSTS)：人类人工智能系统是在iSTS环境中设计、开发和部署的。 iSTS 环境中人类人工智能系统的成功设计、开发和部署取决于子系统之间的协同优化。本文从人机交互、智能人机界面、人机协作三个方面展望了人因科学未来的研究议程。分析表明，这三种新的研究范式将有利于人因科学的未来研究。我们相信所提出的研究范式和未来的研究议程将相互促进，进一步推进人工智能时代的人因科学。

AI.tldr: 本文提出人工智能时代人因科学的新研究范式与议程，聚焦人机协同关系的演变及应对策略。
AI.motivation: 人工智能技术的发展使人机关系从传统协作转向人机团队协作，现有研究范式难以应对由此产生的新挑战。
AI.method: 基于前期研究，提出三种新范式：人机联合认知系统、人机联合认知生态系统及智能人机社会技术系统，并展望未来研究方向。
AI.result: 构建了三大研究范式框架，明确了人机交互、智能界面及团队协作三个未来研究重点，为领域发展提供理论支撑。
AI.conclusion: 新范式与研究议程将相互促进，推动人工智能时代人因科学的理论创新与实践应用。

search_text: New research paradigms and agenda of human factors science in the intelligence era 智能时代人为因素科学的新研究范式与议程 This paper proposes the innovative concept of "human factors science" to characterize engineering psychology, human factors engineering, human-computer interaction, and other similar fields. Although the perspectives in these fields differ, they share a common approach: "human-centered design." In the AI era, the human-machine relationship presents a trans-era evolution to "human-AI teaming." The change has raised challenges for human factors science, compelling us to re-examine current research paradigms and agendas. Based on our previous work, this paper proposes three research paradigms: (1) human-AI joint cognitive systems: this regards an intelligent agent as a cognitive agent with a certain level of cognitive capabilities. A human-AI system can be characterized as a joint cognitive system in which humans and intelligent agents work as teammates for collaboration; (2) human-AI joint cognitive ecosystems: an intelligent ecosystem with multiple human-AI systems can be represented as a human-AI joint cognitive ecosystem. The overall performance of the ecosystem depends on optima collaboration and design across the multiple human-AI systems; (3) intelligent sociotechnical systems (iSTS): human-AI systems are design, developed, and deployed in an iSTS environment. The successful design, development, and deployment of a human-AI system within an iSTS environment depends on the synergistic optimization between the subsystems. This paper looks forward to the future research agenda of human factors science from three aspects: human-AI interaction, intelligent human-machine interface, and human-AI teaming. Analyses show that the three new research paradigms will benefit future research in human factors science. We believe the proposed research paradigms and the future research agenda will mutually promote each other, further advancing human factors science in the AI era. 本文提出了“人因科学”的创新概念，以表征工程心理学、人因工程、人机交互等类似领域。尽管这些领域的观点不同，但他们有一个共同的方法：“以人为本的设计”。人工智能时代，人机关系呈现出向“人机协作”的跨时代演变。这一变化给人因科学带来了挑战，迫使我们重新审视当前的研究范式和议程。基于我们之前的工作，本文提出了三种研究范式：（1）人机联合认知系统：将智能体视为具有一定认知能力的认知体。人类-人工智能系统可以被描述为一个联合认知系统，其中人类和智能体作为队友进行协作； （2）人-AI联合认知生态系统：具有多个人-AI系统的智能生态系统可以表示为人-AI联合认知生态系统。生态系统的整体性能取决于多个人类人工智能系统的最佳协作和设计； (3)智能社会技术系统(iSTS)：人类人工智能系统是在iSTS环境中设计、开发和部署的。 iSTS 环境中人类人工智能系统的成功设计、开发和部署取决于子系统之间的协同优化。本文从人机交互、智能人机界面、人机协作三个方面展望了人因科学未来的研究议程。分析表明，这三种新的研究范式将有利于人因科学的未来研究。我们相信所提出的研究范式和未来的研究议程将相互促进，进一步推进人工智能时代的人因科学。 本文提出人工智能时代人因科学的新研究范式与议程，聚焦人机协同关系的演变及应对策略。 Wei Xu,Zaifeng Gao,Liezhong Ge cs.HC

authors_text: Beomsik Park,Ranggi Hwang,Dongho Yoon,Yoonhyuk Choi,Minsoo Rhu
title: DiVa: An Accelerator for Differentially Private Machine Learning
title_zh: DiVa：差分隐私机器学习的加速器
comment: Accepted for publication at the 55th IEEE/ACM International Symposium on Microarchitecture (MICRO-55), 2022
comments: Accepted for publication at the 55th IEEE/ACM International Symposium on Microarchitecture (MICRO-55), 2022
abstract: The widespread deployment of machine learning (ML) is raising serious concerns on protecting the privacy of users who contributed to the collection of training data. Differential privacy (DP) is rapidly gaining momentum in the industry as a practical standard for privacy protection. Despite DP's importance, however, little has been explored within the computer systems community regarding the implication of this emerging ML algorithm on system designs. In this work, we conduct a detailed workload characterization on a state-of-the-art differentially private ML training algorithm named DP-SGD. We uncover several unique properties of DP-SGD (e.g., its high memory capacity and computation requirements vs. non-private ML), root-causing its key bottlenecks. Based on our analysis, we propose an accelerator for differentially private ML named DiVa, which provides a significant improvement in compute utilization, leading to 2.6x higher energy-efficiency vs. conventional systolic arrays.
summary: The widespread deployment of machine learning (ML) is raising serious concerns on protecting the privacy of users who contributed to the collection of training data. Differential privacy (DP) is rapidly gaining momentum in the industry as a practical standard for privacy protection. Despite DP's importance, however, little has been explored within the computer systems community regarding the implication of this emerging ML algorithm on system designs. In this work, we conduct a detailed workload characterization on a state-of-the-art differentially private ML training algorithm named DP-SGD. We uncover several unique properties of DP-SGD (e.g., its high memory capacity and computation requirements vs. non-private ML), root-causing its key bottlenecks. Based on our analysis, we propose an accelerator for differentially private ML named DiVa, which provides a significant improvement in compute utilization, leading to 2.6x higher energy-efficiency vs. conventional systolic arrays.
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 的广泛部署引发了人们对保护参与训练数据收集的用户隐私的严重担忧。差分隐私（DP）作为隐私保护的实用标准在业界迅速发展。然而，尽管 DP 很重要，但计算机系统社区内很少有人探讨这种新兴的 ML 算法对系统设计的影响。在这项工作中，我们对名为 DP-SGD 的最先进的差分隐私 ML 训练算法进行了详细的工作负载表征。我们发现了 DP-SGD 的几个独特属性（例如，与非私有 ML 相比，其高内存容量和计算要求），从根本上导致了其关键瓶颈。根据我们的分析，我们提出了一种名为 DiVa 的差分私有 ML 加速器，它显着提高了计算利用率，与传统脉动阵列相比，能源效率提高了 2.6 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiVa加速器，旨在提升差分隐私机器学习（DP-SGD）的计算效率与能源效率。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习的广泛应用，用户隐私保护需求迫切，但现有系统设计对差分隐私算法（如DP-SGD）的优化不足，导致计算资源浪费和能效低下。
AI.method: 通过分析DP-SGD的工作负载特性，识别其高内存和计算需求的瓶颈，设计专用加速器DiVa以优化计算利用率。
AI.result: DiVa相比传统系数组件实现2.6倍的能源效率提升，显著改善差分隐私训练的性能。
AI.conclusion: DiVa为差分隐私机器学习提供了高效的硬件支持，验证了针对隐私保护算法定制加速器的可行性与优势。

authors_text: Francesco Roscia,Andrea Cumerlotti,Andrea Del Prete,Claudio Semini,Michele Focchi
title: Orientation Control System: Enhancing Aerial Maneuvers for Quadruped Robots
title_zh: 方向控制系统：增强四足机器人的空中机动能力
abstract: For legged robots, aerial motions are the only option to overpass obstacles that cannot be circumvent with standard locomotion gaits. In these cases, the robot must perform a leap to either jump onto the obstacle or fly over it. However, these movements represent a challenge because during the flight phase the Center of Mass (CoM) cannot be controlled, and the robot orientation has limited controllability. This paper focuses on the latter issue and proposes an Orientation Control System (OCS) consisting of two rotating and actuated masses (flywheels or reaction wheels) to gain control authority on the robot orientation. Because of the conservation of angular momentum, their rotational velocity can be adjusted to steer the robot orientation even when there are no contacts with the ground. The axes of rotation of the flywheels are designed to be incident, leading to a compact orientation control system that is capable of controlling both roll and pitch angles, considering the different moment of inertia in the two directions. We tested the concept with simulations on the robot Solo12.
summary: For legged robots, aerial motions are the only option to overpass obstacles that cannot be circumvent with standard locomotion gaits. In these cases, the robot must perform a leap to either jump onto the obstacle or fly over it. However, these movements represent a challenge because during the flight phase the Center of Mass (CoM) cannot be controlled, and the robot orientation has limited controllability. This paper focuses on the latter issue and proposes an Orientation Control System (OCS) consisting of two rotating and actuated masses (flywheels or reaction wheels) to gain control authority on the robot orientation. Because of the conservation of angular momentum, their rotational velocity can be adjusted to steer the robot orientation even when there are no contacts with the ground. The axes of rotation of the flywheels are designed to be incident, leading to a compact orientation control system that is capable of controlling both roll and pitch angles, considering the different moment of inertia in the two directions. We tested the concept with simulations on the robot Solo12.
abstract_zh: 对于腿式机器人来说，空中运动是越过标准运动步态无法绕过的障碍物的唯一选择。在这些情况下，机器人必须执行跳跃才能跳到障碍物上或飞越障碍物。然而，这些运动是一个挑战，因为在飞行阶段质心（CoM）无法控制，并且机器人方向的可控性有限。本文主要针对后一个问题，提出了一种由两个旋转驱动质量（飞轮或反作用轮）组成的方向控制系统（OCS），以获得机器人方向的控制权。由于角动量守恒，即使在没有与地面接触的情况下，它们的旋转速度也可以调整以引导机器人方向。飞轮的旋转轴设计为入射角，从而形成紧凑的方向控制系统，考虑到两个方向上不同的惯性矩，能够控制侧倾角和俯仰角。我们通过机器人 Solo12 上的模拟测试了这一概念。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于四足机器人空中姿态控制的系统，通过旋转质量调节飞行时的姿态。
AI.motivation: 四足机器人在跨越障碍物时需进行跳跃等空中动作，但此时质心无法控制且姿态调节能力有限，亟需解决空中姿态控制问题。
AI.method: 设计包含两个旋转飞轮的控制系统，利用角动量守恒原理通过调节飞轮转速实现无接触状态下的姿态控制，飞轮轴线交叉布局以兼顾滚转与俯仰控制。
AI.result: 在Solo12机器人仿真中验证了该系统可有效控制空中飞行时的滚转和俯仰角度。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为四足机器人复杂地形跨越提供了可行的空中姿态控制方案，提升了其机动性。

authors_text: Elad Hazan,Adam Tauman Kalai,Varun Kanade,Clara Mohri,Y. Jennifer Sun
title: Partial Matrix Completion
title_zh: 部分矩阵完成
abstract: The matrix completion problem aims to reconstruct a low-rank matrix based on a revealed set of possibly noisy entries. Prior works consider completing the entire matrix with generalization error guarantees. However, the completion accuracy can be drastically different over different entries. This work establishes a new framework of partial matrix completion, where the goal is to identify a large subset of the entries that can be completed with high confidence. We propose an efficient algorithm with the following provable guarantees. Given access to samples from an unknown and arbitrary distribution, it guarantees: (a) high accuracy over completed entries, and (b) high coverage of the underlying distribution. We also consider an online learning variant of this problem, where we propose a low-regret algorithm based on iterative gradient updates. Preliminary empirical evaluations are included.
summary: The matrix completion problem aims to reconstruct a low-rank matrix based on a revealed set of possibly noisy entries. Prior works consider completing the entire matrix with generalization error guarantees. However, the completion accuracy can be drastically different over different entries. This work establishes a new framework of partial matrix completion, where the goal is to identify a large subset of the entries that can be completed with high confidence. We propose an efficient algorithm with the following provable guarantees. Given access to samples from an unknown and arbitrary distribution, it guarantees: (a) high accuracy over completed entries, and (b) high coverage of the underlying distribution. We also consider an online learning variant of this problem, where we propose a low-regret algorithm based on iterative gradient updates. Preliminary empirical evaluations are included.
abstract_zh: 矩阵补全问题旨在基于一组显示的可能有噪声的条目重建低秩矩阵。先前的工作考虑用泛化误差保证来完成整个矩阵。然而，不同条目的完成精度可能会有很大差异。这项工作建立了一个新的部分矩阵完成框架，其目标是识别可以高置信度完成的条目的大子集。我们提出了一种具有以下可证明保证的有效算法。如果可以访问未知且任意分布的样本，它可以保证：(a) 完整条目的高精度，以及 (b) 基础分布的高覆盖率。我们还考虑了这个问题的在线学习变体，我们提出了一种基于迭代梯度更新的低遗憾算法。包括初步的实证评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种部分矩阵补全的新框架，旨在高效识别高置信度补全的条目，并提供相应的算法保证。
AI.motivation: 传统矩阵补全方法关注整体矩阵重建，但不同条目精度差异显著。现有方法难以保证局部高置信度补全，需针对性优化。
AI.method: 设计高效算法，在未知分布下保证补全精度与分布覆盖率，同时提出基于迭代梯度更新的在线学习低遗憾算法。
AI.result: 理论证明算法在补全精度与覆盖率上具有高置信度，初步实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为局部高精度矩阵补全提供了理论支持与实用算法，未来可拓展至更多实际场景。

search_text: Partial Matrix Completion 部分矩阵完成 The matrix completion problem aims to reconstruct a low-rank matrix based on a revealed set of possibly noisy entries. Prior works consider completing the entire matrix with generalization error guarantees. However, the completion accuracy can be drastically different over different entries. This work establishes a new framework of partial matrix completion, where the goal is to identify a large subset of the entries that can be completed with high confidence. We propose an efficient algorithm with the following provable guarantees. Given access to samples from an unknown and arbitrary distribution, it guarantees: (a) high accuracy over completed entries, and (b) high coverage of the underlying distribution. We also consider an online learning variant of this problem, where we propose a low-regret algorithm based on iterative gradient updates. Preliminary empirical evaluations are included. 矩阵补全问题旨在基于一组显示的可能有噪声的条目重建低秩矩阵。先前的工作考虑用泛化误差保证来完成整个矩阵。然而，不同条目的完成精度可能会有很大差异。这项工作建立了一个新的部分矩阵完成框架，其目标是识别可以高置信度完成的条目的大子集。我们提出了一种具有以下可证明保证的有效算法。如果可以访问未知且任意分布的样本，它可以保证：(a) 完整条目的高精度，以及 (b) 基础分布的高覆盖率。我们还考虑了这个问题的在线学习变体，我们提出了一种基于迭代梯度更新的低遗憾算法。包括初步的实证评估。 本文提出了一种部分矩阵补全的新框架，旨在高效识别高置信度补全的条目，并提供相应的算法保证。 Elad Hazan,Adam Tauman Kalai,Varun Kanade,Clara Mohri,Y. Jennifer Sun cs.LG,cs.DS,cs.IR

authors_text: Dietmar Jannach
title: Evaluating Conversational Recommender Systems: A Landscape of Research
title_zh: 评估会话推荐系统：研究概况
abstract: Conversational recommender systems aim to interactively support online users in their information search and decision-making processes in an intuitive way. With the latest advances in voice-controlled devices, natural language processing, and AI in general, such systems received increased attention in recent years. Technically, conversational recommenders are usually complex multi-component applications and often consist of multiple machine learning models and a natural language user interface. Evaluating such a complex system in a holistic way can therefore be challenging, as it requires (i) the assessment of the quality of the different learning components, and (ii) the quality perception of the system as a whole by users. Thus, a mixed methods approach is often required, which may combine objective (computational) and subjective (perception-oriented) evaluation techniques. In this paper, we review common evaluation approaches for conversational recommender systems, identify possible limitations, and outline future directions towards more holistic evaluation practices.
summary: Conversational recommender systems aim to interactively support online users in their information search and decision-making processes in an intuitive way. With the latest advances in voice-controlled devices, natural language processing, and AI in general, such systems received increased attention in recent years. Technically, conversational recommenders are usually complex multi-component applications and often consist of multiple machine learning models and a natural language user interface. Evaluating such a complex system in a holistic way can therefore be challenging, as it requires (i) the assessment of the quality of the different learning components, and (ii) the quality perception of the system as a whole by users. Thus, a mixed methods approach is often required, which may combine objective (computational) and subjective (perception-oriented) evaluation techniques. In this paper, we review common evaluation approaches for conversational recommender systems, identify possible limitations, and outline future directions towards more holistic evaluation practices.
abstract_zh: 对话式推荐系统旨在以直观的方式交互式地支持在线用户的信息搜索和决策过程。随着语音控制设备、自然语言处理和人工智能的最新进展，此类系统近年来受到越来越多的关注。从技术上讲，会话推荐器通常是复杂的多组件应用程序，通常由多个机器学习模型和自然语言用户界面组成。因此，以整体方式评估这样一个复杂的系统可能具有挑战性，因为它需要（i）评估不同学习组件的质量，以及（ii）用户对整个系统的质量感知。因此，通常需要混合方法，它可以结合客观（计算）和主观（面向感知）的评估技术。在本文中，我们回顾了会话推荐系统的常见评估方法，确定了可能的局限性，并概述了更全面的评估实践的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了对话推荐系统的评估方法，分析其挑战并提出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 对话推荐系统因复杂性和多组件特性，需结合客观与主观方法进行评估，但现有研究缺乏系统性总结。
AI.method: 通过文献回顾，分析现有评估方法的优缺点并识别局限性。
AI.result: 总结了主流评估技术，指出其在多维度系统评价中的不足。
AI.conclusion: 需发展更全面的混合评估框架，结合计算指标与用户感知分析。

authors_text: Haozhe Liu,Bing Li,Haoqian Wu,Hanbang Liang,Yawen Huang,Yuexiang Li,Bernard Ghanem,Yefeng Zheng
title: Combating Mode Collapse in GANs via Manifold Entropy Estimation
title_zh: 通过流形熵估计对抗 GAN 中的模式崩溃
comment: Accepted by AAAI'2023 (Oral); Code is released at https://github.com/HaozheLiu-ST/MEE
comments: Accepted by AAAI'2023 (Oral); Code is released at https://github.com/HaozheLiu-ST/MEE
abstract: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have shown compelling results in various tasks and applications in recent years. However, mode collapse remains a critical problem in GANs. In this paper, we propose a novel training pipeline to address the mode collapse issue of GANs. Different from existing methods, we propose to generalize the discriminator as feature embedding and maximize the entropy of distributions in the embedding space learned by the discriminator. Specifically, two regularization terms, i.e., Deep Local Linear Embedding (DLLE) and Deep Isometric feature Mapping (DIsoMap), are designed to encourage the discriminator to learn the structural information embedded in the data, such that the embedding space learned by the discriminator can be well-formed. Based on the well-learned embedding space supported by the discriminator, a non-parametric entropy estimator is designed to efficiently maximize the entropy of embedding vectors, playing as an approximation of maximizing the entropy of the generated distribution. By improving the discriminator and maximizing the distance of the most similar samples in the embedding space, our pipeline effectively reduces the mode collapse without sacrificing the quality of generated samples. Extensive experimental results show the effectiveness of our method, which outperforms the GAN baseline, MaF-GAN on CelebA (9.13 vs. 12.43 in FID) and surpasses the recent state-of-the-art energy-based model on the ANIME-FACE dataset (2.80 vs. 2.26 in Inception score). The code is available at https://github.com/HaozheLiu-ST/MEE
summary: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have shown compelling results in various tasks and applications in recent years. However, mode collapse remains a critical problem in GANs. In this paper, we propose a novel training pipeline to address the mode collapse issue of GANs. Different from existing methods, we propose to generalize the discriminator as feature embedding and maximize the entropy of distributions in the embedding space learned by the discriminator. Specifically, two regularization terms, i.e., Deep Local Linear Embedding (DLLE) and Deep Isometric feature Mapping (DIsoMap), are designed to encourage the discriminator to learn the structural information embedded in the data, such that the embedding space learned by the discriminator can be well-formed. Based on the well-learned embedding space supported by the discriminator, a non-parametric entropy estimator is designed to efficiently maximize the entropy of embedding vectors, playing as an approximation of maximizing the entropy of the generated distribution. By improving the discriminator and maximizing the distance of the most similar samples in the embedding space, our pipeline effectively reduces the mode collapse without sacrificing the quality of generated samples. Extensive experimental results show the effectiveness of our method, which outperforms the GAN baseline, MaF-GAN on CelebA (9.13 vs. 12.43 in FID) and surpasses the recent state-of-the-art energy-based model on the ANIME-FACE dataset (2.80 vs. 2.26 in Inception score). The code is available at https://github.com/HaozheLiu-ST/MEE
abstract_zh: 近年来，生成对抗网络（GAN）在各种任务和应用中显示出了引人注目的结果。然而，模式崩溃仍然是 GAN 中的一个关键问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的训练流程来解决 GAN 的模式崩溃问题。与现有方法不同，我们建议将鉴别器推广为特征嵌入，并最大化鉴别器学习的嵌入空间中的分布熵。具体来说，两个正则化项，即深度局部线性嵌入（DLLE）和深度等距特征映射（DIsoMap），旨在鼓励判别器学习嵌入在数据中的结构信息，使得判别器学习的嵌入空间可以是良好形成的。基于判别器支持的良好学习的嵌入空间，设计了一个非参数熵估计器来有效地最大化嵌入向量的熵，作为最大化生成分布的熵的近似。通过改进鉴别器并最大化嵌入空间中最相似样本的距离，我们的管道有效地减少了模式崩溃，而无需牺牲生成样本的质量。大量的实验结果表明了我们的方法的有效性，它优于 GAN 基线、CelebA 上的 MaF-GAN（FID 中为 9.13 vs. 12.43），并且超越了 ANIME-FACE 数据集上最新的基于能量的模型（Inception 得分为 2.80 vs. 2.26）。代码可在 https://github.com/HaozheLiu-ST/MEE 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过流形熵估计解决生成对抗网络（GANs）中的模式崩溃问题。
AI.motivation: 模式崩溃是GANs训练中的关键问题，现有方法难以有效解决，需探索新策略以提升生成多样性。
AI.method: 将判别器泛化为特征嵌入空间，设计DLLE和DIsoMap正则化项优化嵌入结构，并通过非参数熵估计最大化嵌入向量熵以逼近生成分布熵。
AI.result: 在CelebA数据集上FID得分优于MaF-GAN（9.13 vs. 12.43），在ANIME-FACE数据集上Inception得分超越最新能量模型（2.80 vs. 2.26）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过改进判别器结构并最大化嵌入空间熵，有效缓解模式崩溃且不损害生成质量。

By improving the discriminator and maximizing the distance of the most similar samples in the embedding space, our pipeline effectively reduces the mode collapse without sacrificing the quality of generated samples. Extensive experimental results show the effectiveness of our method, which outperforms the GAN baseline, MaF-GAN on CelebA (9.13 vs. 12.43 in FID) and surpasses the recent state-of-the-art energy-based model on the ANIME-FACE dataset (2.80 vs. 2.26 in Inception score). The code is available at https://github.com/HaozheLiu-ST/MEE 近年来，生成对抗网络（GAN）在各种任务和应用中显示出了引人注目的结果。然而，模式崩溃仍然是 GAN 中的一个关键问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的训练流程来解决 GAN 的模式崩溃问题。与现有方法不同，我们建议将鉴别器推广为特征嵌入，并最大化鉴别器学习的嵌入空间中的分布熵。具体来说，两个正则化项，即深度局部线性嵌入（DLLE）和深度等距特征映射（DIsoMap），旨在鼓励判别器学习嵌入在数据中的结构信息，使得判别器学习的嵌入空间可以是良好形成的。基于判别器支持的良好学习的嵌入空间，设计了一个非参数熵估计器来有效地最大化嵌入向量的熵，作为最大化生成分布的熵的近似。通过改进鉴别器并最大化嵌入空间中最相似样本的距离，我们的管道有效地减少了模式崩溃，而无需牺牲生成样本的质量。大量的实验结果表明了我们的方法的有效性，它优于 GAN 基线、CelebA 上的 MaF-GAN（FID 中为 9.13 vs. 12.43），并且超越了 ANIME-FACE 数据集上最新的基于能量的模型（Inception 得分为 2.80 vs. 2.26）。代码可在 https://github.com/HaozheLiu-ST/MEE 获取 本文提出通过流形熵估计解决生成对抗网络（GANs）中的模式崩溃问题。 Haozhe Liu,Bing Li,Haoqian Wu,Hanbang Liang,Yawen Huang,Yuexiang Li,Bernard Ghanem,Yefeng Zheng cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: R. Nithya,K. Anitha
title: Even vertex $ζ$-graceful labeling on Rough Graph
title_zh: 粗糙图上的偶数顶点$z$-优雅标记
abstract: Rough graph is the graphical structure of information system with imprecise knowledge. Tong He designed the properties of rough graph in 2006[6] and following that He and Shi introduced the notion of edge rough graph[7]. He et al developed the concept of weighted rough graph with weighted attributes[6]. In this paper, we introduce a new type of labeling called Even vertex ζ- graceful labeling as weight value for edges. We investigate this labeling for some special graphs like rough path graph, rough cycle graph, rough comb graph, rough ladder graph and rough star graph.
summary: Rough graph is the graphical structure of information system with imprecise knowledge. Tong He designed the properties of rough graph in 2006[6] and following that He and Shi introduced the notion of edge rough graph[7]. He et al developed the concept of weighted rough graph with weighted attributes[6]. In this paper, we introduce a new type of labeling called Even vertex ζ- graceful labeling as weight value for edges. We investigate this labeling for some special graphs like rough path graph, rough cycle graph, rough comb graph, rough ladder graph and rough star graph.
abstract_zh: 粗糙图是知识不精确的信息系统的图形结构。 Tong He于2006年设计了粗糙图的性质[6]，随后He和Shi引入了边缘粗糙图的概念[7]。他等人提出了带有加权属性的加权粗糙图的概念[6]。在本文中，我们引入了一种称为偶数顶点 z 的新型标记 - 优雅标记作为边的权重值。我们研究了一些特殊图的这种标记，例如粗略路径图、粗略循环图、粗略梳状图、粗略梯形图和粗略星形图。

AI.tldr: 本文引入了一种新的Even vertex ζ-优雅标签方法，并研究其在粗糙路径图、循环图等特殊图上的应用。
AI.motivation: 粗糙图用于处理信息系统的不精确知识，现有标签方法可能无法有效处理，因此需要新的标签方法。
AI.method: 通过引入Even vertex ζ-优雅标签作为边权重，分析其在多种特殊粗糙图中的适用性。
AI.result: 成功为多种特殊粗糙图（如路径、循环、梳状等）实现了Even vertex ζ-优雅标签。
AI.conclusion: 该标签方法有效，为粗糙图理论的应用和扩展提供了新的视角。

authors_text: Jingcai Guo,Song Guo,Jie Zhang,Ziming Liu
title: Fed-FSNet: Mitigating Non-I.I.D. Federated Learning via Fuzzy Synthesizing Network
title_zh: Fed-FSNet：缓解非 I.I.D.通过模糊综合网络进行联邦学习
abstract: Federated learning (FL) has emerged as a promising privacy-preserving distributed machine learning framework recently. It aims at collaboratively learning a shared global model by performing distributed training locally on edge devices and aggregating local models into a global one without centralized raw data sharing in the cloud server. However, due to the large local data heterogeneities (Non-I.I.D. data) across edge devices, the FL may easily obtain a global model that can produce more shifted gradients on local datasets, thereby degrading the model performance or even suffering from the non-convergence during training. In this paper, we propose a novel FL training framework, dubbed Fed-FSNet, using a properly designed Fuzzy Synthesizing Network (FSNet) to mitigate the Non-I.I.D. FL at-the-source. Concretely, we maintain an edge-agnostic hidden model in the cloud server to estimate a less-accurate while direction-aware inversion of the global model. The hidden model can then fuzzily synthesize several mimic I.I.D. data samples (sample features) conditioned on only the global model, which can be shared by edge devices to facilitate the FL training towards faster and better convergence. Moreover, since the synthesizing process involves neither access to the parameters/updates of local models nor analyzing individual local model outputs, our framework can still ensure the privacy of FL. Experimental results on several FL benchmarks demonstrate that our method can significantly mitigate the Non-I.I.D. issue and obtain better performance against other representative methods.
summary: Federated learning (FL) has emerged as a promising privacy-preserving distributed machine learning framework recently. It aims at collaboratively learning a shared global model by performing distributed training locally on edge devices and aggregating local models into a global one without centralized raw data sharing in the cloud server. However, due to the large local data heterogeneities (Non-I.I.D. data) across edge devices, the FL may easily obtain a global model that can produce more shifted gradients on local datasets, thereby degrading the model performance or even suffering from the non-convergence during training. In this paper, we propose a novel FL training framework, dubbed Fed-FSNet, using a properly designed Fuzzy Synthesizing Network (FSNet) to mitigate the Non-I.I.D. FL at-the-source. Concretely, we maintain an edge-agnostic hidden model in the cloud server to estimate a less-accurate while direction-aware inversion of the global model. The hidden model can then fuzzily synthesize several mimic I.I.D. data samples (sample features) conditioned on only the global model, which can be shared by edge devices to facilitate the FL training towards faster and better convergence. Moreover, since the synthesizing process involves neither access to the parameters/updates of local models nor analyzing individual local model outputs, our framework can still ensure the privacy of FL. Experimental results on several FL benchmarks demonstrate that our method can significantly mitigate the Non-I.I.D. issue and obtain better performance against other representative methods.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）最近已成为一种有前途的隐私保护分布式机器学习框架。它的目标是通过在边缘设备上本地执行分布式训练并将本地模型聚合成全局模型来协作学习共享的全局模型，而无需在云服务器中集中共享原始数据。然而，由于边缘设备上的本地数据异质性（非独立同分布数据）很大，FL 可以很容易地获得一个全局模型，该模型可以在本地数据集上产生更多的偏移梯度，从而降低模型性能，甚至在训练过程中出现不收敛。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 FL 训练框架，称为 Fed-FSNet，使用正确设计的模糊合成网络 (FSNet) 来减轻非独立同分布 (Non-I.I.D.) 的影响。 FL 在源头。具体来说，我们在云服务器中维护一个与边缘无关的隐藏模型，以估计全局模型的不太准确但方向感知的反转。然后，隐藏模型可以模糊地合成几个模拟 I.I.D。数据样本（样本特征）仅以全局模型为条件，边缘设备可以共享这些数据样本，以促进 FL 训练更快更好地收敛。此外，由于合成过程既不涉及访问本地模型的参数/更新，也不涉及分析各个本地模型的输出，因此我们的框架仍然可以确保 FL 的隐私。几个 FL 基准测试的实验结果表明，我们的方法可以显着减轻 Non-I.I.D.与其他代表性方法相比，问题并获得更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Fed-FSNet框架，通过模糊合成网络缓解联邦学习中的非独立同分布（Non-I.I.D.）问题。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习因设备间数据异质性导致模型性能下降或训练不收敛，且现有方法难以在保护隐私的同时解决Non-I.I.D.问题。
AI.method: 设计模糊合成网络（FSNet），在云端维护一个与设备无关的隐藏模型，生成条件于全局模型的合成I.I.D.样本，辅助设备训练而不泄露本地模型参数。
AI.result: 在多个联邦学习基准测试中，Fed-FSNet显著缓解Non-I.I.D.问题，性能优于其他代表性方法。
AI.conclusion: Fed-FSNet通过隐私保护的合成数据生成机制，为非独立同分布场景下的联邦学习提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Satoshi Kondo,Satoshi Kasai
title: Multi-Modality Abdominal Multi-Organ Segmentation with Deep Supervised 3D Segmentation Model
title_zh: 具有深度监督 3D 分割模型的多模态腹部多器官分割
abstract: To promote the development of medical image segmentation technology, AMOS, a large-scale abdominal multi-organ dataset for versatile medical image segmentation, is provided and AMOS 2022 challenge is held by using the dataset. In this report, we present our solution for the AMOS 2022 challenge. We employ residual U-Net with deep super vision as our base model. The experimental results show that the mean scores of Dice similarity coefficient and normalized surface dice are 0.8504 and 0.8476 for CT only task and CT/MRI task, respectively.
summary: To promote the development of medical image segmentation technology, AMOS, a large-scale abdominal multi-organ dataset for versatile medical image segmentation, is provided and AMOS 2022 challenge is held by using the dataset. In this report, we present our solution for the AMOS 2022 challenge. We employ residual U-Net with deep super vision as our base model. The experimental results show that the mean scores of Dice similarity coefficient and normalized surface dice are 0.8504 and 0.8476 for CT only task and CT/MRI task, respectively.
abstract_zh: 为了促进医学图像分割技术的发展，提供了用于多功能医学图像分割的大规模腹部多器官数据集AMOS，并利用该数据集举办AMOS 2022挑战赛。在本报告中，我们介绍了针对 AMOS 2022 挑战的解决方案。我们采用具有深度监督视觉的残差 U-Net 作为我们的基础模型。实验结果表明，对于仅 CT 任务和 CT/MRI 任务，Dice 相似系数和归一化表面骰子的平均得分分别为 0.8504 和 0.8476。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度监督的3D分割模型，用于多模态腹部多器官分割任务。
AI.motivation: 为推动医学图像分割技术发展，提供大规模腹部多器官数据集AMOS并举办挑战赛，解决多模态影像分割难题。
AI.method: 采用残差U-Net架构结合深度监督机制作为基础模型进行分割。
AI.result: 在CT单模态任务中Dice系数达0.8504，CT/MRI多模态任务中归一化表面Dice为0.8476。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在AMOS 2022挑战赛中取得优异分割效果，验证了深度监督3D模型在多模态医学影像分割中的有效性。

search_text: Multi-Modality Abdominal Multi-Organ Segmentation with Deep Supervised 3D Segmentation Model 具有深度监督 3D 分割模型的多模态腹部多器官分割 To promote the development of medical image segmentation technology, AMOS, a large-scale abdominal multi-organ dataset for versatile medical image segmentation, is provided and AMOS 2022 challenge is held by using the dataset. In this report, we present our solution for the AMOS 2022 challenge. We employ residual U-Net with deep super vision as our base model. The experimental results show that the mean scores of Dice similarity coefficient and normalized surface dice are 0.8504 and 0.8476 for CT only task and CT/MRI task, respectively. 为了促进医学图像分割技术的发展，提供了用于多功能医学图像分割的大规模腹部多器官数据集AMOS，并利用该数据集举办AMOS 2022挑战赛。在本报告中，我们介绍了针对 AMOS 2022 挑战的解决方案。我们采用具有深度监督视觉的残差 U-Net 作为我们的基础模型。实验结果表明，对于仅 CT 任务和 CT/MRI 任务，Dice 相似系数和归一化表面骰子的平均得分分别为 0.8504 和 0.8476。 本文提出一种基于深度监督的3D分割模型，用于多模态腹部多器官分割任务。 Satoshi Kondo,Satoshi Kasai eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Stan Weixian Lei,Difei Gao,Jay Zhangjie Wu,Yuxuan Wang,Wei Liu,Mengmi Zhang,Mike Zheng Shou
title: Symbolic Replay: Scene Graph as Prompt for Continual Learning on VQA Task
title_zh: 符号重放：场景图作为 VQA 任务持续学习的提示
abstract: VQA is an ambitious task aiming to answer any image-related question. However, in reality, it is hard to build such a system once for all since the needs of users are continuously updated, and the system has to implement new functions. Thus, Continual Learning (CL) ability is a must in developing advanced VQA systems. Recently, a pioneer work split a VQA dataset into disjoint answer sets to study this topic. However, CL on VQA involves not only the expansion of label sets (new Answer sets). It is crucial to study how to answer questions when deploying VQA systems to new environments (new Visual scenes) and how to answer questions requiring new functions (new Question types). Thus, we propose CLOVE, a benchmark for Continual Learning On Visual quEstion answering, which contains scene- and function-incremental settings for the two aforementioned CL scenarios. In terms of methodology, the main difference between CL on VQA and classification is that the former additionally involves expanding and preventing forgetting of reasoning mechanisms, while the latter focusing on class representation. Thus, we propose a real-data-free replay-based method tailored for CL on VQA, named Scene Graph as Prompt for Symbolic Replay. Using a piece of scene graph as a prompt, it replays pseudo scene graphs to represent the past images, along with correlated QA pairs. A unified VQA model is also proposed to utilize the current and replayed data to enhance its QA ability. Finally, experimental results reveal challenges in CLOVE and demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. The dataset and code will be available at https://github.com/showlab/CLVQA.
summary: VQA is an ambitious task aiming to answer any image-related question. However, in reality, it is hard to build such a system once for all since the needs of users are continuously updated, and the system has to implement new functions. Thus, Continual Learning (CL) ability is a must in developing advanced VQA systems. Recently, a pioneer work split a VQA dataset into disjoint answer sets to study this topic. However, CL on VQA involves not only the expansion of label sets (new Answer sets). It is crucial to study how to answer questions when deploying VQA systems to new environments (new Visual scenes) and how to answer questions requiring new functions (new Question types). Thus, we propose CLOVE, a benchmark for Continual Learning On Visual quEstion answering, which contains scene- and function-incremental settings for the two aforementioned CL scenarios. In terms of methodology, the main difference between CL on VQA and classification is that the former additionally involves expanding and preventing forgetting of reasoning mechanisms, while the latter focusing on class representation. Thus, we propose a real-data-free replay-based method tailored for CL on VQA, named Scene Graph as Prompt for Symbolic Replay. Using a piece of scene graph as a prompt, it replays pseudo scene graphs to represent the past images, along with correlated QA pairs. A unified VQA model is also proposed to utilize the current and replayed data to enhance its QA ability. Finally, experimental results reveal challenges in CLOVE and demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. The dataset and code will be available at https://github.com/showlab/CLVQA.
abstract_zh: VQA 是一项雄心勃勃的任务，旨在回答任何与图像相关的问题。但实际上，这样的系统很难一劳永逸，因为用户的需求不断更新，系统要实现新的功能。因此，持续学习（CL）能力是开发先进的 VQA 系统的必备条件。最近，一项先驱工作将 VQA 数据集分割成不相交的答案集来研究这个主题。然而，VQA 上的 CL 不仅仅涉及标签集（新答案集）的扩展。研究将VQA系统部署到新环境（新视觉场景）时如何回答问题以及如何回答需要新功能的问题（新问题类型）至关重要。因此，我们提出了 CLOVE，这是视觉问题回答持续学习的基准，其中包含上述两个 CL 场景的场景和功能增量设置。在方法论上，VQA 上的 CL 与分类的主要区别在于，前者额外涉及扩展和防止遗忘的推理机制，而后者则侧重于类表示。因此，我们提出了一种针对 VQA 上的 CL 量身定制的基于真实数据的重放方法，将其命名为“Scene Graph as Prompt for Symbolic Replay”。使用一块场景图作为提示，它会重播伪场景图来表示过去的图像以及相关的 QA 对。还提出了一个统一的 VQA 模型，以利用当前和重放的数据来增强其 QA 能力。最后，实验结果揭示了 CLOVE 中的挑战并证明了我们方法的有效性。数据集和代码可在 https://github.com/showlab/CLVQA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLOVE基准和基于场景图的符号回放方法，解决视觉问答（VQA）任务中的持续学习问题，应对新场景和新功能的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有VQA持续学习研究仅关注答案集扩展，但实际系统需同时适应新视觉环境和新问题类型，需探索兼顾场景与功能增量的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计基于场景图的符号回放方法（Scene Graph as Prompt），通过生成伪场景图及关联问答对进行无数据回放，并提出统一VQA模型融合当前与回放数据。
AI.result: 实验揭示了CLOVE基准的挑战性，验证了所提方法在场景与功能增量场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法弥补了传统分类持续学习的不足，为VQA系统的持续学习提供了新基准与技术路径。
