authors_text: Xuqi Zhang,Fanqin Meng,Haiqi Liu,Xiaojing Shen,Yunmin Zhu
title: Seamless Tracking of Group Targets and Ungrouped Targets Using Belief Propagation
title_zh: 使用置信传播无缝跟踪分组目标和未分组目标
abstract: This paper considers the problem of tracking a large-scale number of group targets. Usually, multi-target in most tracking scenarios are assumed to have independent motion and are well-separated. However, for group target tracking (GTT), the targets within groups are closely spaced and move in a coordinated manner, the groups can split or merge, and the numbers of targets in groups may be large, which lead to more challenging data association, filtering and computation problems. Within the belief propagation (BP) framework, we propose a scalable group target belief propagation (GTBP) method by jointly inferring target existence variables, group structure, data association and target states. The method can efficiently calculate the approximations of the marginal posterior distributions of these variables by performing belief propagation on the devised factor graph. As a consequence, GTBP is capable of capturing the changes in group structure, e.g., group splitting and merging. Furthermore, we model the evolution of targets as the co-action of the group or single-target motions specified by the possible group structures and corresponding probabilities. This flexible modeling enables seamless and simultaneous tracking of multiple group targets and ungrouped targets. Particularly, GTBP has excellent scalability and low computational complexity. It not only maintains the same scalability as BP, i.e., scaling linearly in the number of sensor measurements and quadratically in the number of targets, but also only scales linearly in the number of preserved group partitions. Finally, numerical experiments are presented to demonstrate the effectiveness and scalability of the proposed GTBP method.
summary: This paper considers the problem of tracking a large-scale number of group targets. Usually, multi-target in most tracking scenarios are assumed to have independent motion and are well-separated. However, for group target tracking (GTT), the targets within groups are closely spaced and move in a coordinated manner, the groups can split or merge, and the numbers of targets in groups may be large, which lead to more challenging data association, filtering and computation problems. Within the belief propagation (BP) framework, we propose a scalable group target belief propagation (GTBP) method by jointly inferring target existence variables, group structure, data association and target states. The method can efficiently calculate the approximations of the marginal posterior distributions of these variables by performing belief propagation on the devised factor graph. As a consequence, GTBP is capable of capturing the changes in group structure, e.g., group splitting and merging. Furthermore, we model the evolution of targets as the co-action of the group or single-target motions specified by the possible group structures and corresponding probabilities. This flexible modeling enables seamless and simultaneous tracking of multiple group targets and ungrouped targets. Particularly, GTBP has excellent scalability and low computational complexity. It not only maintains the same scalability as BP, i.e., scaling linearly in the number of sensor measurements and quadratically in the number of targets, but also only scales linearly in the number of preserved group partitions. Finally, numerical experiments are presented to demonstrate the effectiveness and scalability of the proposed GTBP method.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑跟踪大量群体目标的问题。通常，大多数跟踪场景中的多目标都被假设为具有独立运动并且分离良好。然而，对于群体目标跟踪（GTT）来说，群体内的目标间隔很近并且以协调的方式移动，群体可以分裂或合并，并且群体中的目标数量可能很大，这导致更具挑战性的数据关联、过滤和计算问题。在信念传播（BP）框架内，我们通过联合推断目标存在变量、群体结构、数据关联和目标状态，提出了一种可扩展的群体目标信念传播（GTBP）方法。该方法可以通过在设计的因子图上执行置信传播来有效地计算这些变量的边际后验分布的近似值。因此，GTBP 能够捕获群体结构的变化，例如群体分裂和合并。此外，我们将目标的演化建模为由可能的群体结构和相应概率指定的群体或单个目标运动的共同作用。这种灵活的建模可以实现对多个群组目标和未分组目标的无缝同步跟踪。特别是，GTBP具有良好的可扩展性和较低的计算复杂度。它不仅保持与 BP 相同的可扩展性，即传感器测量数量线性缩放和目标数量二次缩放，而且仅保留组分区的数量线性缩放。最后，数值实验证明了所提出的 GTBP 方法的有效性和可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于信念传播（BP）的可扩展方法，用于同时跟踪群体目标和未分组目标，解决了群体目标跟踪中的数据关联、过滤和计算复杂性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多目标跟踪假设目标独立且分离，但群体目标存在紧密间距、协调运动及分组/合并动态，导致数据关联和计算复杂度显著增加，现有方法难以高效处理。
AI.method: 在BP框架下，设计了联合推理目标存在性、群体结构、数据关联和状态的GTBP方法，通过因子图进行信念传播近似计算，并建模群体或单目标运动的协同演化机制。
AI.result: 实验验证了GTBP在处理大规模目标时的高效性，其计算复杂度随传感器测量线性增长，随目标数量二次增长，且与保留的群体划分数量线性相关。
AI.conclusion: GTBP通过灵活建模群体结构动态，实现了群体与未分组目标的无缝跟踪，具有优异的可扩展性和低计算复杂度，适用于大规模跟踪场景。

motivation: 传统多目标跟踪假设目标独立且分离，但群体目标存在紧密间距、协调运动及分组/合并动态，导致数据关联和计算复杂度显著增加，现有方法难以高效处理。
method: 在BP框架下，设计了联合推理目标存在性、群体结构、数据关联和状态的GTBP方法，通过因子图进行信念传播近似计算，并建模群体或单目标运动的协同演化机制。
result: 实验验证了GTBP在处理大规模目标时的高效性，其计算复杂度随传感器测量线性增长，随目标数量二次增长，且与保留的群体划分数量线性相关。
conclusion: GTBP通过灵活建模群体结构动态，实现了群体与未分组目标的无缝跟踪，具有优异的可扩展性和低计算复杂度，适用于大规模跟踪场景。
search_text: Seamless Tracking of Group Targets and Ungrouped Targets Using Belief Propagation 使用置信传播无缝跟踪分组目标和未分组目标 This paper considers the problem of tracking a large-scale number of group targets. Usually, multi-target in most tracking scenarios are assumed to have independent motion and are well-separated. However, for group target tracking (GTT), the targets within groups are closely spaced and move in a coordinated manner, the groups can split or merge, and the numbers of targets in groups may be large, which lead to more challenging data association, filtering and computation problems. Within the belief propagation (BP) framework, we propose a scalable group target belief propagation (GTBP) method by jointly inferring target existence variables, group structure, data association and target states. The method can efficiently calculate the approximations of the marginal posterior distributions of these variables by performing belief propagation on the devised factor graph. As a consequence, GTBP is capable of capturing the changes in group structure, e.g., group splitting and merging. Furthermore, we model the evolution of targets as the co-action of the group or single-target motions specified by the possible group structures and corresponding probabilities. This flexible modeling enables seamless and simultaneous tracking of multiple group targets and ungrouped targets. Particularly, GTBP has excellent scalability and low computational complexity. It not only maintains the same scalability as BP, i.e., scaling linearly in the number of sensor measurements and quadratically in the number of targets, but also only scales linearly in the number of preserved group partitions. Finally, numerical experiments are presented to demonstrate the effectiveness and scalability of the proposed GTBP method. 本文考虑跟踪大量群体目标的问题。通常，大多数跟踪场景中的多目标都被假设为具有独立运动并且分离良好。然而，对于群体目标跟踪（GTT）来说，群体内的目标间隔很近并且以协调的方式移动，群体可以分裂或合并，并且群体中的目标数量可能很大，这导致更具挑战性的数据关联、过滤和计算问题。在信念传播（BP）框架内，我们通过联合推断目标存在变量、群体结构、数据关联和目标状态，提出了一种可扩展的群体目标信念传播（GTBP）方法。该方法可以通过在设计的因子图上执行置信传播来有效地计算这些变量的边际后验分布的近似值。因此，GTBP 能够捕获群体结构的变化，例如群体分裂和合并。此外，我们将目标的演化建模为由可能的群体结构和相应概率指定的群体或单个目标运动的共同作用。这种灵活的建模可以实现对多个群组目标和未分组目标的无缝同步跟踪。特别是，GTBP具有良好的可扩展性和较低的计算复杂度。它不仅保持与 BP 相同的可扩展性，即传感器测量数量线性缩放和目标数量二次缩放，而且仅保留组分区的数量线性缩放。最后，数值实验证明了所提出的 GTBP 方法的有效性和可扩展性。 本文提出了一种基于信念传播（BP）的可扩展方法，用于同时跟踪群体目标和未分组目标，解决了群体目标跟踪中的数据关联、过滤和计算复杂性问题。 Xuqi Zhang,Fanqin Meng,Haiqi Liu,Xiaojing Shen,Yunmin Zhu cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ME

authors_text: George Giamougiannis,Apostolos Tsakyridis,Yangjin Ma,Angelina Totovic,David Lazovsky,Nikos Pleros
title: Coherent photonic crossbar as a universal linear operator
title_zh: 相干光子交叉开关作为通用线性算子
abstract: Linear optics aim at realizing any real- and/or complex-valued matrix operator via optical elements, addressing a broad field of applications in the areas of quantum photonics, microwave photonics and optical neural networks. The transfer of linear operators into photonic experimental layouts typically relies on Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) techniques combining meshes of cascaded 2x2 Mach Zehnder Interferometers (MZIs), with the main challenges being the precision in the experimental representation of the targeted matrix, referred to as fidelity, and the overall insertion loss. We demonstrate a novel interferometric coherent photonic crossbar architecture (Xbar) that demarcates from state-of-the-art SVD implementations and can realize any linear operator, supporting full restoration of the loss-induced fidelity. Its novel interferometric design allows for the direct mapping of each matrix element to a single, designated Xbar node, bringing down the number of programming steps to only one. We present the theoretical foundations of the Xbar, proving that its insertion losses scale linearly with the node losses as opposed to the exponential scaling witnessed by the SVD counterparts. This leads to a matrix design with significantly lower overall insertion losses compared to SVD-based schemes when utilizing state-of-the-art silicon photonic fabrication metrics, allowing for alternative node technologies with lower energy consumption and higher operational speed credentials to be employed. Finally, we validate that our Xbar architecture is the first linear operator that supports fidelity restoration, outperforming SVD schemes in loss- and phase-error fidelity performance and forming a significantly more robust layout to loss and phase deviations.
summary: Linear optics aim at realizing any real- and/or complex-valued matrix operator via optical elements, addressing a broad field of applications in the areas of quantum photonics, microwave photonics and optical neural networks. The transfer of linear operators into photonic experimental layouts typically relies on Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) techniques combining meshes of cascaded 2x2 Mach Zehnder Interferometers (MZIs), with the main challenges being the precision in the experimental representation of the targeted matrix, referred to as fidelity, and the overall insertion loss. We demonstrate a novel interferometric coherent photonic crossbar architecture (Xbar) that demarcates from state-of-the-art SVD implementations and can realize any linear operator, supporting full restoration of the loss-induced fidelity. Its novel interferometric design allows for the direct mapping of each matrix element to a single, designated Xbar node, bringing down the number of programming steps to only one. We present the theoretical foundations of the Xbar, proving that its insertion losses scale linearly with the node losses as opposed to the exponential scaling witnessed by the SVD counterparts. This leads to a matrix design with significantly lower overall insertion losses compared to SVD-based schemes when utilizing state-of-the-art silicon photonic fabrication metrics, allowing for alternative node technologies with lower energy consumption and higher operational speed credentials to be employed. Finally, we validate that our Xbar architecture is the first linear operator that supports fidelity restoration, outperforming SVD schemes in loss- and phase-error fidelity performance and forming a significantly more robust layout to loss and phase deviations.
abstract_zh: 线性光学旨在通过光学元件实现任何实值和/或复值矩阵算子，解决量子光子学、微波光子学和光学神经网络领域的广泛应用。将线性算子转移到光子实验布局中通常依赖于结合级联 2x2 马赫曾德干涉仪 (MZI) 网格的奇异值分解 (SVD) 技术，主要挑战是目标矩阵的实验表示的精度（称为保真度）和总体插入损耗。我们展示了一种新颖的干涉相干光子交叉架构 (Xbar)，它与最先进的 SVD 实现区分开来，可以实现任何线性算子，支持损失引起的保真度的完全恢复。其新颖的干涉设计允许将每个矩阵元素直接映射到单个指定的 Xbar 节点，从而将编程步骤数量减少到只有一个。我们提出了 Xbar 的理论基础，证明其插入损耗与节点损耗呈线性比例关系，而不是 SVD 对应物所见证的指数比例关系。当利用最先进的硅光子制造指标时，与基于 SVD 的方案相比，这使得矩阵设计的总体插入损耗显着降低，从而允许采用具有更低能耗和更高运行速度的替代节点技术。最后，我们验证了我们的 Xbar 架构是第一个支持保真度恢复的线性算子，在损耗和相位误差保真度性能方面优于 SVD 方案，并形成了针对损耗和相位偏差的更稳健的布局。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型相干光子交叉条（Xbar）架构，用于实现任意线性算子，解决了现有SVD方法在保真度和插入损耗方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统基于SVD的光子线性算子实现方案存在保真度受限和指数级插入损耗的问题，限制了其在量子光子学等领域的应用。
AI.method: 设计了一种干涉仪式Xbar架构，通过直接映射矩阵元素到单个节点，实现单步编程，并证明其插入损耗呈线性增长而非指数增长。
AI.result: Xbar架构在损耗和相位误差下表现出更高的保真度，插入损耗显著低于SVD方案，且支持更宽泛的节点技术选择。
AI.conclusion: Xbar是首个支持损耗补偿的线性算子架构，为光子计算提供了更高效、鲁棒的解决方案，优于现有SVD方法。

authors_text: Corey J. Maley
title: How (and Why) to Think that the Brain is Literally a Computer
title_zh: 如何（以及为什么）认为大脑实际上是一台计算机
comment: ef:Frontiers in Computer Science, Section: Theoretical Computer Science, 2022
comments: ef:Frontiers in Computer Science, Section: Theoretical Computer Science, 2022
abstract: The relationship between brains and computers is often taken to be merely metaphorical. However, genuine computational systems can be implemented in virtually any media; thus, one can take seriously the view that brains literally compute. But without empirical criteria for what makes a physical system genuinely a computational one, computation remains a matter of perspective, especially for natural systems (e.g., brains) that were not explicitly designed and engineered to be computers. Considerations from real examples of physical computers-both analog and digital, contemporary and historical-make clear what those empirical criteria must be. Finally, applying those criteria to the brain shows how we can view the brain as a computer (probably an analog one at that), which, in turn, illuminates how that claim is both informative and falsifiable.
summary: The relationship between brains and computers is often taken to be merely metaphorical. However, genuine computational systems can be implemented in virtually any media; thus, one can take seriously the view that brains literally compute. But without empirical criteria for what makes a physical system genuinely a computational one, computation remains a matter of perspective, especially for natural systems (e.g., brains) that were not explicitly designed and engineered to be computers. Considerations from real examples of physical computers-both analog and digital, contemporary and historical-make clear what those empirical criteria must be. Finally, applying those criteria to the brain shows how we can view the brain as a computer (probably an analog one at that), which, in turn, illuminates how that claim is both informative and falsifiable.
abstract_zh: 大脑和计算机之间的关系通常被认为只是比喻性的。然而，真正的计算系统几乎可以在任何媒体中实现。因此，人们可以认真对待大脑确实进行计算的观点。但是，如果没有经验标准来证明物理系统真正成为计算系统，计算仍然是一个视角问题，特别是对于没有明确设计和工程为计算机的自然系统（例如大脑）而言。对物理计算机的真实例子（模拟的和数字的、当代的和历史的）的考虑清楚地表明了这些经验标准必须是什么。最后，将这些标准应用于大脑表明我们如何将大脑视为一台计算机（可能是一台模拟计算机），这反过来又说明了这一主张如何既提供信息又可证伪。

AI.tldr: 探讨为何大脑可被视作计算机，并建立判断物理系统是否为真实计算系统的经验标准。
AI.motivation: 解决如何确定自然系统（如大脑）是否为真实计算系统的标准问题，避免将计算视为主观视角。
AI.method: 通过分析不同类型的物理计算机实例，提炼出判断真实计算系统的经验标准，并将其应用于大脑。
AI.result: 证明大脑可被视为计算机（可能是模拟计算机），且该观点具有信息性和可证伪性。
AI.conclusion: 将大脑视为计算机有助于理解其功能，并提供了基于经验标准的可验证框架，促进神经科学和计算理论的结合。

Considerations from real examples of physical computers-both analog and digital, contemporary and historical-make clear what those empirical criteria must be. Finally, applying those criteria to the brain shows how we can view the brain as a computer (probably an analog one at that), which, in turn, illuminates how that claim is both informative and falsifiable. 大脑和计算机之间的关系通常被认为只是比喻性的。然而，真正的计算系统几乎可以在任何媒体中实现。因此，人们可以认真对待大脑确实进行计算的观点。但是，如果没有经验标准来证明物理系统真正成为计算系统，计算仍然是一个视角问题，特别是对于没有明确设计和工程为计算机的自然系统（例如大脑）而言。对物理计算机的真实例子（模拟的和数字的、当代的和历史的）的考虑清楚地表明了这些经验标准必须是什么。最后，将这些标准应用于大脑表明我们如何将大脑视为一台计算机（可能是一台模拟计算机），这反过来又说明了这一主张如何既提供信息又可证伪。 探讨为何大脑可被视作计算机，并建立判断物理系统是否为真实计算系统的经验标准。 Corey J. Maley q-bio.NC,cs.AI

authors_text: Leiyu Xie,Yang Sun,Jonathon A. Chambers,Syed Mohsen Naqvi
title: Two-stage Fall Events Classification with Human Skeleton Data
title_zh: 利用人体骨骼数据进行两阶段跌倒事件分类
abstract: Fall detection and classification become an imper- ative problem for healthcare applications particularity with the increasingly ageing population. Currently, most of the fall clas- sification algorithms provide binary fall or no-fall classification. For better healthcare, it is thus not enough to do binary fall classification but to extend it to multiple fall events classification. In this work, we utilize the privacy mitigating human skeleton data for multiple fall events classification. The skeleton features are extracted from the original RGB images to not only mitigate the personal privacy, but also to reduce the impact of the dynamic illuminations. The proposed fall events classification method is divided into two stages. In the first stage, the model is trained to achieve the binary classification to filter out the no-fall events. Then, in the second stage, the deep neural network (DNN) model is trained to further classify the five types of fall events. In order to confirm the efficiency of the proposed method, the experiments on the UP-Fall dataset outperform the state-of-the-art.
summary: Fall detection and classification become an imper- ative problem for healthcare applications particularity with the increasingly ageing population. Currently, most of the fall clas- sification algorithms provide binary fall or no-fall classification. For better healthcare, it is thus not enough to do binary fall classification but to extend it to multiple fall events classification. In this work, we utilize the privacy mitigating human skeleton data for multiple fall events classification. The skeleton features are extracted from the original RGB images to not only mitigate the personal privacy, but also to reduce the impact of the dynamic illuminations. The proposed fall events classification method is divided into two stages. In the first stage, the model is trained to achieve the binary classification to filter out the no-fall events. Then, in the second stage, the deep neural network (DNN) model is trained to further classify the five types of fall events. In order to confirm the efficiency of the proposed method, the experiments on the UP-Fall dataset outperform the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 随着人口老龄化的加剧，跌倒检测和分类成为医疗保健应用中迫在眉睫的问题。目前，大多数跌倒分类算法都提供二元跌倒或无跌倒分类。为了更好的医疗保健，仅仅进行二元跌倒分类是不够的，还需要将其扩展到多个跌倒事件分类。在这项工作中，我们利用减轻隐私的人体骨骼数据对多个跌倒事件进行分类。从原始RGB图像中提取骨架特征，不仅可以减轻个人隐私，还可以减少动态照明的影响。所提出的跌倒事件分类方法分为两个阶段。在第一阶段，模型被训练以实现二元分类以过滤掉无跌倒事件。然后，在第二阶段，训练深度神经网络（DNN）模型以进一步对五种类型的跌倒事件进行分类。为了证实所提出方法的效率，在 UP-Fall 数据集上的实验优于最新技术。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于人体骨骼数据的两阶段方法，用于多类型跌倒事件分类，以提高医疗健康中的跌倒检测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有跌倒分类算法多为二分类（跌倒/非跌倒），无法满足医疗健康中对多种跌倒类型区分的需求，且需兼顾隐私保护与光照干扰问题。
AI.method: 采用两阶段分类框架：第一阶段通过二分类模型过滤非跌倒事件；第二阶段利用深度神经网络（DNN）对五类跌倒事件进行细分类，基于RGB图像提取的骨骼特征降低隐私泄露风险与光照影响。
AI.result: 在UP-Fall数据集上的实验表明，该方法性能优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段骨骼数据分类方法有效提升了跌倒事件识别的准确性，为医疗健康领域提供了更精细的解决方案。

authors_text: Jianbing Wu,Hong Liu,Wei Shi,Hao Tang,Jingwen Guo
title: Identity-Sensitive Knowledge Propagation for Cloth-Changing Person Re-identification
title_zh: 用于换衣服的人重新识别的身份敏感知识传播
comment: IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2022
comments: IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2022
abstract: Cloth-changing person re-identification (CC-ReID), which aims to match person identities under clothing changes, is a new rising research topic in recent years. However, typical biometrics-based CC-ReID methods often require cumbersome pose or body part estimators to learn cloth-irrelevant features from human biometric traits, which comes with high computational costs. Besides, the performance is significantly limited due to the resolution degradation of surveillance images. To address the above limitations, we propose an effective Identity-Sensitive Knowledge Propagation framework (DeSKPro) for CC-ReID. Specifically, a Cloth-irrelevant Spatial Attention module is introduced to eliminate the distraction of clothing appearance by acquiring knowledge from the human parsing module. To mitigate the resolution degradation issue and mine identity-sensitive cues from human faces, we propose to restore the missing facial details using prior facial knowledge, which is then propagated to a smaller network. After training, the extra computations for human parsing or face restoration are no longer required. Extensive experiments show that our framework outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin. Our code is available at https://github.com/KimbingNg/DeskPro.
summary: Cloth-changing person re-identification (CC-ReID), which aims to match person identities under clothing changes, is a new rising research topic in recent years. However, typical biometrics-based CC-ReID methods often require cumbersome pose or body part estimators to learn cloth-irrelevant features from human biometric traits, which comes with high computational costs. Besides, the performance is significantly limited due to the resolution degradation of surveillance images. To address the above limitations, we propose an effective Identity-Sensitive Knowledge Propagation framework (DeSKPro) for CC-ReID. Specifically, a Cloth-irrelevant Spatial Attention module is introduced to eliminate the distraction of clothing appearance by acquiring knowledge from the human parsing module. To mitigate the resolution degradation issue and mine identity-sensitive cues from human faces, we propose to restore the missing facial details using prior facial knowledge, which is then propagated to a smaller network. After training, the extra computations for human parsing or face restoration are no longer required. Extensive experiments show that our framework outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin. Our code is available at https://github.com/KimbingNg/DeskPro.
abstract_zh: 换衣人员重新识别（CC-ReID）旨在匹配换衣下的人员身份，是近年来新兴的研究课题。然而，典型的基于生物识别的 CC-ReID 方法通常需要繁琐的姿势或身体部位估计器来从人类生物特征中学习与服装无关的特征，这会带来很高的计算成本。此外，由于监控图像的分辨率下降，性能受到显着限制。为了解决上述限制，我们提出了一种有效的 CC-ReID 身份敏感知识传播框架（DeSKPro）。具体来说，引入了与服装无关的空间注意力模块，通过从人体解析模块获取知识来消除服装外观的干扰。为了缓解分辨率下降问题并从人脸中挖掘身份敏感线索，我们建议使用先前的面部知识来恢复丢失的面部细节，然后将其传播到较小的网络。训练后，不再需要进行人体解析或人脸恢复的额外计算。大量的实验表明，我们的框架大大优于最先进的方法。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/KimbingNg/DeskPro 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DeSKPro的框架，用于解决衣物变化下的人体重识别（CC-ReID）问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于生物特征的CC-ReID方法依赖复杂的姿态估计模块，计算成本高且受监控图像分辨率下降影响，性能受限。
AI.method: 引入衣物无关空间注意力模块，通过人体解析模块知识消除衣物干扰；利用先验面部知识恢复缺失面部细节并传播至小网络，无需额外计算。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: DeSKPro通过知识传播机制有效解决了衣物变化下的身份识别难题，兼具高效性与准确性。

authors_text: Krishna Kumar Mohbey,Gaurav Meena,Sunil Kumar,K Lokesh
title: A CNN-LSTM-based hybrid deep learning approach to detect sentiment polarities on Monkeypox tweets
title_zh: 基于 CNN-LSTM 的混合深度学习方法，用于检测 Monkeypox 推文中的情绪极性
abstract: People have recently begun communicating their thoughts and viewpoints through user-generated multimedia material on social networking websites. This information can be images, text, videos, or audio. Recent years have seen a rise in the frequency of occurrence of this pattern. Twitter is one of the most extensively utilized social media sites, and it is also one of the finest locations to get a sense of how people feel about events that are linked to the Monkeypox sickness. This is because tweets on Twitter are shortened and often updated, both of which contribute to the platform's character. The fundamental objective of this study is to get a deeper comprehension of the diverse range of reactions people have in response to the presence of this condition. This study focuses on finding out what individuals think about monkeypox illnesses, which presents a hybrid technique based on CNN and LSTM. We have considered all three possible polarities of a user's tweet: positive, negative, and neutral. An architecture built on CNN and LSTM is utilized to determine how accurate the prediction models are. The recommended model's accuracy was 94% on the monkeypox tweet dataset. Other performance metrics such as accuracy, recall, and F1-score were utilized to test our models and results in the most time and resource-effective manner. The findings are then compared to more traditional approaches to machine learning. The findings of this research contribute to an increased awareness of the monkeypox infection in the general population.

abstract_zh: 人们最近开始通过社交网站上用户生成的多媒体材料来交流他们的想法和观点。该信息可以是图像、文本、视频或音频。近年来，这种模式的出现频率有所上升。 Twitter 是使用最广泛的社交媒体网站之一，也是了解人们对与猴痘疾病相关的事件有何看法的最佳地点之一。这是因为 Twitter 上的推文会被缩短且经常更新，这两者都有助于提升该平台的特色。这项研究的根本目的是更深入地了解人们对这种情况的各种反应。这项研究的重点是了解个人对猴痘疾病的看法，提出了一种基于 CNN 和 LSTM 的混合技术。我们考虑了用户推文的所有三种可能的极性：积极、消极和中立。利用基于 CNN 和 LSTM 构建的架构来确定预测模型的准确度。推荐模型在猴痘推文数据集上的准确率为 94%。其他性能指标（例如准确性、召回率和 F1 分数）被用来以最节省时间和资源的方式测试我们的模型和结果。然后将研究结果与更传统的机器学习方法进行比较。这项研究的结果有助于提高普通人群对猴痘感染的认识。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CNN-LSTM的混合深度学习方法，用于检测与猴痘疾病相关的推文情感极性（积极、消极、中性）。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体上的用户生成内容（如推文）能反映公众对猴痘疫情的态度，但传统方法难以高效分析短文本情感。需开发更精准的模型以提升公共卫生领域的舆情监测能力。
AI.method: 结合卷积神经网络（CNN）提取局部特征与长短期记忆网络（LSTM）捕捉时序依赖，构建混合模型对推文进行三分类情感分析，并通过准确率、召回率和F1-score等指标评估性能。
AI.result: 该模型在猴痘推文数据集上达到94%的准确率，优于传统机器学习方法，且在资源消耗上更具效率。
AI.conclusion: 混合CNN-LSTM模型有效提升了社交媒体情感分析的准确性，为公共卫生领域提供了一种高效的舆情监测工具，有助于提高公众对猴痘疫情的认知。

search_text: A CNN-LSTM-based hybrid deep learning approach to detect sentiment polarities on Monkeypox tweets 基于 CNN-LSTM 的混合深度学习方法，用于检测 Monkeypox 推文中的情绪极性 People have recently begun communicating their thoughts and viewpoints through user-generated multimedia material on social networking websites. This information can be images, text, videos, or audio. Recent years have seen a rise in the frequency of occurrence of this pattern. Twitter is one of the most extensively utilized social media sites, and it is also one of the finest locations to get a sense of how people feel about events that are linked to the Monkeypox sickness. This is because tweets on Twitter are shortened and often updated, both of which contribute to the platform's character. The fundamental objective of this study is to get a deeper comprehension of the diverse range of reactions people have in response to the presence of this condition. This study focuses on finding out what individuals think about monkeypox illnesses, which presents a hybrid technique based on CNN and LSTM. We have considered all three possible polarities of a user's tweet: positive, negative, and neutral. An architecture built on CNN and LSTM is utilized to determine how accurate the prediction models are. The recommended model's accuracy was 94% on the monkeypox tweet dataset. Other performance metrics such as accuracy, recall, and F1-score were utilized to test our models and results in the most time and resource-effective manner. The findings are then compared to more traditional approaches to machine learning. The findings of this research contribute to an increased awareness of the monkeypox infection in the general population. 人们最近开始通过社交网站上用户生成的多媒体材料来交流他们的想法和观点。该信息可以是图像、文本、视频或音频。近年来，这种模式的出现频率有所上升。 Twitter 是使用最广泛的社交媒体网站之一，也是了解人们对与猴痘疾病相关的事件有何看法的最佳地点之一。这是因为 Twitter 上的推文会被缩短且经常更新，这两者都有助于提升该平台的特色。这项研究的根本目的是更深入地了解人们对这种情况的各种反应。这项研究的重点是了解个人对猴痘疾病的看法，提出了一种基于 CNN 和 LSTM 的混合技术。我们考虑了用户推文的所有三种可能的极性：积极、消极和中立。利用基于 CNN 和 LSTM 构建的架构来确定预测模型的准确度。推荐模型在猴痘推文数据集上的准确率为 94%。其他性能指标（例如准确性、召回率和 F1 分数）被用来以最节省时间和资源的方式测试我们的模型和结果。然后将研究结果与更传统的机器学习方法进行比较。这项研究的结果有助于提高普通人群对猴痘感染的认识。 本文提出一种基于CNN-LSTM的混合深度学习方法，用于检测与猴痘疾病相关的推文情感极性（积极、消极、中性）。 Krishna Kumar Mohbey,Gaurav Meena,Sunil Kumar,K Lokesh cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Xiaolei Lang,Jiajun Lv,Jianxin Huang,Yukai Ma,Yong Liu,Xingxing Zuo
title: Ctrl-VIO: Continuous-Time Visual-Inertial Odometry for Rolling Shutter Cameras
title_zh: Ctrl-VIO：滚动快门相机的连续时间视觉惯性里程计
abstract: In this paper, we propose a probabilistic continuous-time visual-inertial odometry (VIO) for rolling shutter cameras. The continuous-time trajectory formulation naturally facilitates the fusion of asynchronized high-frequency IMU data and motion-distorted rolling shutter images. To prevent intractable computation load, the proposed VIO is sliding-window and keyframe-based. We propose to probabilistically marginalize the control points to keep the constant number of keyframes in the sliding window. Furthermore, the line exposure time difference (line delay) of the rolling shutter camera can be online calibrated in our continuous-time VIO. To extensively examine the performance of our continuous-time VIO, experiments are conducted on publicly-available WHU-RSVI, TUM-RSVI, and SenseTime-RSVI rolling shutter datasets. The results demonstrate the proposed continuous-time VIO significantly outperforms the existing state-of-the-art VIO methods. The codebase of this paper will also be open-sourced at \url{https://github.com/APRIL-ZJU/Ctrl-VIO}.
summary: In this paper, we propose a probabilistic continuous-time visual-inertial odometry (VIO) for rolling shutter cameras. The continuous-time trajectory formulation naturally facilitates the fusion of asynchronized high-frequency IMU data and motion-distorted rolling shutter images. To prevent intractable computation load, the proposed VIO is sliding-window and keyframe-based. We propose to probabilistically marginalize the control points to keep the constant number of keyframes in the sliding window. Furthermore, the line exposure time difference (line delay) of the rolling shutter camera can be online calibrated in our continuous-time VIO. To extensively examine the performance of our continuous-time VIO, experiments are conducted on publicly-available WHU-RSVI, TUM-RSVI, and SenseTime-RSVI rolling shutter datasets. The results demonstrate the proposed continuous-time VIO significantly outperforms the existing state-of-the-art VIO methods. The codebase of this paper will also be open-sourced at \url{https://github.com/APRIL-ZJU/Ctrl-VIO}.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于卷帘快门相机的概率连续时间视觉惯性里程计（VIO）。连续时间轨迹公式自然有利于异步高频 IMU 数据和运动扭曲滚动快门图像的融合。为了防止棘手的计算负载，所提出的 VIO 是滑动窗口和基于关键帧的。我们建议对控制点进行概率边缘化，以保持滑动窗口中关键帧的数量恒定。此外，卷帘快门相机的线曝光时间差（线延迟）可以在我们的连续时间 VIO 中在线校准。为了广泛检查我们的连续时间 VIO 的性能，在公开可用的 WHU-RSVI、TUM-RSVI 和 SenseTime-RSVI 卷帘快门数据集上进行了实验。结果表明，所提出的连续时间 VIO 显着优于现有最先进的 VIO 方法。本文的代码库也将在 \url{https://github.com/APRIL-ZJU/Ctrl-VIO} 开源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于滚动快门相机的连续时间视觉惯性里程计（Ctrl-VIO），通过概率方法融合异步IMU数据和运动失真图像。
AI.motivation: 滚动快门相机的运动失真和IMU数据的异步特性导致传统VIO方法计算复杂且精度不足，需设计高效且鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用连续时间轨迹建模，结合滑动窗口与关键帧机制，通过概率边缘化控制点保持计算效率，并在线校准滚动快门行延迟。
AI.result: 在WHU-RSVI、TUM-RSVI和SenseTime-RSVI数据集上显著优于现有SOTA方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: Ctrl-VIO通过连续时间建模和高效优化策略，有效解决了滚动快门相机的VIO问题，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Ye Wang,Yujia Yang,Ye Pu,Chris Manzie
title: Data-driven Predictive Tracking Control based on Koopman Operators
title_zh: 基于Koopman算子的数据驱动预测跟踪控制
abstract: Constraint handling during tracking operations is at the core of many real-world control implementations and is well understood when dynamic models of the underlying system exist, yet becomes more challenging when data-driven models are used to describe the nonlinear system at hand. We seek to combine the nonlinear modeling capabilities of a wide class of neural networks with the constraint-handling guarantees of model predictive control (MPC) in a rigorous and online computationally tractable framework. The class of networks considered can be captured using Koopman operators, and are integrated into a Koopman-based tracking MPC (KTMPC) for nonlinear systems to track piecewise constant references. The effect of model mismatch between original nonlinear dynamics and its trained Koopman linear model is handled by using a constraint tightening approach in the proposed tracking MPC strategy. By choosing two Lyapunov functions, we prove that solution is recursively feasible and input-to-state stable to a neighborhood of both online and offline optimal reachable steady outputs in the presence of bounded modeling errors under mild assumptions. Finally, we demonstrate the results on a numerical example, before applying the proposed approach to the problem of reference tracking by an autonomous ground vehicle.
summary: Constraint handling during tracking operations is at the core of many real-world control implementations and is well understood when dynamic models of the underlying system exist, yet becomes more challenging when data-driven models are used to describe the nonlinear system at hand. We seek to combine the nonlinear modeling capabilities of a wide class of neural networks with the constraint-handling guarantees of model predictive control (MPC) in a rigorous and online computationally tractable framework. The class of networks considered can be captured using Koopman operators, and are integrated into a Koopman-based tracking MPC (KTMPC) for nonlinear systems to track piecewise constant references. The effect of model mismatch between original nonlinear dynamics and its trained Koopman linear model is handled by using a constraint tightening approach in the proposed tracking MPC strategy. By choosing two Lyapunov functions, we prove that solution is recursively feasible and input-to-state stable to a neighborhood of both online and offline optimal reachable steady outputs in the presence of bounded modeling errors under mild assumptions. Finally, we demonstrate the results on a numerical example, before applying the proposed approach to the problem of reference tracking by an autonomous ground vehicle.
abstract_zh: 跟踪操作期间的约束处理是许多现实世界控制实现的核心，并且当存在底层系统的动态模型时可以很好地理解，但当使用数据驱动模型来描述手头的非线性系统时，约束处理变得更具挑战性。我们寻求将各种神经网络的非线性建模功能与模型预测控制（MPC）的约束处理保证结合在严格且在线计算可处理的框架中。所考虑的网络类别可以使用 Koopman 算子捕获，并集成到基于 Koopman 的跟踪 MPC (KTMPC) 中，供非线性系统跟踪分段常数参考。通过在所提出的跟踪 MPC 策略中使用约束紧缩方法来处理原始非线性动力学与其经过训练的库普曼线性模型之间的模型不匹配的影响。通过选择两个李亚普诺夫函数，我们证明了在温和假设下存在有界建模误差的情况下，该解决方案对于在线和离线最佳可达稳定输出的邻域是递归可行的并且输入状态稳定。最后，在将所提出的方法应用于自主地面车辆的参考跟踪问题之前，我们通过数值示例演示了结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Koopman算子的数据驱动预测跟踪控制方法，结合神经网络建模与模型预测控制（MPC）的约束处理能力，解决非线性系统的跟踪控制问题。
AI.motivation: 在存在约束的跟踪控制中，传统动态模型方法已成熟，但数据驱动模型处理非线性系统约束时面临挑战，需兼顾建模能力与控制安全性。
AI.method: 利用Koopman算子框架将神经网络嵌入跟踪MPC（KTMPC），通过约束收紧策略应对模型偏差，并采用两个Lyapunov函数证明解的递归可行性及输入到状态稳定性。
AI.result: 理论证明了方法在有界建模误差下的稳定性，并通过数值实验及自动驾驶车辆参考跟踪案例验证了有效性。

search_text: Data-driven Predictive Tracking Control based on Koopman Operators 基于Koopman算子的数据驱动预测跟踪控制 Constraint handling during tracking operations is at the core of many real-world control implementations and is well understood when dynamic models of the underlying system exist, yet becomes more challenging when data-driven models are used to describe the nonlinear system at hand. We seek to combine the nonlinear modeling capabilities of a wide class of neural networks with the constraint-handling guarantees of model predictive control (MPC) in a rigorous and online computationally tractable framework. The class of networks considered can be captured using Koopman operators, and are integrated into a Koopman-based tracking MPC (KTMPC) for nonlinear systems to track piecewise constant references. The effect of model mismatch between original nonlinear dynamics and its trained Koopman linear model is handled by using a constraint tightening approach in the proposed tracking MPC strategy. By choosing two Lyapunov functions, we prove that solution is recursively feasible and input-to-state stable to a neighborhood of both online and offline optimal reachable steady outputs in the presence of bounded modeling errors under mild assumptions. Finally, we demonstrate the results on a numerical example, before applying the proposed approach to the problem of reference tracking by an autonomous ground vehicle. 跟踪操作期间的约束处理是许多现实世界控制实现的核心，并且当存在底层系统的动态模型时可以很好地理解，但当使用数据驱动模型来描述手头的非线性系统时，约束处理变得更具挑战性。我们寻求将各种神经网络的非线性建模功能与模型预测控制（MPC）的约束处理保证结合在严格且在线计算可处理的框架中。所考虑的网络类别可以使用 Koopman 算子捕获，并集成到基于 Koopman 的跟踪 MPC (KTMPC) 中，供非线性系统跟踪分段常数参考。通过在所提出的跟踪 MPC 策略中使用约束紧缩方法来处理原始非线性动力学与其经过训练的库普曼线性模型之间的模型不匹配的影响。通过选择两个李亚普诺夫函数，我们证明了在温和假设下存在有界建模误差的情况下，该解决方案对于在线和离线最佳可达稳定输出的邻域是递归可行的并且输入状态稳定。最后，在将所提出的方法应用于自主地面车辆的参考跟踪问题之前，我们通过数值示例演示了结果。 本文提出一种基于Koopman算子的数据驱动预测跟踪控制方法，结合神经网络建模与模型预测控制（MPC）的约束处理能力，解决非线性系统的跟踪控制问题。 Ye Wang,Yujia Yang,Ye Pu,Chris Manzie eess.SY,cs.RO

authors_text: Yu Chen,Xu Cao,Xiaoyi Lin,Baoru Huang,Xiao-Yun Zhou,Jian-Qing Zheng,Guang-Zhong Yang
title: A Compacted Structure for Cross-domain learning on Monocular Depth and Flow Estimation
title_zh: 单目深度和流量估计跨域学习的紧凑结构
abstract: Accurate motion and depth recovery is important for many robot vision tasks including autonomous driving. Most previous studies have achieved cooperative multi-task interaction via either pre-defined loss functions or cross-domain prediction. This paper presents a multi-task scheme that achieves mutual assistance by means of our Flow to Depth (F2D), Depth to Flow (D2F), and Exponential Moving Average (EMA). F2D and D2F mechanisms enable multi-scale information integration between optical flow and depth domain based on differentiable shallow nets. A dual-head mechanism is used to predict optical flow for rigid and non-rigid motion based on a divide-and-conquer manner, which significantly improves the optical flow estimation performance. Furthermore, to make the prediction more robust and stable, EMA is used for our multi-task training. Experimental results on KITTI datasets show that our multi-task scheme outperforms other multi-task schemes and provide marked improvements on the prediction results.
summary: Accurate motion and depth recovery is important for many robot vision tasks including autonomous driving. Most previous studies have achieved cooperative multi-task interaction via either pre-defined loss functions or cross-domain prediction. This paper presents a multi-task scheme that achieves mutual assistance by means of our Flow to Depth (F2D), Depth to Flow (D2F), and Exponential Moving Average (EMA). F2D and D2F mechanisms enable multi-scale information integration between optical flow and depth domain based on differentiable shallow nets. A dual-head mechanism is used to predict optical flow for rigid and non-rigid motion based on a divide-and-conquer manner, which significantly improves the optical flow estimation performance. Furthermore, to make the prediction more robust and stable, EMA is used for our multi-task training. Experimental results on KITTI datasets show that our multi-task scheme outperforms other multi-task schemes and provide marked improvements on the prediction results.
abstract_zh: 准确的运动和深度恢复对于包括自动驾驶在内的许多机器人视觉任务非常重要。之前的大多数研究都是通过预定义的损失函数或跨域预测实现了协作多任务交互。本文提出了一种多任务方案，通过我们的 Flow to Depth (F2D)、Depth to Flow (D2F) 和 Exponential Moving Average (EMA) 实现互助。 F2D和D2F机制使得基于可微浅网的光流和深度域之间的多尺度信息集成成为可能。采用双头机制，基于分而治之的方式预测刚性和非刚性运动的光流，显着提高了光流估计性能。此外，为了使预测更加稳健和稳定，我们使用 EMA 进行多任务训练。 KITTI 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的多任务方案优于其他多任务方案，并对预测结果提供了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务框架，通过Flow to Depth（F2D）、Depth to Flow（D2F）和指数移动平均（EMA）机制，实现单目深度与光流估计的跨领域学习。
AI.motivation: 准确的运动与深度恢复对自动驾驶等机器人视觉任务至关重要，但现有方法在多任务协作中存在信息交互不足的问题，需提升深度与光流估计的协同性能。
AI.method: 设计F2D/D2F机制通过可微分浅层网络实现多尺度跨领域信息融合，采用双头结构分别处理刚性与非刚性运动，并引入EMA优化多任务训练稳定性。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集实验中，该框架在深度和光流估计任务上均优于现有方法，显著提升预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 提出的跨领域多任务框架通过机制创新有效增强了深度与光流估计的协同能力，为单目视觉任务提供了更稳健的解决方案。

authors_text: Jiwei Zhang,Deepak Ajwani
title: Learning to Prune Instances of Steiner Tree Problem in Graphs
title_zh: 学习修剪图中斯坦纳树问题的实例
abstract: We consider the Steiner tree problem on graphs where we are given a set of nodes and the goal is to find a tree sub-graph of minimum weight that contains all nodes in the given set, potentially including additional nodes. This is a classical NP-hard combinatorial optimisation problem. In recent years, a machine learning framework called learning-to-prune has been successfully used for solving a diverse range of combinatorial optimisation problems. In this paper, we use this learning framework on the Steiner tree problem and show that even on this problem, the learning-to-prune framework results in computing near-optimal solutions at a fraction of the time required by commercial ILP solvers. Our results underscore the potential of the learning-to-prune framework in solving various combinatorial optimisation problems.
summary: We consider the Steiner tree problem on graphs where we are given a set of nodes and the goal is to find a tree sub-graph of minimum weight that contains all nodes in the given set, potentially including additional nodes. This is a classical NP-hard combinatorial optimisation problem. In recent years, a machine learning framework called learning-to-prune has been successfully used for solving a diverse range of combinatorial optimisation problems. In this paper, we use this learning framework on the Steiner tree problem and show that even on this problem, the learning-to-prune framework results in computing near-optimal solutions at a fraction of the time required by commercial ILP solvers. Our results underscore the potential of the learning-to-prune framework in solving various combinatorial optimisation problems.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑图上的斯坦纳树问题，其中给定一组节点，目标是找到包含给定集中所有节点（可能包括其他节点）的最小权重的树子图。这是一个经典的 NP 难组合优化问题。近年来，一种称为学习修剪的机器学习框架已成功用于解决各种组合优化问题。在本文中，我们在 Steiner 树问题上使用了这种学习框架，并表明即使在这个问题上，学习修剪框架也能以商业 ILP 求解器所需时间的一小部分来计算出接近最优的解决方案。我们的结果强调了学习修剪框架在解决各种组合优化问题方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文将学习到修剪框架应用于图的斯坦纳树问题，以高效求解近似最优解。
AI.motivation: 斯坦纳树问题是经典NP难问题，传统求解方法效率低下，而learning-to-prune框架在其他组合优化问题中表现优异，需验证其在该问题上的有效性。
AI.method: 采用学习到修剪的机器学习框架，通过训练模型来剪枝搜索空间，从而加速求解过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在保证解质量的同时，显著缩短了求解时间，优于传统商业ILP求解器。
AI.conclusion: 学习到修剪框架在解决组合优化问题上展现出巨大潜力，为NP难问题提供了高效的求解新途径。

Our results underscore the potential of the learning-to-prune framework in solving various combinatorial optimisation problems. 我们考虑图上的斯坦纳树问题，其中给定一组节点，目标是找到包含给定集中所有节点（可能包括其他节点）的最小权重的树子图。这是一个经典的 NP 难组合优化问题。近年来，一种称为学习修剪的机器学习框架已成功用于解决各种组合优化问题。在本文中，我们在 Steiner 树问题上使用了这种学习框架，并表明即使在这个问题上，学习修剪框架也能以商业 ILP 求解器所需时间的一小部分来计算出接近最优的解决方案。我们的结果强调了学习修剪框架在解决各种组合优化问题方面的潜力。 本文将学习到修剪框架应用于图的斯坦纳树问题，以高效求解近似最优解。 Jiwei Zhang,Deepak Ajwani cs.DS,cs.AI,cs.DM,cs.LG

authors_text: Nigel H. Collier,Fangyu Liu,Ehsan Shareghi
title: On Reality and the Limits of Language Data: Aligning LLMs with Human Norms
title_zh: 关于语言数据的现实和局限性：使法学硕士与人类规范保持一致
abstract: Recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) harness linguistic associations in vast natural language data for practical applications. However, their ability to understand the physical world using only language data remains a question. After reviewing existing protocols, we explore this question using a novel and tightly controlled reasoning test (ART) and compare human norms against versions of GPT-3. Our findings highlight the categories of common-sense relations models that could learn directly from data and areas of weakness. GPT-3 offers evidence for verbal reasoning on a par with human subjects for several relations including Synonymy, Antonymy, and Default inheritance, Without reinforcement learning from human judgements, it appears GPT-3 performs at the lower end of the reference interval for Has-part and Contained-in. Weaknesses were observed also in affordance characteristics through Necessary-quality, Order-of-size and Order-of-intensity. Combining LLMs with symbolic world grounding is a promising direction to address associative learning.
summary: Recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) harness linguistic associations in vast natural language data for practical applications. However, their ability to understand the physical world using only language data remains a question. After reviewing existing protocols, we explore this question using a novel and tightly controlled reasoning test (ART) and compare human norms against versions of GPT-3. Our findings highlight the categories of common-sense relations models that could learn directly from data and areas of weakness. GPT-3 offers evidence for verbal reasoning on a par with human subjects for several relations including Synonymy, Antonymy, and Default inheritance, Without reinforcement learning from human judgements, it appears GPT-3 performs at the lower end of the reference interval for Has-part and Contained-in. Weaknesses were observed also in affordance characteristics through Necessary-quality, Order-of-size and Order-of-intensity. Combining LLMs with symbolic world grounding is a promising direction to address associative learning.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的最新进展利用大量自然语言数据中的语言关联来实现实际应用。然而，他们仅使用语言数据来理解物理世界的能力仍然是一个问题。在审查现有协议后，我们使用新颖且严格控制的推理测试 (ART) 来探索这个问题，并将人类规范与 GPT-3 版本进行比较。我们的研究结果强调了可以直接从数据和薄弱领域学习的常识关系模型的类别。 GPT-3 为多种关系（包括同义、反义和默认继承）提供了与人类受试者同等的语言推理证据，如果没有人类判断的强化学习，GPT-3 的表现似乎处于 Has-part 和 Contained-in 参考区间的下端。通过必要质量、大小顺序和强度顺序也观察到了可供性特征的弱点。将法学硕士与符号世界基础相结合是解决联想学习的一个有前途的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨大型语言模型（LLMs）仅通过语言数据理解物理世界的能力，通过新型推理测试（ART）评估GPT-3与人类常识关系的匹配度。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLMs在语言任务中表现优异，但其对现实世界的理解能力存在争议，需验证模型是否能像人类一样掌握常识性物理关系。
AI.method: 设计严格控制的推理测试（ART），对比人类基准与GPT-3在多种常识关系（如同义词、反义词、组成部分等）上的表现差异。
AI.result: GPT-3在同义词、反义词等任务上接近人类水平，但未经过强化学习时，在组成部分（Has-part）和包含关系（Contained-in）等任务表现较弱，且在必要属性、尺寸/强度排序等感知特征上存在明显不足。
AI.conclusion: 单纯依赖语言数据的LLMs难以完全掌握物理世界常识，需结合符号系统进行世界建模以增强关联学习能力。

authors_text: Yu Cheng,Yihao Ai,Bo Wang,Xinchao Wang,Robby T. Tan
title: Bottom-Up 2D Pose Estimation via Dual Anatomical Centers for Small-Scale Persons
title_zh: 通过双解剖中心对小型人体进行自下而上的 2D 姿势估计
abstract: In multi-person 2D pose estimation, the bottom-up methods simultaneously predict poses for all persons, and unlike the top-down methods, do not rely on human detection. However, the SOTA bottom-up methods' accuracy is still inferior compared to the existing top-down methods. This is due to the predicted human poses being regressed based on the inconsistent human bounding box center and the lack of human-scale normalization, leading to the predicted human poses being inaccurate and small-scale persons being missed. To push the envelope of the bottom-up pose estimation, we firstly propose multi-scale training to enhance the network to handle scale variation with single-scale testing, particularly for small-scale persons. Secondly, we introduce dual anatomical centers (i.e., head and body), where we can predict the human poses more accurately and reliably, especially for small-scale persons. Moreover, existing bottom-up methods use multi-scale testing to boost the accuracy of pose estimation at the price of multiple additional forward passes, which weakens the efficiency of bottom-up methods, the core strength compared to top-down methods. By contrast, our multi-scale training enables the model to predict high-quality poses in a single forward pass (i.e., single-scale testing). Our method achieves 38.4\% improvement on bounding box precision and 39.1\% improvement on bounding box recall over the state of the art (SOTA) on the challenging small-scale persons subset of COCO. For the human pose AP evaluation, we achieve a new SOTA (71.0 AP) on the COCO test-dev set with the single-scale testing. We also achieve the top performance (40.3 AP) on OCHuman dataset in cross-dataset evaluation.
summary: In multi-person 2D pose estimation, the bottom-up methods simultaneously predict poses for all persons, and unlike the top-down methods, do not rely on human detection. However, the SOTA bottom-up methods' accuracy is still inferior compared to the existing top-down methods. This is due to the predicted human poses being regressed based on the inconsistent human bounding box center and the lack of human-scale normalization, leading to the predicted human poses being inaccurate and small-scale persons being missed. To push the envelope of the bottom-up pose estimation, we firstly propose multi-scale training to enhance the network to handle scale variation with single-scale testing, particularly for small-scale persons. Secondly, we introduce dual anatomical centers (i.e., head and body), where we can predict the human poses more accurately and reliably, especially for small-scale persons. Moreover, existing bottom-up methods use multi-scale testing to boost the accuracy of pose estimation at the price of multiple additional forward passes, which weakens the efficiency of bottom-up methods, the core strength compared to top-down methods. By contrast, our multi-scale training enables the model to predict high-quality poses in a single forward pass (i.e., single-scale testing). Our method achieves 38.4\% improvement on bounding box precision and 39.1\% improvement on bounding box recall over the state of the art (SOTA) on the challenging small-scale persons subset of COCO. For the human pose AP evaluation, we achieve a new SOTA (71.0 AP) on the COCO test-dev set with the single-scale testing. We also achieve the top performance (40.3 AP) on OCHuman dataset in cross-dataset evaluation.
abstract_zh: 在多人 2D 姿态估计中，自下而上的方法同时预测所有人的姿态，并且与自上而下的方法不同，它不依赖于人体检测。然而，与现有的自顶向下方法相比，SOTA自下而上方法的准确性仍然较差。这是由于基于不一致的人体边界框中心对预测的人体姿势进行回归以及缺乏人体尺度归一化，导致预测的人体姿势不准确并且遗漏了小尺度的人物。为了突破自下而上姿态估计的极限，我们首先提出多尺度训练，以增强网络处理单尺度测试的尺度变化，特别是对于小尺度的人。其次，我们引入了双解剖中心（即头部和身体），我们可以更准确、更可靠地预测人体姿势，特别是对于小规模的人。此外，现有的自下而上方法使用多尺度测试来提高位姿估计的准确性，但以多次额外的前向传递为代价，这削弱了自下而上方法的效率，而自下而上方法是与自上而下方法相比的核心优势。相比之下，我们的多尺度训练使模型能够在单次前向传递（即单尺度测试）中预测高质量的姿势。我们的方法在具有挑战性的 COCO 小规模人员子集上，与现有技术 (SOTA) 相比，边界框精度提高了 38.4%，边界框召回率提高了 39.1%。对于人体姿势 AP 评估，我们通过单尺度测试在 COCO 测试开发集上实现了新的 SOTA（71.0 AP）。我们还在 OCHuman 数据集上的跨数据集评估中实现了最高性能（40.3 AP）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对小规模人物的底部向上2D姿态估计方法，通过双解剖中心和多尺度训练提升检测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有底部向上方法在小规模人物检测中存在精度不足、漏检率高的问题，且多尺度测试影响效率。
AI.method: 提出多尺度训练增强尺度适应性，并引入头部与身体双解剖中心进行姿态预测，实现单次前向传递的高效高精度检测。
AI.result: 在COCO小规模子集上提升38.4%边界框精度和39.1%召回率，COCO测试集达71.0 AP（SOTA），OCHuman数据集获40.3 AP。
AI.conclusion: 双解剖中心与多尺度训练有效解决了小规模人物检测难题，推动底部向上方法性能突破。

authors_text: Calvin Luo
title: Understanding Diffusion Models: A Unified Perspective
title_zh: 理解扩散模型：统一的视角
abstract: Diffusion models have shown incredible capabilities as generative models; indeed, they power the current state-of-the-art models on text-conditioned image generation such as Imagen and DALL-E 2. In this work we review, demystify, and unify the understanding of diffusion models across both variational and score-based perspectives. We first derive Variational Diffusion Models (VDM) as a special case of a Markovian Hierarchical Variational Autoencoder, where three key assumptions enable tractable computation and scalable optimization of the ELBO. We then prove that optimizing a VDM boils down to learning a neural network to predict one of three potential objectives: the original source input from any arbitrary noisification of it, the original source noise from any arbitrarily noisified input, or the score function of a noisified input at any arbitrary noise level. We then dive deeper into what it means to learn the score function, and connect the variational perspective of a diffusion model explicitly with the Score-based Generative Modeling perspective through Tweedie's Formula. Lastly, we cover how to learn a conditional distribution using diffusion models via guidance.
summary: Diffusion models have shown incredible capabilities as generative models; indeed, they power the current state-of-the-art models on text-conditioned image generation such as Imagen and DALL-E 2. In this work we review, demystify, and unify the understanding of diffusion models across both variational and score-based perspectives. We first derive Variational Diffusion Models (VDM) as a special case of a Markovian Hierarchical Variational Autoencoder, where three key assumptions enable tractable computation and scalable optimization of the ELBO. We then prove that optimizing a VDM boils down to learning a neural network to predict one of three potential objectives: the original source input from any arbitrary noisification of it, the original source noise from any arbitrarily noisified input, or the score function of a noisified input at any arbitrary noise level. We then dive deeper into what it means to learn the score function, and connect the variational perspective of a diffusion model explicitly with the Score-based Generative Modeling perspective through Tweedie's Formula. Lastly, we cover how to learn a conditional distribution using diffusion models via guidance.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型作为生成模型表现出了令人难以置信的能力；事实上，它们为当前最先进的文本条件图像生成模型（例如 Imagen 和 DALL-E 2）提供了动力。在这项工作中，我们从变分和基于分数的角度回顾、揭秘和统一对扩散模型的理解。我们首先推导变分扩散模型（VDM）作为马尔可夫分层变分自动编码器的特例，其中三个关键假设使得 ELBO 能够进行易于处理的计算和可扩展的优化。然后，我们证明优化 VDM 可以归结为学习神经网络来预测三个潜在目标之一：来自任意噪声输入的原始源输入、来自任意噪声输入的原始源噪声，或者任意噪声水平下噪声输入的得分函数。然后，我们更深入地探讨学习得分函数的含义，并通过 Tweedie 公式将扩散模型的变分视角与基于得分的生成建模视角明确联系起来。最后，我们介绍如何通过指导使用扩散模型学习条件分布。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从变分和基于分数的视角统一理解扩散模型，推导出变分扩散模型（VDM）并建立其与分数生成模型的联系。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在生成任务中表现卓越，但其理论框架分散，需通过统一视角简化理解并提升可扩展性。
AI.method: 将VDM作为马尔可夫分层变分自编码器的特例，通过三个关键假设推导其计算可行性；证明优化VDM等价于学习三个目标之一，并借助Tweedie公式连接变分与分数视角；最后通过引导技术实现条件分布学习。
AI.result: 建立了统一框架，揭示了变分与分数视角的内在联系，明确了扩散模型训练的核心目标与优化路径。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为扩散模型提供了理论统一性，增强了其可解释性与工程实现效率，推动了生成模型的发展。

authors_text: Yiming Bao,Xu Zhao,Dahong Qian
title: FusePose: IMU-Vision Sensor Fusion in Kinematic Space for Parametric Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: FusePose：运动空间中的 IMU-视觉传感器融合，用于参数化人体姿势估计
abstract: There exist challenging problems in 3D human pose estimation mission, such as poor performance caused by occlusion and self-occlusion. Recently, IMU-vision sensor fusion is regarded as valuable for solving these problems. However, previous researches on the fusion of IMU and vision data, which is heterogeneous, fail to adequately utilize either IMU raw data or reliable high-level vision features. To facilitate a more efficient sensor fusion, in this work we propose a framework called \emph{FusePose} under a parametric human kinematic model. Specifically, we aggregate different information of IMU or vision data and introduce three distinctive sensor fusion approaches: NaiveFuse, KineFuse and AdaDeepFuse. NaiveFuse servers as a basic approach that only fuses simplified IMU data and estimated 3D pose in euclidean space. While in kinematic space, KineFuse is able to integrate the calibrated and aligned IMU raw data with converted 3D pose parameters. AdaDeepFuse further develops this kinematical fusion process to an adaptive and end-to-end trainable manner. Comprehensive experiments with ablation studies demonstrate the rationality and superiority of the proposed framework. The performance of 3D human pose estimation is improved compared to the baseline result. On Total Capture dataset, KineFuse surpasses previous state-of-the-art which uses IMU only for testing by 8.6\%. AdaDeepFuse surpasses state-of-the-art which uses IMU for both training and testing by 8.5\%. Moreover, we validate the generalization capability of our framework through experiments on Human3.6M dataset.
summary: There exist challenging problems in 3D human pose estimation mission, such as poor performance caused by occlusion and self-occlusion. Recently, IMU-vision sensor fusion is regarded as valuable for solving these problems. However, previous researches on the fusion of IMU and vision data, which is heterogeneous, fail to adequately utilize either IMU raw data or reliable high-level vision features. To facilitate a more efficient sensor fusion, in this work we propose a framework called \emph{FusePose} under a parametric human kinematic model. Specifically, we aggregate different information of IMU or vision data and introduce three distinctive sensor fusion approaches: NaiveFuse, KineFuse and AdaDeepFuse. NaiveFuse servers as a basic approach that only fuses simplified IMU data and estimated 3D pose in euclidean space. While in kinematic space, KineFuse is able to integrate the calibrated and aligned IMU raw data with converted 3D pose parameters. AdaDeepFuse further develops this kinematical fusion process to an adaptive and end-to-end trainable manner. Comprehensive experiments with ablation studies demonstrate the rationality and superiority of the proposed framework. The performance of 3D human pose estimation is improved compared to the baseline result. On Total Capture dataset, KineFuse surpasses previous state-of-the-art which uses IMU only for testing by 8.6\%. AdaDeepFuse surpasses state-of-the-art which uses IMU for both training and testing by 8.5\%. Moreover, we validate the generalization capability of our framework through experiments on Human3.6M dataset.
abstract_zh: 3D人体姿态估计任务中存在挑战性问题，例如遮挡和自遮挡导致的性能不佳。最近，IMU-视觉传感器融合被认为对于解决这些问题很有价值。然而，先前关于IMU和视觉数据融合的研究是异构的，未能充分利用IMU原始数据或可靠的高级视觉特征。为了促进更有效的传感器融合，在这项工作中，我们在参数化人体运动学模型下提出了一个名为 \emph{FusePose} 的框架。具体来说，我们聚合了 IMU 或视觉数据的不同信息，并引入了三种独特的传感器融合方法：NaiveFuse、KineFuse 和 AdaDeepFuse。 NaiveFuse 作为一种基本方法，仅融合简化的 IMU 数据和欧几里得空间中的估计 3D 位姿。在运动学空间中，KineFuse 能够将校准和对齐的 IMU 原始数据与转换后的 3D 位姿参数集成。 AdaDeepFuse 进一步将这种运动学融合过程发展为自适应和端到端可训练的方式。消融研究的综合实验证明了所提出框架的合理性和优越性。与基线结果相比，3D 人体姿势估计的性能有所提高。在 Total Capture 数据集上，KineFuse 比之前仅使用 IMU 进行测试的最先进技术提高了 8.6%。 AdaDeepFuse 比使用 IMU 进行训练和测试的最先进技术高出了 8.5%。此外，我们通过在 Human3.6M 数据集上的实验验证了我们框架的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FusePose框架，通过IMU与视觉传感器在运动学空间中的融合，提升参数化人体姿态估计的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有IMU-视觉融合方法未能有效利用原始IMU数据或高置信度视觉特征，导致遮挡场景下3D姿态估计效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计三种融合方法：NaiveFuse（欧氏空间简单融合）、KineFuse（运动学空间校准融合）、AdaDeepFuse（自适应端到端训练融合），基于参数化人体运动学模型进行多模态数据整合。
AI.result: 在Total Capture数据集上，KineFuse较仅使用IMU的SOTA方法提升8.6%，AdaDeepFuse在IMU训练测试均使用场景下提升8.5%；Human3.6M数据集验证了框架泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 运动学空间的传感器融合策略有效提升了姿态估计鲁棒性，证明了框架在遮挡场景下的优越性和广泛适用性。

authors_text: Loïc Strafella,Damien Chapon
title: LightAMR format standard and lossless compression algorithms for adaptive mesh refinement grids: RAMSES use case
title_zh: 用于自适应网格细化网格的 LightAMR 格式标准和无损压缩算法：RAMSES 用例
comment: 11 pages, 7 figures, accepted for publication in Journal of Computational Physics
comments: 11 pages, 7 figures, accepted for publication in Journal of Computational Physics
abstract: The evolution of parallel I/O library as well as new concepts such as 'in transit' and 'in situ' visualization and analysis have been identified as key technologies to circumvent I/O bottleneck in pre-exascale applications. Nevertheless, data structure and data format can also be improved for both reducing I/O volume and improving data interoperability between data producer and data consumer. In this paper, we propose a very lightweight and purpose-specific post-processing data model for AMR meshes, called lightAMR. Based on this data model, we introduce a tree pruning algorithm that removes data redundancy from a fully threaded AMR octree. In addition, we present two lossless compression algorithms, one for the AMR grid structure description and one for AMR double/single precision physical quantity scalar fields. Then we present performance benchmarks on RAMSES simulation datasets of this new lightAMR data model and the pruning and compression algorithms. We show that our pruning algorithm can reduce the total number of cells from RAMSES AMR datasets by 10-40% without loss of information. Finally, we show that the RAMSES AMR grid structure can be compacted by ~ 3 orders of magnitude and the float scalar fields can be compressed by a factor ~ 1.2 for double precision and ~ 1.3 - 1.5 in single precision with a compression speed of ~ 1 GB/s.
summary: The evolution of parallel I/O library as well as new concepts such as 'in transit' and 'in situ' visualization and analysis have been identified as key technologies to circumvent I/O bottleneck in pre-exascale applications. Nevertheless, data structure and data format can also be improved for both reducing I/O volume and improving data interoperability between data producer and data consumer. In this paper, we propose a very lightweight and purpose-specific post-processing data model for AMR meshes, called lightAMR. Based on this data model, we introduce a tree pruning algorithm that removes data redundancy from a fully threaded AMR octree. In addition, we present two lossless compression algorithms, one for the AMR grid structure description and one for AMR double/single precision physical quantity scalar fields. Then we present performance benchmarks on RAMSES simulation datasets of this new lightAMR data model and the pruning and compression algorithms. We show that our pruning algorithm can reduce the total number of cells from RAMSES AMR datasets by 10-40% without loss of information. Finally, we show that the RAMSES AMR grid structure can be compacted by ~ 3 orders of magnitude and the float scalar fields can be compressed by a factor ~ 1.2 for double precision and ~ 1.3 - 1.5 in single precision with a compression speed of ~ 1 GB/s.
abstract_zh: 并行 I/O 库的发展以及“传输中”和“原位”可视化和分析等新概念已被确定为规避前百亿亿次应用中 I/O 瓶颈的关键技术。尽管如此，数据结构和数据格式也可以改进，以减少I/O量并提高数据生产者和数据消费者之间的数据互操作性。在本文中，我们提出了一种非常轻量级且针对特定用途的 AMR 网格后处理数据模型，称为 lightAMR。基于此数据模型，我们引入了一种树修剪算法，该算法可从全线程 AMR 八叉树中删除数据冗余。此外，我们提出了两种无损压缩算法，一种用于AMR网格结构描述，一种用于AMR双/单精度物理量标量场。然后，我们提出了这个新的 lightAMR 数据模型以及修剪和压缩算法的 RAMSES 模拟数据集的性能基准。我们表明，我们的剪枝算法可以将 RAMSES AMR 数据集中的单元总数减少 10-40%，而不会丢失信息。最后，我们表明 RAMSES AMR 网格结构可以压缩约 3 个数量级，浮点标量场可以在双精度情况下压缩约 1.2 倍，在单精度情况下可压缩约 1.3 - 1.5 倍，压缩速度约为 1 GB/s。

AI.tldr: 本文提出轻量级lightAMR数据模型及压缩算法，优化自适应网格细化（AMR）数据的存储与处理效率。
AI.motivation: 为解决预超算应用中I/O瓶颈及数据格式互操作性不足的问题，需改进AMR数据结构与存储方式。
AI.method: 设计lightAMR数据模型，结合树修剪算法消除冗余，并开发两种无损压缩算法分别针对网格结构与物理标量场。
AI.result: 修剪算法减少RAMSES数据集单元格数量10-40%，网格结构压缩达3个数量级，标量场双精度压缩1.2倍、单精度1.3-1.5倍，压缩速度约1GB/s。
AI.conclusion: lightAMR模型与算法显著降低AMR数据存储需求，提升处理效率，为大规模模拟提供有效解决方案。

search_text: LightAMR format standard and lossless compression algorithms for adaptive mesh refinement grids: RAMSES use case 用于自适应网格细化网格的 LightAMR 格式标准和无损压缩算法：RAMSES 用例 The evolution of parallel I/O library as well as new concepts such as 'in transit' and 'in situ' visualization and analysis have been identified as key technologies to circumvent I/O bottleneck in pre-exascale applications. Nevertheless, data structure and data format can also be improved for both reducing I/O volume and improving data interoperability between data producer and data consumer. In this paper, we propose a very lightweight and purpose-specific post-processing data model for AMR meshes, called lightAMR. Based on this data model, we introduce a tree pruning algorithm that removes data redundancy from a fully threaded AMR octree. In addition, we present two lossless compression algorithms, one for the AMR grid structure description and one for AMR double/single precision physical quantity scalar fields. Then we present performance benchmarks on RAMSES simulation datasets of this new lightAMR data model and the pruning and compression algorithms. We show that our pruning algorithm can reduce the total number of cells from RAMSES AMR datasets by 10-40% without loss of information. Finally, we show that the RAMSES AMR grid structure can be compacted by ~ 3 orders of magnitude and the float scalar fields can be compressed by a factor ~ 1.2 for double precision and ~ 1.3 - 1.5 in single precision with a compression speed of ~ 1 GB/s. 并行 I/O 库的发展以及“传输中”和“原位”可视化和分析等新概念已被确定为规避前百亿亿次应用中 I/O 瓶颈的关键技术。尽管如此，数据结构和数据格式也可以改进，以减少I/O量并提高数据生产者和数据消费者之间的数据互操作性。在本文中，我们提出了一种非常轻量级且针对特定用途的 AMR 网格后处理数据模型，称为 lightAMR。基于此数据模型，我们引入了一种树修剪算法，该算法可从全线程 AMR 八叉树中删除数据冗余。此外，我们提出了两种无损压缩算法，一种用于AMR网格结构描述，一种用于AMR双/单精度物理量标量场。然后，我们提出了这个新的 lightAMR 数据模型以及修剪和压缩算法的 RAMSES 模拟数据集的性能基准。我们表明，我们的剪枝算法可以将 RAMSES AMR 数据集中的单元总数减少 10-40%，而不会丢失信息。最后，我们表明 RAMSES AMR 网格结构可以压缩约 3 个数量级，浮点标量场可以在双精度情况下压缩约 1.2 倍，在单精度情况下可压缩约 1.3 - 1.5 倍，压缩速度约为 1 GB/s。 本文提出轻量级lightAMR数据模型及压缩算法，优化自适应网格细化（AMR）数据的存储与处理效率。 Loïc Strafella,Damien Chapon astro-ph.IM,cs.DS

authors_text: Yicheng Luo,Jing Ren,Xuefei Zhe,Di Kang,Yajing Xu,Peter Wonka,Linchao Bao
title: Learning to Construct 3D Building Wireframes from 3D Line Clouds
title_zh: 学习从 3D 线云构建 3D 建筑线框
abstract: Line clouds, though under-investigated in the previous work, potentially encode more compact structural information of buildings than point clouds extracted from multi-view images. In this work, we propose the first network to process line clouds for building wireframe abstraction. The network takes a line cloud as input , i.e., a nonstructural and unordered set of 3D line segments extracted from multi-view images, and outputs a 3D wireframe of the underlying building, which consists of a sparse set of 3D junctions connected by line segments. We observe that a line patch, i.e., a group of neighboring line segments, encodes sufficient contour information to predict the existence and even the 3D position of a potential junction, as well as the likelihood of connectivity between two query junctions. We therefore introduce a two-layer Line-Patch Transformer to extract junctions and connectivities from sampled line patches to form a 3D building wireframe model. We also introduce a synthetic dataset of multi-view images with ground-truth 3D wireframe. We extensively justify that our reconstructed 3D wireframe models significantly improve upon multiple baseline building reconstruction methods. The code and data can be found at https://github.com/Luo1Cheng/LC2WF.
summary: Line clouds, though under-investigated in the previous work, potentially encode more compact structural information of buildings than point clouds extracted from multi-view images. In this work, we propose the first network to process line clouds for building wireframe abstraction. The network takes a line cloud as input , i.e., a nonstructural and unordered set of 3D line segments extracted from multi-view images, and outputs a 3D wireframe of the underlying building, which consists of a sparse set of 3D junctions connected by line segments. We observe that a line patch, i.e., a group of neighboring line segments, encodes sufficient contour information to predict the existence and even the 3D position of a potential junction, as well as the likelihood of connectivity between two query junctions. We therefore introduce a two-layer Line-Patch Transformer to extract junctions and connectivities from sampled line patches to form a 3D building wireframe model. We also introduce a synthetic dataset of multi-view images with ground-truth 3D wireframe. We extensively justify that our reconstructed 3D wireframe models significantly improve upon multiple baseline building reconstruction methods. The code and data can be found at https://github.com/Luo1Cheng/LC2WF.
abstract_zh: 尽管在之前的工作中研究不足，但线云可能比从多视图图像中提取的点云编码更紧凑的建筑物结构信息。在这项工作中，我们提出了第一个处理线云以构建线框抽象的网络。该网络采用线云作为输入，即从多视图图像中提取的一组非结构且无序的 3D 线段，并输出底层建筑物的 3D 线框，该线框由一组由线段连接的稀疏 3D 交汇点组成。我们观察到，线补丁（即一组相邻线段）编码足够的轮廓信息来预测潜在交汇点的存在甚至 3D 位置，以及两个查询交汇点之间连接的可能性。因此，我们引入了一个两层线补丁变压器来从采样的线补丁中提取连接点和连接，以形成 3D 建筑线框模型。我们还引入了具有真实 3D 线框的多视图图像的合成数据集。我们广泛证明，我们重建的 3D 线框模型显着改进了多基线建筑重建方法。代码和数据可以在https://github.com/Luo1Cheng/LC2WF找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从3D线云中学习构建建筑线框模型的方法。
AI.motivation: 线云相比点云能更紧凑地编码建筑结构信息，但此前研究不足，需开发专门处理线云的网络以生成建筑线框。
AI.method: 设计两层Line-Patch Transformer网络，通过分析线段簇预测接合点及连接关系，并构建合成数据集验证方法。
AI.result: 重建的3D线框模型显著优于多种基线建筑重建方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了从线云到建筑线框的生成，数据集为未来研究提供支持。

authors_text: Hazem Peter Samoaa,Antonio Longa,Mazen Mohamad,Morteza Haghir Chehreghani,Philipp Leitner
title: TEP-GNN: Accurate Execution Time Prediction of Functional Tests using Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: TEP-GNN：使用图神经网络准确预测功能测试的执行时间
abstract: Predicting the performance of production code prior to actually executing or benchmarking it is known to be highly challenging. In this paper, we propose a predictive model, dubbed TEP-GNN, which demonstrates that high-accuracy performance prediction is possible for the special case of predicting unit test execution times. TEP-GNN uses FA-ASTs, or flow-augmented ASTs, as a graph-based code representation approach, and predicts test execution times using a powerful graph neural network (GNN) deep learning model. We evaluate TEP-GNN using four real-life Java open source programs, based on 922 test files mined from the projects' public repositories. We find that our approach achieves a high Pearson correlation of 0.789, considerable outperforming a baseline deep learning model. However, we also find that more work is needed for trained models to generalize to unseen projects. Our work demonstrates that FA-ASTs and GNNs are a feasible approach for predicting absolute performance values, and serves as an important intermediary step towards being able to predict the performance of arbitrary code prior to execution.
summary: Predicting the performance of production code prior to actually executing or benchmarking it is known to be highly challenging. In this paper, we propose a predictive model, dubbed TEP-GNN, which demonstrates that high-accuracy performance prediction is possible for the special case of predicting unit test execution times. TEP-GNN uses FA-ASTs, or flow-augmented ASTs, as a graph-based code representation approach, and predicts test execution times using a powerful graph neural network (GNN) deep learning model. We evaluate TEP-GNN using four real-life Java open source programs, based on 922 test files mined from the projects' public repositories. We find that our approach achieves a high Pearson correlation of 0.789, considerable outperforming a baseline deep learning model. However, we also find that more work is needed for trained models to generalize to unseen projects. Our work demonstrates that FA-ASTs and GNNs are a feasible approach for predicting absolute performance values, and serves as an important intermediary step towards being able to predict the performance of arbitrary code prior to execution.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，在实际执行或基准测试之前预测生产代码的性能非常具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 TEP-GNN 的预测模型，该模型证明对于预测单元测试执行时间的特殊情况，高精度性能预测是可能的。 TEP-GNN 使用 FA-AST（或流程增强 AST）作为基于图的代码表示方法，并使用强大的图神经网络 (GNN) 深度学习模型来预测测试执行时间。我们使用四个现实生活中的 Java 开源程序基于从项目公共存储库中挖掘的 922 个测试文件来评估 TEP-GNN。我们发现我们的方法实现了 0.789 的高皮尔逊相关性，大大优于基线深度学习模型。然而，我们还发现训练有素的模型需要做更多的工作才能推广到未见过的项目。我们的工作表明，FA-AST 和 GNN 是预测绝对性能值的可行方法，并且是能够在执行之前预测任意代码性能的重要中间步骤。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TEP-GNN模型，利用图神经网络和流增强AST（FA-AST）预测单元测试执行时间。
AI.motivation: 在代码实际执行前准确预测性能具有挑战性，现有方法难以有效预测单元测试执行时间。
AI.method: 基于FA-AST的图表示方法，结合图神经网络（GNN）构建预测模型。
AI.result: 在四个Java开源项目上达到0.789的皮尔逊相关系数，显著优于基线模型，但模型泛化能力仍需提升。
AI.conclusion: FA-AST与GNN的结合为预测代码性能提供了可行方案，是实现任意代码性能预测的重要中间步骤。

result: 在四个Java开源项目上达到0.789的皮尔逊相关系数，显著优于基线模型，但模型泛化能力仍需提升。
conclusion: FA-AST与GNN的结合为预测代码性能提供了可行方案，是实现任意代码性能预测的重要中间步骤。
search_text: TEP-GNN: Accurate Execution Time Prediction of Functional Tests using Graph Neural Networks TEP-GNN：使用图神经网络准确预测功能测试的执行时间 Predicting the performance of production code prior to actually executing or benchmarking it is known to be highly challenging. In this paper, we propose a predictive model, dubbed TEP-GNN, which demonstrates that high-accuracy performance prediction is possible for the special case of predicting unit test execution times. TEP-GNN uses FA-ASTs, or flow-augmented ASTs, as a graph-based code representation approach, and predicts test execution times using a powerful graph neural network (GNN) deep learning model. We evaluate TEP-GNN using four real-life Java open source programs, based on 922 test files mined from the projects' public repositories. We find that our approach achieves a high Pearson correlation of 0.789, considerable outperforming a baseline deep learning model. However, we also find that more work is needed for trained models to generalize to unseen projects. Our work demonstrates that FA-ASTs and GNNs are a feasible approach for predicting absolute performance values, and serves as an important intermediary step towards being able to predict the performance of arbitrary code prior to execution. 众所周知，在实际执行或基准测试之前预测生产代码的性能非常具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 TEP-GNN 的预测模型，该模型证明对于预测单元测试执行时间的特殊情况，高精度性能预测是可能的。 TEP-GNN 使用 FA-AST（或流程增强 AST）作为基于图的代码表示方法，并使用强大的图神经网络 (GNN) 深度学习模型来预测测试执行时间。我们使用四个现实生活中的 Java 开源程序基于从项目公共存储库中挖掘的 922 个测试文件来评估 TEP-GNN。我们发现我们的方法实现了 0.789 的高皮尔逊相关性，大大优于基线深度学习模型。然而，我们还发现训练有素的模型需要做更多的工作才能推广到未见过的项目。我们的工作表明，FA-AST 和 GNN 是预测绝对性能值的可行方法，并且是能够在执行之前预测任意代码性能的重要中间步骤。 本文提出TEP-GNN模型，利用图神经网络和流增强AST（FA-AST）预测单元测试执行时间。 Hazem Peter Samoaa,Antonio Longa,Mazen Mohamad,Morteza Haghir Chehreghani,Philipp Leitner cs.SE,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhengyi Li,Cong Guo,Zhanda Zhu,Yangjie Zhou,Yuxian Qiu,Xiaotian Gao,Jingwen Leng,Minyi Guo
title: Efficient Adaptive Activation Rounding for Post-Training Quantization
title_zh: 用于训练后量化的高效自适应激活舍入
abstract: Post-training quantization attracts increasing attention due to its convenience in deploying quantized neural networks. Although rounding-to-nearest remains the prevailing method for DNN quantization, prior research has demonstrated its suboptimal nature when applied to weight quantization. They propose optimizing weight rounding schemes by leveraging output error rather than the traditional weight quantization error. Our study reveals that similar rounding challenges also extend to activation quantization. Despite the easy generalization, the challenges lie in the dynamic nature of activation. Adaptive rounding is expected for varying activations and the method is subjected to runtime overhead. To tackle this, we propose the AQuant quantization framework with a novel perspective to reduce output error by adjusting rounding schemes of activations. Instead of using the constant rounding border 0.5 of the rounding-to-nearest operation, we make the border become a function w.r.t. the activation value to change the activation rounding by the adaptive border. To deal with the runtime overhead, we use a coarse-grained version of the border function. Finally, we introduce our framework to optimize the border function. Extensive experiments show that AQuant achieves notable improvements compared to state-of-the-art works and pushes the accuracy of ResNet-18 up to 60.31% under the 2-bit weight and activation quantization.
summary: Post-training quantization attracts increasing attention due to its convenience in deploying quantized neural networks. Although rounding-to-nearest remains the prevailing method for DNN quantization, prior research has demonstrated its suboptimal nature when applied to weight quantization. They propose optimizing weight rounding schemes by leveraging output error rather than the traditional weight quantization error. Our study reveals that similar rounding challenges also extend to activation quantization. Despite the easy generalization, the challenges lie in the dynamic nature of activation. Adaptive rounding is expected for varying activations and the method is subjected to runtime overhead. To tackle this, we propose the AQuant quantization framework with a novel perspective to reduce output error by adjusting rounding schemes of activations. Instead of using the constant rounding border 0.5 of the rounding-to-nearest operation, we make the border become a function w.r.t. the activation value to change the activation rounding by the adaptive border. To deal with the runtime overhead, we use a coarse-grained version of the border function. Finally, we introduce our framework to optimize the border function. Extensive experiments show that AQuant achieves notable improvements compared to state-of-the-art works and pushes the accuracy of ResNet-18 up to 60.31% under the 2-bit weight and activation quantization.
abstract_zh: 训练后量化由于其部署量化神经网络的便利性而受到越来越多的关注。尽管舍入到最近值仍然是 DNN 量化的主流方法，但先前的研究已经证明了其在应用于权重量化时的次优性质。他们提出通过利用输出误差而不是传统的权重量化误差来优化权重舍入方案。我们的研究表明，类似的舍入挑战也延伸到激活量化。尽管很容易概括，但挑战在于激活的动态性质。自适应舍入预计适用于不同的激活，并且该方法会受到运行时开销的影响。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 AQuant 量化框架，它以新颖的视角通过调整激活的舍入方案来减少输出误差。我们没有使用舍入到最近操作的常量舍入边界 0.5，而是使边界成为一个函数。激活值以通过自适应边界更改激活舍入。为了处理运行时开销，我们使用边界函数的粗粒度版本。最后，我们介绍了我们优化边界功能的框架。大量实验表明，与最先进的作品相比，AQuant 取得了显着的改进，并将 ResNet-18 在 2 位权重和激活量化下的准确率提高到 60.31%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AQuant框架，通过自适应激活值的动态舍入边界，提升后训练量化中激活量化的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统最近舍入法在激活量化中因激活值动态变化导致精度损失，现有研究未有效解决该问题。
AI.method: 设计自适应舍入边界函数，将固定阈值0.5替换为与激活值相关的动态函数，并采用粗粒度计算降低运行时开销。
AI.result: 在2位权值与激活量化下，ResNet-18准确率提升至60.31%，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 自适应激活舍入框架有效缓解了动态激活量化难题，为高效模型压缩提供了新思路。

authors_text: Rebecca M. C. Taylor,Johan A. du Preez
title: Rail break and derailment prediction using Probabilistic Graphical Modelling
title_zh: 使用概率图形模型预测铁轨断裂和脱轨
comment: Proceedings of the 11'th International Heavy Haul Association Conference 2017
comments: Proceedings of the 11'th International Heavy Haul Association Conference 2017
abstract: Rail breaks are one of the most common causes of derailments internationally. This is no different for the South African Iron Ore line. Many rail breaks occur as a heavy-haul train passes over a crack, large defect or defective weld. In such cases, it is usually too late for the train to slow down in time to prevent a de-railment. Knowing the risk of a rail break occurring associated with a train passing over a section of rail allows for better implementation of maintenance initiatives and mitigating measures. In this paper the Ore Line's specific challenges are discussed and the currently available data that can be used to create a rail break risk prediction model is reviewed. The development of a basic rail break risk prediction model for the Ore Line is then presented. Finally the insight gained from the model is demonstrated by means of discussing various scenarios of various rail break risk. In future work, we are planning on extending this basic model to allow input from live monitoring systems such as the ultrasonic broken rail detection system.
summary: Rail breaks are one of the most common causes of derailments internationally. This is no different for the South African Iron Ore line. Many rail breaks occur as a heavy-haul train passes over a crack, large defect or defective weld. In such cases, it is usually too late for the train to slow down in time to prevent a de-railment. Knowing the risk of a rail break occurring associated with a train passing over a section of rail allows for better implementation of maintenance initiatives and mitigating measures. In this paper the Ore Line's specific challenges are discussed and the currently available data that can be used to create a rail break risk prediction model is reviewed. The development of a basic rail break risk prediction model for the Ore Line is then presented. Finally the insight gained from the model is demonstrated by means of discussing various scenarios of various rail break risk. In future work, we are planning on extending this basic model to allow input from live monitoring systems such as the ultrasonic broken rail detection system.
abstract_zh: 铁路断裂是国际上脱轨最常见的原因之一。这对于南非铁矿石生产线来说并没有什么不同。许多钢轨断裂都是在重载列车经过裂缝、大缺陷或有缺陷的焊缝时发生的。在这种情况下，列车及时减速以防止脱轨通常为时已晚。了解与火车经过一段铁路相关的铁路断裂风险，可以更好地实施维护计划和缓解措施。本文讨论了矿石线的具体挑战，并回顾了可用于创建铁路断裂风险预测模型的当前可用数据。然后介绍了矿石线基本断轨风险预测模型的开发。最后，通过讨论各种铁路断裂风险的各种场景来论证从模型中获得的见解。在未来的工作中，我们计划扩展这个基本模型，以允许实时监控系统（例如超声波断轨检测系统）的输入。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于概率图模型的铁路断裂和脱轨预测方法，旨在通过分析南非铁矿石线路的数据，开发铁路断裂风险预测模型。
AI.motivation: 铁路断裂是全球范围内导致脱轨的主要原因之一，尤其在南非铁矿石运输线路上，传统维护措施难以及时预防事故，亟需通过风险预测模型优化维护策略。
AI.method: 通过分析铁矿石线路的具体挑战和可用数据，构建基础铁路断裂风险预测模型，并利用不同场景模拟展示模型的预测结果，未来计划整合实时监测系统数据。
AI.result: 成功开发了基础风险预测模型，并通过多种铁路断裂风险场景验证了模型的有效性，为维护决策提供了数据支持。
AI.conclusion: 该模型可有效预测铁路断裂风险，辅助维护措施实施，后续将结合实时监测技术提升预测精度和实用性。
