authors_text: Eren Cakmak,Johannes Fuchs,Dominik Jäckle,Tobias Schreck,Ulrik Brandes,Daniel Keim
title: Motif-Based Visual Analysis of Dynamic Networks
title_zh: 基于基序的动态网络可视化分析
abstract: Many data analysis problems rely on dynamic networks, such as social or communication network analyses. Providing a scalable overview of long sequences of such dynamic networks remains challenging due to the underlying large-scale data containing elusive topological changes. We propose two complementary pixel-based visualizations, which reflect occurrences of selected sub-networks (motifs) and provide a time-scalable overview of dynamic networks: a network-level census (motif significance profiles) linked with a node-level sub-network metric (graphlet degree vectors) views to reveal structural changes, trends, states, and outliers. The network census captures significantly occurring motifs compared to their expected occurrences in random networks and exposes structural changes in a dynamic network. The sub-network metrics display the local topological neighborhood of a node in a single network belonging to the dynamic network. The linked pixel-based visualizations allow exploring motifs in different-sized networks to analyze the changing structures within and across dynamic networks, for instance, to visually analyze the shape and rate of changes in the network topology. We describe the identification of visual patterns, also considering different reordering strategies to emphasize visual patterns. We demonstrate the approach's usefulness by a use case analysis based on real-world large-scale dynamic networks, such as the evolving social networks of Reddit or Facebook.
summary: Many data analysis problems rely on dynamic networks, such as social or communication network analyses. Providing a scalable overview of long sequences of such dynamic networks remains challenging due to the underlying large-scale data containing elusive topological changes. We propose two complementary pixel-based visualizations, which reflect occurrences of selected sub-networks (motifs) and provide a time-scalable overview of dynamic networks: a network-level census (motif significance profiles) linked with a node-level sub-network metric (graphlet degree vectors) views to reveal structural changes, trends, states, and outliers. The network census captures significantly occurring motifs compared to their expected occurrences in random networks and exposes structural changes in a dynamic network. The sub-network metrics display the local topological neighborhood of a node in a single network belonging to the dynamic network. The linked pixel-based visualizations allow exploring motifs in different-sized networks to analyze the changing structures within and across dynamic networks, for instance, to visually analyze the shape and rate of changes in the network topology. We describe the identification of visual patterns, also considering different reordering strategies to emphasize visual patterns. We demonstrate the approach's usefulness by a use case analysis based on real-world large-scale dynamic networks, such as the evolving social networks of Reddit or Facebook.
abstract_zh: 许多数据分析问题依赖于动态网络，例如社交或通信网络分析。由于底层的大规模数据包含难以捉摸的拓扑变化，提供此类动态网络长序列的可扩展概述仍然具有挑战性。我们提出了两种互补的基于像素的可视化，它们反映了选定子网络（图案）的出现，并提供了动态网络的时间可扩展概述：网络级普查（图案重要性概况）与节点级子网络度量（图基度向量）视图相链接，以揭示结构变化、趋势、状态和异常值。网络普查捕获与随机网络中预期出现的主题相比显着出现的主题，并揭示动态网络中的结构变化。子网络度量显示属于动态网络的单个网络中节点的局部拓扑邻域。链接的基于像素的可视化允许探索不同大小网络中的图案，以分析动态网络内部和跨动态网络的变化结构，例如，直观地分析网络拓扑的形状和变化率。我们描述了视觉模式的识别，还考虑了不同的重新排序策略来强调视觉模式。我们通过基于现实世界大规模动态网络（例如不断发展的 Reddit 或 Facebook 社交网络）的用例分析来证明该方法的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于子网络（motif）的可视化方法，用于分析动态网络的结构变化和趋势。
AI.motivation: 动态网络分析面临大规模数据和隐蔽拓扑变化的挑战，传统方法难以提供可扩展的时序概览。
AI.method: 设计两种互补的像素级可视化：网络层面的motif显著性分析与节点层面的图元度向量视图，结合动态网络中的子网络变化进行联动分析。
AI.result: 通过Reddit和Facebook等真实动态网络案例验证，有效揭示了网络结构演变的模式、趋势及异常状态。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过motif驱动的可视化技术，为动态网络的结构分析提供了可扩展且直观的解决方案。

authors_text: Shion Ishikawa,Young-joo Chung,Yu Hirate
title: Dynamic collaborative filtering Thompson Sampling for cross-domain advertisements recommendation
title_zh: 动态协同过滤汤普森采样跨域广告推荐
abstract: Recently online advertisers utilize Recommender systems (RSs) for display advertising to improve users' engagement. The contextual bandit model is a widely used RS to exploit and explore users' engagement and maximize the long-term rewards such as clicks or conversions. However, the current models aim to optimize a set of ads only in a specific domain and do not share information with other models in multiple domains. In this paper, we propose dynamic collaborative filtering Thompson Sampling (DCTS), the novel yet simple model to transfer knowledge among multiple bandit models. DCTS exploits similarities between users and between ads to estimate a prior distribution of Thompson sampling. Such similarities are obtained based on contextual features of users and ads. Similarities enable models in a domain that didn't have much data to converge more quickly by transferring knowledge. Moreover, DCTS incorporates temporal dynamics of users to track the user's recent change of preference. We first show transferring knowledge and incorporating temporal dynamics improve the performance of the baseline models on a synthetic dataset. Then we conduct an empirical analysis on a real-world dataset and the result showed that DCTS improves click-through rate by 9.7% than the state-of-the-art models. We also analyze hyper-parameters that adjust temporal dynamics and similarities and show the best parameter which maximizes CTR.
summary: Recently online advertisers utilize Recommender systems (RSs) for display advertising to improve users' engagement. The contextual bandit model is a widely used RS to exploit and explore users' engagement and maximize the long-term rewards such as clicks or conversions. However, the current models aim to optimize a set of ads only in a specific domain and do not share information with other models in multiple domains. In this paper, we propose dynamic collaborative filtering Thompson Sampling (DCTS), the novel yet simple model to transfer knowledge among multiple bandit models. DCTS exploits similarities between users and between ads to estimate a prior distribution of Thompson sampling. Such similarities are obtained based on contextual features of users and ads. Similarities enable models in a domain that didn't have much data to converge more quickly by transferring knowledge. Moreover, DCTS incorporates temporal dynamics of users to track the user's recent change of preference. We first show transferring knowledge and incorporating temporal dynamics improve the performance of the baseline models on a synthetic dataset. Then we conduct an empirical analysis on a real-world dataset and the result showed that DCTS improves click-through rate by 9.7% than the state-of-the-art models. We also analyze hyper-parameters that adjust temporal dynamics and similarities and show the best parameter which maximizes CTR.
abstract_zh: 最近，在线广告商利用推荐系统（RS）进行展示广告，以提高用户的参与度。上下文强盗模型是一种广泛使用的RS，用于利用和探索用户的参与度并最大化点击或转化等长期奖励。然而，当前的模型旨在仅在特定域中优化一组广告，并且不与多个域中的其他模型共享信息。在本文中，我们提出了动态协同过滤汤普森采样（DCTS），这是一种新颖而简单的模型，用于在多个强盗模型之间传输知识。 DCTS 利用用户之间和广告之间的相似性来估计 Thompson 采样的先验分布。这种相似性是根据用户和广告的上下文特征获得的。相似性使得没有太多数据的领域中的模型能够通过知识转移更快地收敛。此外，DCTS 结合了用户的时间动态来跟踪用户最近的偏好变化。我们首先展示了转移知识和结合时间动态可以提高合成数据集上基线模型的性能。然后我们对真实世界的数据集进行了实证分析，结果表明 DCTS 比最先进的模型提高了 9.7% 的点击率。我们还分析了调整时间动态和相似性的超参数，并显示了最大化点击率的最佳参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态协同过滤汤普森抽样（DCTS）模型，用于跨领域广告推荐，通过知识迁移和用户动态偏好建模提升点击率。
AI.motivation: 现有广告推荐模型局限于单一领域无法跨域共享信息，导致数据稀疏领域收敛缓慢，且未有效跟踪用户动态偏好变化。
AI.method: 基于用户和广告的上下文特征计算相似性，构建先验分布进行知识迁移；结合时间动态调整用户偏好，实现跨领域模型协同优化。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和真实数据集实验中，DCTS相较最优模型提升点击率9.7%，并验证了动态参数对性能的关键影响。
AI.conclusion: DCTS通过跨域知识迁移和动态偏好建模有效提升推荐效果，为多领域广告系统提供了可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Chunyan Zeng,Shuai Kong,Zhifeng Wang,Xiangkui Wan,Yunfan Chen
title: Digital Audio Tampering Detection Based on ENF Spatio-temporal Features Representation Learning
title_zh: 基于ENF时空特征表示学习的数字音频篡改检测
abstract: Most digital audio tampering detection methods based on electrical network frequency (ENF) only utilize the static spatial information of ENF, ignoring the variation of ENF in time series, which limit the ability of ENF feature representation and reduce the accuracy of tampering detection. This paper proposes a new method for digital audio tampering detection based on ENF spatio-temporal features representation learning. A parallel spatio-temporal network model is constructed using CNN and BiLSTM, which deeply extracts ENF spatial feature information and ENF temporal feature information to enhance the feature representation capability to improve the tampering detection accuracy. In order to extract the spatial and temporal features of the ENF, this paper firstly uses digital audio high-precision Discrete Fourier Transform analysis to extract the phase sequences of the ENF. The unequal phase series is divided into frames by adaptive frame shifting to obtain feature matrices of the same size to represent the spatial features of the ENF. At the same time, the phase sequences are divided into frames based on ENF time changes information to represent the temporal features of the ENF. Then deep spatial and temporal features are further extracted using CNN and BiLSTM respectively, and an attention mechanism is used to adaptively assign weights to the deep spatial and temporal features to obtain spatio-temporal features with stronger representation capability. Finally, the deep neural network is used to determine whether the audio has been tampered with. The experimental results show that the proposed method improves the accuracy by 2.12%-7.12% compared with state-of-the-art methods under the public database Carioca, New Spanish.
summary: Most digital audio tampering detection methods based on electrical network frequency (ENF) only utilize the static spatial information of ENF, ignoring the variation of ENF in time series, which limit the ability of ENF feature representation and reduce the accuracy of tampering detection. This paper proposes a new method for digital audio tampering detection based on ENF spatio-temporal features representation learning. A parallel spatio-temporal network model is constructed using CNN and BiLSTM, which deeply extracts ENF spatial feature information and ENF temporal feature information to enhance the feature representation capability to improve the tampering detection accuracy. In order to extract the spatial and temporal features of the ENF, this paper firstly uses digital audio high-precision Discrete Fourier Transform analysis to extract the phase sequences of the ENF. The unequal phase series is divided into frames by adaptive frame shifting to obtain feature matrices of the same size to represent the spatial features of the ENF. At the same time, the phase sequences are divided into frames based on ENF time changes information to represent the temporal features of the ENF. Then deep spatial and temporal features are further extracted using CNN and BiLSTM respectively, and an attention mechanism is used to adaptively assign weights to the deep spatial and temporal features to obtain spatio-temporal features with stronger representation capability. Finally, the deep neural network is used to determine whether the audio has been tampered with. The experimental results show that the proposed method improves the accuracy by 2.12%-7.12% compared with state-of-the-art methods under the public database Carioca, New Spanish.
abstract_zh: 大多数基于电网频率（ENF）的数字音频篡改检测方法仅利用ENF的静态空间信息，忽略了ENF在时间序列上的变化，这限制了ENF特征表示的能力，降低了篡改检测的准确性。本文提出了一种基于ENF时空特征表示学习的数字音频篡改检测新方法。利用CNN和BiLSTM构建并行时空网络模型，深度提取ENF空间特征信息和ENF时间特征信息，增强特征表示能力，提高篡改检测精度。为了提取ENF的空间和时间特征，本文首先利用数字音频高精度离散傅里叶变换分析来提取ENF的相位序列。通过自适应移帧将不等相位序列分帧，得到相同大小的特征矩阵来表示ENF的空间特征。同时，根据ENF时间变化信息将相位序列分为帧，以表示ENF的时间特征。然后分别利用CNN和BiLSTM进一步提取深层空间和时间特征，并利用注意力机制自适应地为深层空间和时间特征分配权重，以获得具有更强表示能力的时空特征。最后利用深度神经网络判断音频是否被篡改。实验结果表明，与公共数据库Carioca、New Spanish下的state-of-the-art方法相比，该方法的准确率提高了2.12%-7.12%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于ENF时空特征表示学习的数字音频篡改检测方法，通过结合空间和时间特征提升检测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有ENF-based方法仅利用静态空间信息，忽略ENF时序变化，导致特征表示能力不足和检测准确率下降。
AI.method: 构建CNN与BiLSTM并行网络，通过自适应分帧提取ENF空间特征矩阵，结合时序信息提取时间特征，利用注意力机制融合特征后输入深度神经网络进行篡改判定。
AI.result: 在Carioca和New Spanish公开数据集上，相比现有方法检测准确率提升2.12%-7.12%。
AI.conclusion: 通过深度挖掘ENF时空特征并引入注意力机制，有效增强了特征表示能力，显著提升了音频篡改检测性能。

search_text: Digital Audio Tampering Detection Based on ENF Spatio-temporal Features Representation Learning 基于ENF时空特征表示学习的数字音频篡改检测 Most digital audio tampering detection methods based on electrical network frequency (ENF) only utilize the static spatial information of ENF, ignoring the variation of ENF in time series, which limit the ability of ENF feature representation and reduce the accuracy of tampering detection. This paper proposes a new method for digital audio tampering detection based on ENF spatio-temporal features representation learning. A parallel spatio-temporal network model is constructed using CNN and BiLSTM, which deeply extracts ENF spatial feature information and ENF temporal feature information to enhance the feature representation capability to improve the tampering detection accuracy. In order to extract the spatial and temporal features of the ENF, this paper firstly uses digital audio high-precision Discrete Fourier Transform analysis to extract the phase sequences of the ENF. The unequal phase series is divided into frames by adaptive frame shifting to obtain feature matrices of the same size to represent the spatial features of the ENF. At the same time, the phase sequences are divided into frames based on ENF time changes information to represent the temporal features of the ENF. Then deep spatial and temporal features are further extracted using CNN and BiLSTM respectively, and an attention mechanism is used to adaptively assign weights to the deep spatial and temporal features to obtain spatio-temporal features with stronger representation capability. Finally, the deep neural network is used to determine whether the audio has been tampered with. The experimental results show that the proposed method improves the accuracy by 2.12%-7.12% compared with state-of-the-art methods under the public database Carioca, New Spanish. 大多数基于电网频率（ENF）的数字音频篡改检测方法仅利用ENF的静态空间信息，忽略了ENF在时间序列上的变化，这限制了ENF特征表示的能力，降低了篡改检测的准确性。本文提出了一种基于ENF时空特征表示学习的数字音频篡改检测新方法。利用CNN和BiLSTM构建并行时空网络模型，深度提取ENF空间特征信息和ENF时间特征信息，增强特征表示能力，提高篡改检测精度。为了提取ENF的空间和时间特征，本文首先利用数字音频高精度离散傅里叶变换分析来提取ENF的相位序列。通过自适应移帧将不等相位序列分帧，得到相同大小的特征矩阵来表示ENF的空间特征。同时，根据ENF时间变化信息将相位序列分为帧，以表示ENF的时间特征。然后分别利用CNN和BiLSTM进一步提取深层空间和时间特征，并利用注意力机制自适应地为深层空间和时间特征分配权重，以获得具有更强表示能力的时空特征。最后利用深度神经网络判断音频是否被篡改。实验结果表明，与公共数据库Carioca、New Spanish下的state-of-the-art方法相比，该方法的准确率提高了2.12%-7.12%。 本文提出基于ENF时空特征表示学习的数字音频篡改检测方法，通过结合空间和时间特征提升检测精度。 Chunyan Zeng,Shuai Kong,Zhifeng Wang,Xiangkui Wan,Yunfan Chen cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Yizheng Ouyang,Tianjin Zhang,Weibo Gu,Hongfa Wang
title: Adaptive Perception Transformer for Temporal Action Localization
title_zh: 用于时间动作定位的自适应感知变压器
abstract: Temporal action localization aims to predict the boundary and category of each action instance in untrimmed long videos. Most of previous methods based on anchors or proposals neglect the global-local context interaction in entire video sequences. Besides, their multi-stage designs cannot generate action boundaries and categories straightforwardly. To address the above issues, this paper proposes a end-to-end model, called Adaptive Perception transformer (AdaPerFormer for short). Specifically, AdaPerFormer explores a dual-branch attention mechanism. One branch takes care of the global perception attention, which can model entire video sequences and aggregate global relevant contexts. While the other branch concentrates on the local convolutional shift to aggregate intra-frame and inter-frame information through our bidirectional shift operation. The end-to-end nature produces the boundaries and categories of video actions without extra steps. Extensive experiments together with ablation studies are provided to reveal the effectiveness of our design. Our method obtains competitive performance on the THUMOS14 and ActivityNet-1.3 dataset.
summary: Temporal action localization aims to predict the boundary and category of each action instance in untrimmed long videos. Most of previous methods based on anchors or proposals neglect the global-local context interaction in entire video sequences. Besides, their multi-stage designs cannot generate action boundaries and categories straightforwardly. To address the above issues, this paper proposes a end-to-end model, called Adaptive Perception transformer (AdaPerFormer for short). Specifically, AdaPerFormer explores a dual-branch attention mechanism. One branch takes care of the global perception attention, which can model entire video sequences and aggregate global relevant contexts. While the other branch concentrates on the local convolutional shift to aggregate intra-frame and inter-frame information through our bidirectional shift operation. The end-to-end nature produces the boundaries and categories of video actions without extra steps. Extensive experiments together with ablation studies are provided to reveal the effectiveness of our design. Our method obtains competitive performance on the THUMOS14 and ActivityNet-1.3 dataset.
abstract_zh: 时间动作定位旨在预测未修剪的长视频中每个动作实例的边界和类别。之前大多数基于锚点或提案的方法都忽略了整个视频序列中的全局局部上下文交互。此外，他们的多阶段设计无法直接生成动作边界和类别。为了解决上述问题，本文提出了一种端到端模型，称为自适应感知变压器（简称AdaPerFormer）。具体来说，AdaPerFormer 探索了双分支注意力机制。其中一个分支负责全局感知注意力，它可以对整个视频序列进行建模并聚合全局相关上下文。而另一个分支则专注于局部卷积移位，通过双向移位操作聚合帧内和帧间信息。端到端的性质无需额外的步骤即可产生视频动作的边界和类别。提供了大量的实验和消融研究来揭示我们设计的有效性。我们的方法在 THUMOS14 和 ActivityNet-1.3 数据集上获得了有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端模型AdaPerFormer，用于解决未剪辑长视频中动作实例的时间边界和类别预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于锚点或提议的方法忽视了视频序列的全局-局部上下文交互，且多阶段设计无法直接生成动作边界和类别。
AI.method: 设计双分支注意力机制：全局分支建模视频整体序列并聚合全局上下文，局部分支通过双向卷积移位操作聚合帧内及帧间信息。
AI.result: 在THUMOS14和ActivityNet-1.3数据集上取得具有竞争力的性能，实验与消融研究验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: AdaPerFormer通过全局-局部双分支结构有效建模视频上下文，实现了端到端的动作定位，性能优于现有方法。

authors_text: Ryohei Umatani,Takashi Imai,Kaoru Kawamoto,Shutaro Kunimasa
title: Time Series Clustering with an EM algorithm for Mixtures of Linear Gaussian State Space Models
title_zh: 使用 EM 算法对线性高斯状态空间模型混合进行时间序列聚类
abstract: In this paper, we consider the task of clustering a set of individual time series while modeling each cluster, that is, model-based time series clustering. The task requires a parametric model with sufficient flexibility to describe the dynamics in various time series. To address this problem, we propose a novel model-based time series clustering method with mixtures of linear Gaussian state space models, which have high flexibility. The proposed method uses a new expectation-maximization algorithm for the mixture model to estimate the model parameters, and determines the number of clusters using the Bayesian information criterion. Experiments on a simulated dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the method in clustering, parameter estimation, and model selection. The method is applied to real datasets commonly used to evaluate time series clustering methods. Results showed that the proposed method produces clustering results that are as accurate or more accurate than those obtained using previous methods.
summary: In this paper, we consider the task of clustering a set of individual time series while modeling each cluster, that is, model-based time series clustering. The task requires a parametric model with sufficient flexibility to describe the dynamics in various time series. To address this problem, we propose a novel model-based time series clustering method with mixtures of linear Gaussian state space models, which have high flexibility. The proposed method uses a new expectation-maximization algorithm for the mixture model to estimate the model parameters, and determines the number of clusters using the Bayesian information criterion. Experiments on a simulated dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the method in clustering, parameter estimation, and model selection. The method is applied to real datasets commonly used to evaluate time series clustering methods. Results showed that the proposed method produces clustering results that are as accurate or more accurate than those obtained using previous methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑在对每个聚类进行建模的同时对一组单独的时间序列进行聚类的任务，即基于模型的时间序列聚类。该任务需要一个具有足够灵活性的参数模型来描述各种时间序列的动态。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的基于模型的时间序列聚类方法，该方法混合了线性高斯状态空间模型，具有很高的灵活性。该方法使用一种新的混合模型期望最大化算法来估计模型参数，并使用贝叶斯信息准则确定簇的数量。模拟数据集上的实验证明了该方法在聚类、参数估计和模型选择方面的有效性。该方法适用于通常用于评估时间序列聚类方法的真实数据集。结果表明，所提出的方法产生的聚类结果与使用以前的方法获得的结果一样准确甚至更准确。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混合线性高斯状态空间模型和EM算法的时间序列聚类方法。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列聚类方法在建模动态特性时灵活性不足，需更通用的参数化模型以适应不同时间序列的复杂性。
AI.method: 采用混合线性高斯状态空间模型构建聚类框架，设计新的EM算法估计参数，并通过贝叶斯信息准则确定聚类数量。
AI.result: 在模拟数据集和实际数据集上的实验表明，该方法在聚类准确性、参数估计和模型选择方面优于或等于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合模型与EM算法结合的方法有效解决了时间序列聚类问题，具有良好的实用性和理论价值。

search_text: Time Series Clustering with an EM algorithm for Mixtures of Linear Gaussian State Space Models 使用 EM 算法对线性高斯状态空间模型混合进行时间序列聚类 In this paper, we consider the task of clustering a set of individual time series while modeling each cluster, that is, model-based time series clustering. The task requires a parametric model with sufficient flexibility to describe the dynamics in various time series. To address this problem, we propose a novel model-based time series clustering method with mixtures of linear Gaussian state space models, which have high flexibility. The proposed method uses a new expectation-maximization algorithm for the mixture model to estimate the model parameters, and determines the number of clusters using the Bayesian information criterion. Experiments on a simulated dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the method in clustering, parameter estimation, and model selection. The method is applied to real datasets commonly used to evaluate time series clustering methods. Results showed that the proposed method produces clustering results that are as accurate or more accurate than those obtained using previous methods. 在本文中，我们考虑在对每个聚类进行建模的同时对一组单独的时间序列进行聚类的任务，即基于模型的时间序列聚类。该任务需要一个具有足够灵活性的参数模型来描述各种时间序列的动态。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的基于模型的时间序列聚类方法，该方法混合了线性高斯状态空间模型，具有很高的灵活性。该方法使用一种新的混合模型期望最大化算法来估计模型参数，并使用贝叶斯信息准则确定簇的数量。模拟数据集上的实验证明了该方法在聚类、参数估计和模型选择方面的有效性。该方法适用于通常用于评估时间序列聚类方法的真实数据集。结果表明，所提出的方法产生的聚类结果与使用以前的方法获得的结果一样准确甚至更准确。 本文提出了一种基于混合线性高斯状态空间模型和EM算法的时间序列聚类方法。 Ryohei Umatani,Takashi Imai,Kaoru Kawamoto,Shutaro Kunimasa cs.LG,cs.CV,math.ST

authors_text: Yiming Wang,Qingzhe Gao,Libin Liu,Lingjie Liu,Christian Theobalt,Baoquan Chen
title: Neural Novel Actor: Learning a Generalized Animatable Neural Representation for Human Actors
title_zh: 神经小说演员：学习人类演员的广义动画神经表示
abstract: We propose a new method for learning a generalized animatable neural human representation from a sparse set of multi-view imagery of multiple persons. The learned representation can be used to synthesize novel view images of an arbitrary person from a sparse set of cameras, and further animate them with the user's pose control. While existing methods can either generalize to new persons or synthesize animations with user control, none of them can achieve both at the same time. We attribute this accomplishment to the employment of a 3D proxy for a shared multi-person human model, and further the warping of the spaces of different poses to a shared canonical pose space, in which we learn a neural field and predict the person- and pose-dependent deformations, as well as appearance with the features extracted from input images. To cope with the complexity of the large variations in body shapes, poses, and clothing deformations, we design our neural human model with disentangled geometry and appearance. Furthermore, we utilize the image features both at the spatial point and on the surface points of the 3D proxy for predicting person- and pose-dependent properties. Experiments show that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-arts on both tasks. The video and code are available at https://talegqz.github.io/neural_novel_actor.
summary: We propose a new method for learning a generalized animatable neural human representation from a sparse set of multi-view imagery of multiple persons. The learned representation can be used to synthesize novel view images of an arbitrary person from a sparse set of cameras, and further animate them with the user's pose control. While existing methods can either generalize to new persons or synthesize animations with user control, none of them can achieve both at the same time. We attribute this accomplishment to the employment of a 3D proxy for a shared multi-person human model, and further the warping of the spaces of different poses to a shared canonical pose space, in which we learn a neural field and predict the person- and pose-dependent deformations, as well as appearance with the features extracted from input images. To cope with the complexity of the large variations in body shapes, poses, and clothing deformations, we design our neural human model with disentangled geometry and appearance. Furthermore, we utilize the image features both at the spatial point and on the surface points of the 3D proxy for predicting person- and pose-dependent properties. Experiments show that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-arts on both tasks. The video and code are available at https://talegqz.github.io/neural_novel_actor.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新方法，用于从多人的稀疏多视图图像集中学习广义的可动画神经人类表示。学习到的表示可用于从一组稀疏的摄像机中合成任意人的新颖视图图像，并通过用户的姿势控制进一步对它们进行动画处理。虽然现有的方法可以推广到新的人或通过用户控制合成动画，但它们都不能同时实现这两者。我们将这一成就归功于共享多人人体模型的 3D 代理的使用，并将不同姿势的空间进一步扭曲为共享的规范姿势空间，在其中我们学习神经场并预测与人和姿势相关的变形，以及从输入图像中提取的特征的外观。为了应对身体形状、姿势和服装变形的巨大变化的复杂性，我们设计了具有解开几何和外观的神经人体模型。此外，我们利用 3D 代理的空间点和表面点的图像特征来预测与人物和姿势相关的属性。实验表明，我们的方法在这两项任务上都显着优于最先进的方法。视频和代码可在 https://talegqz.github.io/neural_novel_actor 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从稀疏多视角图像中学习通用可动画神经人体表示的方法，可合成任意人物的新视角图像并支持用户姿态控制动画。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法同时实现对人体的跨个体泛化能力和姿态可控动画生成，需解决姿态空间映射与多人体共享表示的难题。
AI.method: 构建共享3D人体代理模型，通过姿态空间到规范空间的映射学习神经场，分离几何与外观表示，并融合图像特征预测人-姿态相关形变与外观。
AI.result: 在跨个体新视角合成与姿态动画生成任务中显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过3D代理模型与规范空间映射机制，首次实现人体表示的跨个体泛化与姿态可控动画的统一，为神经渲染与动画生成提供新思路。

authors_text: Sophie Buckeridge,Pamela Carreno-Medrano,Akansel Cosgun,Elizabeth Croft,Wesley P. Chan
title: Autonomous social robot navigation in unknown urban environments using semantic segmentation
title_zh: 使用语义分割在未知城市环境中进行自主社交机器人导航
abstract: For autonomous robots navigating in urban environments, it is important for the robot to stay on the designated path of travel (i.e., the footpath), and avoid areas such as grass and garden beds, for safety and social conformity considerations. This paper presents an autonomous navigation approach for unknown urban environments that combines the use of semantic segmentation and LiDAR data. The proposed approach uses the segmented image mask to create a 3D obstacle map of the environment, from which, the boundaries of the footpath is computed. Compared to existing methods, our approach does not require a pre-built map and provides a 3D understanding of the safe region of travel, enabling the robot to plan any path through the footpath. Experiments comparing our method with two alternatives using only LiDAR or only semantic segmentation show that overall our proposed approach performs significantly better with greater than 91% success rate outdoors, and greater than 66% indoors. Our method enabled the robot to remain on the safe path of travel at all times, and reduced the number of collisions.
summary: For autonomous robots navigating in urban environments, it is important for the robot to stay on the designated path of travel (i.e., the footpath), and avoid areas such as grass and garden beds, for safety and social conformity considerations. This paper presents an autonomous navigation approach for unknown urban environments that combines the use of semantic segmentation and LiDAR data. The proposed approach uses the segmented image mask to create a 3D obstacle map of the environment, from which, the boundaries of the footpath is computed. Compared to existing methods, our approach does not require a pre-built map and provides a 3D understanding of the safe region of travel, enabling the robot to plan any path through the footpath. Experiments comparing our method with two alternatives using only LiDAR or only semantic segmentation show that overall our proposed approach performs significantly better with greater than 91% success rate outdoors, and greater than 66% indoors. Our method enabled the robot to remain on the safe path of travel at all times, and reduced the number of collisions.
abstract_zh: 对于在城市环境中导航的自主机器人来说，出于安全和社会整合的考虑，机器人必须保持在指定的行进路径（即人行道）上，并避开草地和花园床等区域。本文提出了一种针对未知城市环境的自主导航方法，该方法结合了语义分割和激光雷达数据的使用。所提出的方法使用分段图像掩模来创建环境的 3D 障碍物图，从中计算人行道的边界。与现有方法相比，我们的方法不需要预先构建的地图，并提供对安全行驶区域的 3D 理解，使机器人能够规划通过人行道的任何路径。将我们的方法与仅使用 LiDAR 或仅使用语义分割的两种替代方法进行比较的实验表明，我们提出的方法总体表现明显更好，室外成功率超过 91%，室内成功率超过 66%。我们的方法使机器人始终保持在安全的行进路径上，并减少了碰撞次数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合语义分割与LiDAR数据的自主导航方法，使机器人能在未知城市环境中安全地沿人行道行驶。
AI.motivation: 机器人需在城市环境中遵守社会规范（如沿人行道行走）并避免碰撞，但传统方法依赖预建地图且难以适应动态未知环境。
AI.method: 通过语义分割识别环境语义信息，结合LiDAR生成3D障碍物地图，计算人行道边界并规划路径。
AI.result: 户外成功率超91%，室内超66%，有效减少碰撞且无需预建地图。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合多模态数据实现更安全、灵活的自主导航，优于单一传感器方案。

authors_text: Mohammad Tahaei,Kami Vaniea,Awais Rashid
title: Embedding Privacy Into Design Through Software Developers: Challenges & Solutions
title_zh: 通过软件开发人员将隐私嵌入到设计中：挑战与解决方案
comment: To be published in "IEEE Security & Privacy: Special Issue on Usable Security for Security Workers" 11 pages, 4 figures
comments: To be published in "IEEE Security & Privacy: Special Issue on Usable Security for Security Workers" 11 pages, 4 figures
abstract: To make privacy a first-class citizen in software, we argue for equipping developers with usable tools, as well as providing support from organizations, educators, and regulators. We discuss the challenges with the successful integration of privacy features and propose solutions for stakeholders to help developers perform privacy-related tasks.
summary: To make privacy a first-class citizen in software, we argue for equipping developers with usable tools, as well as providing support from organizations, educators, and regulators. We discuss the challenges with the successful integration of privacy features and propose solutions for stakeholders to help developers perform privacy-related tasks.
abstract_zh: 为了使隐私成为软件中的一等公民，我们主张为开发人员提供可用的工具，并提供组织、教育工作者和监管机构的支持。我们讨论成功集成隐私功能所面临的挑战，并为利益相关者提出解决方案，以帮助开发人员执行与隐私相关的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何通过为软件开发者提供可用工具及多方支持，将隐私保护嵌入软件设计，并分析挑战与解决方案。
AI.motivation: 当前软件设计中隐私保护常被忽视，需通过系统性方法提升开发者隐私意识与能力，确保隐私成为核心设计要素。
AI.method: 通过分析隐私功能集成的障碍，提出针对开发者、组织、教育者及监管者的协同解决方案，包括工具支持与政策引导。
AI.result: 明确了隐私设计落地的关键挑战，提出了多利益相关方协作的实践框架与具体工具支持策略。
AI.conclusion: 隐私保护需贯穿软件开发生命周期，需开发者工具、组织文化及监管政策的共同推动方能实现有效落地。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探讨如何通过为软件开发者提供可用工具及多方支持，将隐私保护嵌入软件设计，并分析挑战与解决方案。

search_text: Embedding Privacy Into Design Through Software Developers: Challenges & Solutions 通过软件开发人员将隐私嵌入到设计中：挑战与解决方案 To make privacy a first-class citizen in software, we argue for equipping developers with usable tools, as well as providing support from organizations, educators, and regulators. We discuss the challenges with the successful integration of privacy features and propose solutions for stakeholders to help developers perform privacy-related tasks. 为了使隐私成为软件中的一等公民，我们主张为开发人员提供可用的工具，并提供组织、教育工作者和监管机构的支持。我们讨论成功集成隐私功能所面临的挑战，并为利益相关者提出解决方案，以帮助开发人员执行与隐私相关的任务。 本文探讨如何通过为软件开发者提供可用工具及多方支持，将隐私保护嵌入软件设计，并分析挑战与解决方案。 Mohammad Tahaei,Kami Vaniea,Awais Rashid cs.HC,cs.CR,cs.CY,cs.SE

authors_text: Ming Jiang,Shaoxiong Ji
title: Cross-Modality Gated Attention Fusion for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis
title_zh: 用于多模态情感分析的跨模态门控注意力融合
abstract: Multimodal sentiment analysis is an important research task to predict the sentiment score based on the different modality data from a specific opinion video. Many previous pieces of research have proved the significance of utilizing the shared and unique information across different modalities. However, the high-order combined signals from multimodal data would also help extract satisfied representations. In this paper, we propose CMGA, a Cross-Modality Gated Attention fusion model for MSA that tends to make adequate interaction across different modality pairs. CMGA also adds a forget gate to filter the noisy and redundant signals introduced in the interaction procedure. We experiment on two benchmark datasets in MSA, MOSI, and MOSEI, illustrating the performance of CMGA over several baseline models. We also conduct the ablation study to demonstrate the function of different components inside CMGA.
summary: Multimodal sentiment analysis is an important research task to predict the sentiment score based on the different modality data from a specific opinion video. Many previous pieces of research have proved the significance of utilizing the shared and unique information across different modalities. However, the high-order combined signals from multimodal data would also help extract satisfied representations. In this paper, we propose CMGA, a Cross-Modality Gated Attention fusion model for MSA that tends to make adequate interaction across different modality pairs. CMGA also adds a forget gate to filter the noisy and redundant signals introduced in the interaction procedure. We experiment on two benchmark datasets in MSA, MOSI, and MOSEI, illustrating the performance of CMGA over several baseline models. We also conduct the ablation study to demonstrate the function of different components inside CMGA.
abstract_zh: 多模态情感分析是一项重要的研究任务，它根据特定观点视频的不同模态数据来预测情感得分。之前的许多研究已经证明了利用不同模式的共享和独特信息的重要性。然而，来自多模态数据的高阶组合信号也将有助于提取满意的表示。在本文中，我们提出了 CMGA，一种用于 MSA 的跨模态门控注意力融合模型，它倾向于在不同模态对之间进行充分的交互。 CMGA 还添加了一个遗忘门来过滤交互过程中引入的噪声和冗余信号。我们在 MSA、MOSI 和 MOSEI 中的两个基准数据集上进行了实验，说明了 CMGA 相对于多个基准模型的性能。我们还进行了消融研究，以演示 CMGA 内部不同组件的功能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种跨模态门控注意力融合模型（CMGA），用于多模态情感分析，以有效整合不同模态的信息并提升情感预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在跨模态交互中未能充分利用高阶组合信号，且交互过程易引入噪声和冗余信息，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 设计跨模态门控注意力机制促进模态间交互，并引入遗忘门过滤噪声与冗余信号，构建CMGA模型。
AI.result: 在MOSI和MOSEI数据集上，CMGA优于多个基线模型，消融实验证明其组件有效性。
AI.conclusion: CMGA通过跨模态交互与噪声过滤机制，显著提升了多模态情感分析的性能，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Melissa E. Swift,Wyatt Ayers,Sophie Pallanck,Scott Wehrwein
title: Visualizing the Passage of Time with Video Temporal Pyramids
title_zh: 使用视频时间金字塔可视化时间的流逝
comment: 11 pages, 9 figures, accepted for presentation at IEEE VIS 2022, will be published in conference proceedings, supplementary material and more can be found on our project page at https://fw.cs.wwu.edu/~wehrwes/TemporalPyramids
comments: 11 pages, 9 figures, accepted for presentation at IEEE VIS 2022, will be published in conference proceedings, supplementary material and more can be found on our project page at https://fw.cs.wwu.edu/~wehrwes/TemporalPyramids
abstract: What can we learn about a scene by watching it for months or years? A video recorded over a long timespan will depict interesting phenomena at multiple timescales, but identifying and viewing them presents a challenge. The video is too long to watch in full, and some occurrences are too slow to experience in real-time, such as glacial retreat. Timelapse videography is a common approach to summarizing long videos and visualizing slow timescales. However, a timelapse is limited to a single chosen temporal frequency, and often appears flickery due to aliasing and temporal discontinuities between frames. In this paper, we propose Video Temporal Pyramids, a technique that addresses these limitations and expands the possibilities for visualizing the passage of time. Inspired by spatial image pyramids from computer vision, we developed an algorithm that builds video pyramids in the temporal domain. Each level of a Video Temporal Pyramid visualizes a different timescale; for instance, videos from the monthly timescale are usually good for visualizing seasonal changes, while videos from the one-minute timescale are best for visualizing sunrise or the movement of clouds across the sky. To help explore the different pyramid levels, we also propose a Video Spectrogram to visualize the amount of activity across the entire pyramid, providing a holistic overview of the scene dynamics and the ability to explore and discover phenomena across time and timescales. To demonstrate our approach, we have built Video Temporal Pyramids from ten outdoor scenes, each containing months or years of data. We compare Video Temporal Pyramid layers to naive timelapse and find that our pyramids enable alias-free viewing of longer-term changes. We also demonstrate that the Video Spectrogram facilitates exploration and discovery of phenomena across pyramid levels, by enabling both overview and detail-focused perspectives.

A video recorded over a long timespan will depict interesting phenomena at multiple timescales, but identifying and viewing them presents a challenge. The video is too long to watch in full, and some occurrences are too slow to experience in real-time, such as glacial retreat. However, a timelapse is limited to a single chosen temporal frequency, and often appears flickery due to aliasing and temporal discontinuities between frames. In this paper, we propose Video Temporal Pyramids, a technique that addresses these limitations and expands the possibilities for visualizing the passage of time. Inspired by spatial image pyramids from computer vision, we developed an algorithm that builds video pyramids in the temporal domain. Each level of a Video Temporal Pyramid visualizes a different timescale; for instance, videos from the monthly timescale are usually good for visualizing seasonal changes, while videos from the one-minute timescale are best for visualizing sunrise or the movement of clouds across the sky. To help explore the different pyramid levels, we also propose a Video Spectrogram to visualize the amount of activity across the entire pyramid, providing a holistic overview of the scene dynamics and the ability to explore and discover phenomena across time and timescales. To demonstrate our approach, we have built Video Temporal Pyramids from ten outdoor scenes, each containing months or years of data. We compare Video Temporal Pyramid layers to naive timelapse and find that our pyramids enable alias-free viewing of longer-term changes. We also demonstrate that the Video Spectrogram facilitates exploration and discovery of phenomena across pyramid levels, by enabling both overview and detail-focused perspectives.
abstract_zh: 通过观看一个场景数月或数年，我们能了解到什么？长时间录制的视频会在多个时间尺度上描绘有趣的现象，但识别和观看它们却是一个挑战。视频太长，无法完整观看，而且有些事件发生的速度太慢，无法实时体验，例如冰川退缩。延时摄影是总结长视频和可视化缓慢时间尺度的常见方法。然而，延时拍摄仅限于单个选择的时间频率，并且由于帧之间的混叠和时间不连续性而经常出现闪烁。在本文中，我们提出了视频时间金字塔，这是一种解决这些限制并扩展可视化时间流逝的可能性的技术。受到计算机视觉空间图像金字塔的启发，我们开发了一种在时域中构建视频金字塔的算法。视频时间金字塔的每一层都可视化不同的时间尺度；例如，每月时间尺度的视频通常适合可视化季节变化，而一分钟时间尺度的视频最适合可视化日出或天空中云朵的移动。为了帮助探索不同的金字塔级别，我们还提出了一个视频频谱图来可视化整个金字塔的活动量，提供场景动态的整体概述以及跨时间和时间尺度探索和发现现象的能力。为了演示我们的方法，我们根据十个室外场景构建了视频时间金字塔，每个场景都包含数月或数年的数据。我们将视频时间金字塔层与简单的游戏中时光倒流进行比较，发现我们的金字塔可以无混叠地查看长期变化。我们还证明，视频频谱图通过启用概览和注重细节的视角，有助于跨金字塔级别探索和发现现象。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为视频时间金字塔（Video Temporal Pyramids）的技术，用于解决长时间视频在多时间尺度上可视化的问题，并引入视频频谱图辅助探索。
AI.motivation: 传统时序视频（Timelapse）仅能展示单一时间尺度，且存在闪烁和时间不连续性问题，难以全面分析长期变化和慢速现象（如冰川退缩）。
AI.method: 受图像金字塔启发，构建多层级时间金字塔，每层对应不同时间尺度（如月级、分钟级），并设计视频频谱图（Video Spectrogram）可视化全金字塔的动态活动分布。
AI.result: 在包含数月或数年数据的10个户外场景中验证，时间金字塔可无混叠地展示长期变化，频谱图有效支持跨层级现象的探索与发现。
AI.conclusion: 视频时间金字塔和频谱图方法克服了传统时序视频的局限性，为多尺度时间动态分析提供了更全面的工具。

To demonstrate our approach, we have built Video Temporal Pyramids from ten outdoor scenes, each containing months or years of data. We compare Video Temporal Pyramid layers to naive timelapse and find that our pyramids enable alias-free viewing of longer-term changes. We also demonstrate that the Video Spectrogram facilitates exploration and discovery of phenomena across pyramid levels, by enabling both overview and detail-focused perspectives. 通过观看一个场景数月或数年，我们能了解到什么？长时间录制的视频会在多个时间尺度上描绘有趣的现象，但识别和观看它们却是一个挑战。视频太长，无法完整观看，而且有些事件发生的速度太慢，无法实时体验，例如冰川退缩。延时摄影是总结长视频和可视化缓慢时间尺度的常见方法。然而，延时拍摄仅限于单个选择的时间频率，并且由于帧之间的混叠和时间不连续性而经常出现闪烁。在本文中，我们提出了视频时间金字塔，这是一种解决这些限制并扩展可视化时间流逝的可能性的技术。受到计算机视觉空间图像金字塔的启发，我们开发了一种在时域中构建视频金字塔的算法。视频时间金字塔的每一层都可视化不同的时间尺度；例如，每月时间尺度的视频通常适合可视化季节变化，而一分钟时间尺度的视频最适合可视化日出或天空中云朵的移动。为了帮助探索不同的金字塔级别，我们还提出了一个视频频谱图来可视化整个金字塔的活动量，提供场景动态的整体概述以及跨时间和时间尺度探索和发现现象的能力。为了演示我们的方法，我们根据十个室外场景构建了视频时间金字塔，每个场景都包含数月或数年的数据。我们将视频时间金字塔层与简单的游戏中时光倒流进行比较，发现我们的金字塔可以无混叠地查看长期变化。我们还证明，视频频谱图通过启用概览和注重细节的视角，有助于跨金字塔级别探索和发现现象。 本文提出了一种名为视频时间金字塔（Video Temporal Pyramids）的技术，用于解决长时间视频在多时间尺度上可视化的问题，并引入视频频谱图辅助探索。 Melissa E. Swift,Wyatt Ayers,Sophie Pallanck,Scott Wehrwein cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Xiangyu Chen,Zolboo Byambadorj,Takeaki Yajima,Hisashi Inoue,Isao H. Inoue,Tetsuya Iizuka
title: CMOS-based area-and-power-efficient neuron and synapse circuits for time-domain analog spiking neural networks
title_zh: 用于时域模拟尖峰神经网络的基于 CMOS 的面积和功率高效的神经元和突触电路
abstract: Conventional neural structures tend to communicate through analog quantities such as currents or voltages, however, as CMOS devices shrink and supply voltages decrease, the dynamic range of voltage/current-domain analog circuits becomes narrower, the available margin becomes smaller, and noise immunity decreases. More than that, the use of operational amplifiers (op-amps) and continuous-time or clocked comparators in conventional designs leads to high energy consumption and large chip area, which would be detrimental to building spiking neural networks. In view of this, we propose a neural structure for generating and transmitting time-domain signals, including a neuron module, a synapse module, and two weight modules. The proposed neural structure is driven by a leakage current of MOS transistors and uses an inverter-based comparator to realize a firing function, thus providing higher energy and area efficiency compared to conventional designs. The proposed neural structure is fabricated using TSMC 65 nm CMOS technology. The proposed neuron and synapse occupy the area of 127 μm^{ 2} and 231 μm^{ 2}, respectively, while achieving millisecond time constants. Actual chip measurements show that the proposed structure implements the temporal signal communication function with millisecond time constants, which is a critical step toward hardware reservoir computing for human-computer interaction. Simulation results of the spiking-neural network for reservoir computing with the behavioral model of the proposed neural structure demonstrate the learning function.
summary: Conventional neural structures tend to communicate through analog quantities such as currents or voltages, however, as CMOS devices shrink and supply voltages decrease, the dynamic range of voltage/current-domain analog circuits becomes narrower, the available margin becomes smaller, and noise immunity decreases. More than that, the use of operational amplifiers (op-amps) and continuous-time or clocked comparators in conventional designs leads to high energy consumption and large chip area, which would be detrimental to building spiking neural networks. In view of this, we propose a neural structure for generating and transmitting time-domain signals, including a neuron module, a synapse module, and two weight modules. The proposed neural structure is driven by a leakage current of MOS transistors and uses an inverter-based comparator to realize a firing function, thus providing higher energy and area efficiency compared to conventional designs. The proposed neural structure is fabricated using TSMC 65 nm CMOS technology. The proposed neuron and synapse occupy the area of 127 μm^{ 2} and 231 μm^{ 2}, respectively, while achieving millisecond time constants. Actual chip measurements show that the proposed structure implements the temporal signal communication function with millisecond time constants, which is a critical step toward hardware reservoir computing for human-computer interaction. Simulation results of the spiking-neural network for reservoir computing with the behavioral model of the proposed neural structure demonstrate the learning function.
abstract_zh: 传统的神经结构倾向于通过电流或电压等模拟量进行通信，然而，随着 CMOS 器件的尺寸缩小和电源电压的降低，电压/电流域模拟电路的动态范围变得更窄，可用裕度变小，并且抗噪性降低。更重要的是，在传统设计中使用运算放大器（op-amps）和连续时间或时钟比较器会导致高能耗和大芯片面积，这对构建尖峰神经网络是不利的。鉴于此，我们提出了一种用于生成和传输时域信号的神经结构，包括神经元模块、突触模块和两个权重模块。所提出的神经结构由MOS晶体管的漏电流驱动，并使用基于反相器的比较器来实现发射功能，从而与传统设计相比提供更高的能量和面积效率。所提出的神经结构是使用 TSMC 65 nm CMOS 技术制造的。所提出的神经元和突触分别占据 127 μm^{ 2} 和​​ 231 μm^{ 2} 的面积，同时实现毫秒时间常数。实际芯片测量表明，所提出的结构实现了毫秒时间常数的时间信号通信功能，这是迈向人机交互的硬件存储计算的关键一步。使用所提出的神经结构的行为模型对用于储层计算的尖峰神经网络进行的仿真结果证明了学习功能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CMOS的面积和功耗高效的神经元与突触电路，用于时域模拟脉冲神经网络。
AI.motivation: 传统模拟电路在CMOS器件尺寸缩小和供电电压降低时面临动态范围变窄、噪声免疫性下降及能耗高的问题，亟需更高效的神经网络硬件架构。
AI.method: 设计基于MOS管漏电流驱动的神经元模块和突触模块，采用反相器比较器实现放电功能，避免使用运算放大器和连续时间比较器。
AI.result: 采用TSMC 65nm工艺实现，神经元和突触面积分别为127μm²和231μm²，实现毫秒级时间常数，芯片实测验证了时域信号通信功能。
AI.conclusion: 该结构为面向人机交互的硬件水库计算提供了关键实现步骤，展示了脉冲神经网络的学习能力。

authors_text: Zhe Huang,Mary-Joy Sidhom,Benjamin S. Wessler,Michael C. Hughes
title: Fix-A-Step: Semi-supervised Learning from Uncurated Unlabeled Data
title_zh: Fix-A-Step：从未经整理的未标记数据中进行半监督学习
abstract: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) promises improved accuracy compared to training classifiers on small labeled datasets by also training on many unlabeled images. In real applications like medical imaging, unlabeled data will be collected for expediency and thus uncurated: possibly different from the labeled set in classes or features. Unfortunately, modern deep SSL often makes accuracy worse when given uncurated unlabeled data. Recent complex remedies try to detect out-of-distribution unlabeled images and then discard or downweight them. Instead, we introduce Fix-A-Step, a simpler procedure that views all uncurated unlabeled images as potentially helpful. Our first insight is that even uncurated images can yield useful augmentations of labeled data. Second, we modify gradient descent updates to prevent optimizing a multi-task SSL loss from hurting labeled-set accuracy. Fix-A-Step can repair many common deep SSL methods, improving accuracy on CIFAR benchmarks across all tested methods and levels of artificial class mismatch. On a new medical SSL benchmark called Heart2Heart, Fix-A-Step can learn from 353,500 truly uncurated ultrasound images to deliver gains that generalize across hospitals.
summary: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) promises improved accuracy compared to training classifiers on small labeled datasets by also training on many unlabeled images. In real applications like medical imaging, unlabeled data will be collected for expediency and thus uncurated: possibly different from the labeled set in classes or features. Unfortunately, modern deep SSL often makes accuracy worse when given uncurated unlabeled data. Recent complex remedies try to detect out-of-distribution unlabeled images and then discard or downweight them. Instead, we introduce Fix-A-Step, a simpler procedure that views all uncurated unlabeled images as potentially helpful. Our first insight is that even uncurated images can yield useful augmentations of labeled data. Second, we modify gradient descent updates to prevent optimizing a multi-task SSL loss from hurting labeled-set accuracy. Fix-A-Step can repair many common deep SSL methods, improving accuracy on CIFAR benchmarks across all tested methods and levels of artificial class mismatch. On a new medical SSL benchmark called Heart2Heart, Fix-A-Step can learn from 353,500 truly uncurated ultrasound images to deliver gains that generalize across hospitals.
abstract_zh: 与在小型标记数据集上训练分类器相比，通过在许多未标记图像上进行训练，半监督学习 (SSL) 有望提高准确性。在医学成像等实际应用中，为了方便起见，将收集未标记的数据，因此未经整理：可能与类别或特征中的标记集不同。不幸的是，当给定未经整理的未标记数据时，现代深度 SSL 常常会使准确性变得更差。最近的复杂补救措施尝试检测分布外的未标记图像，然后丢弃或降低它们的权重。相反，我们引入了 Fix-A-Step，这是一个更简单的过程，可以将所有未经整理的未标记图像视为可能有帮助。我们的第一个见解是，即使是未经整理的图像也可以产生有用的标记数据增强。其次，我们修改梯度下降更新，以防止优化多任务 SSL 损失而损害标记集的准确性。 Fix-A-Step 可以修复许多常见的深度 SSL 方法，从而提高所有测试方法和人工类不匹配级别的 CIFAR 基准的准确性。在名为 Heart2Heart 的新医疗 SSL 基准上，Fix-A-Step 可以从 353,500 张真正未经整理的超声图像中学习，以提供适用于整个医院的收益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Fix-A-Step方法，通过处理未整理的无标签数据提升半监督学习效果。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中无标签数据常与有标签数据存在类别或特征差异，导致现有半监督学习方法效果下降。
AI.method: 将所有无标签数据视为潜在有用的增强数据，并调整梯度下降更新以避免损害有标签数据准确性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR基准和医疗数据集Heart2Heart上，Fix-A-Step显著提升模型准确率并跨医院泛化。
AI.conclusion: Fix-A-Step为处理未整理无标签数据提供简单有效方案，可修复多种深度SSL方法。

authors_text: Puneet Kumar,Sarthak Malik,Balasubramanian Raman
title: Interpretable Multimodal Emotion Recognition using Hybrid Fusion of Speech and Image Data
title_zh: 使用语音和图像数据混合融合的可解释多模态情感识别
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2208.11450
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2208.11450
abstract: This paper proposes a multimodal emotion recognition system based on hybrid fusion that classifies the emotions depicted by speech utterances and corresponding images into discrete classes. A new interpretability technique has been developed to identify the important speech & image features leading to the prediction of particular emotion classes. The proposed system's architecture has been determined through intensive ablation studies. It fuses the speech & image features and then combines speech, image, and intermediate fusion outputs. The proposed interpretability technique incorporates the divide & conquer approach to compute shapely values denoting each speech & image feature's importance. We have also constructed a large-scale dataset (IIT-R SIER dataset), consisting of speech utterances, corresponding images, and class labels, i.e., 'anger,' 'happy,' 'hate,' and 'sad.' The proposed system has achieved 83.29% accuracy for emotion recognition. The enhanced performance of the proposed system advocates the importance of utilizing complementary information from multiple modalities for emotion recognition.
summary: This paper proposes a multimodal emotion recognition system based on hybrid fusion that classifies the emotions depicted by speech utterances and corresponding images into discrete classes. A new interpretability technique has been developed to identify the important speech & image features leading to the prediction of particular emotion classes. The proposed system's architecture has been determined through intensive ablation studies. It fuses the speech & image features and then combines speech, image, and intermediate fusion outputs. The proposed interpretability technique incorporates the divide & conquer approach to compute shapely values denoting each speech & image feature's importance. We have also constructed a large-scale dataset (IIT-R SIER dataset), consisting of speech utterances, corresponding images, and class labels, i.e., 'anger,' 'happy,' 'hate,' and 'sad.' The proposed system has achieved 83.29% accuracy for emotion recognition. The enhanced performance of the proposed system advocates the importance of utilizing complementary information from multiple modalities for emotion recognition.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于混合融合的多模态情感识别系统，该系统将语音和相应图像所描述的情感分类为离散类别。一种新的可解释性技术已被开发出来，用于识别重要的语音和图像特征，从而预测特定的情绪类别。所提出的系统架构是通过深入的消融研究确定的。它融合语音和图像特征，然后组合语音、图像和中间融合输出。所提出的可解释性技术结合了分而治之的方法来计算表示每个语音和图像特征的重要性的形状值。我们还构建了一个大规模数据集（IIT-R SIER 数据集），由语音话语、相应图像和类标签（即“愤怒”、“快乐”、“仇恨”和“悲伤”）组成。该系统的情绪识别准确率达到 83.29%。所提出的系统的增强性能凸显了利用多种模式的补充信息进行情感识别的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混合融合的可解释多模态情绪识别系统，通过融合语音和图像特征进行离散情绪分类。
AI.motivation: 现有情绪识别方法难以有效结合多模态信息且缺乏可解释性，需开发能利用互补信息并明确特征重要性的模型。
AI.method: 构建混合融合架构，通过消融实验确定模型结构，融合语音、图像及中间特征，并采用分治策略计算SHAP值以解释特征重要性。
AI.result: 在自建的IIT-R SIER数据集上实现83.29%的识别准确率，验证了多模态融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多模态互补信息对情绪识别至关重要，混合融合架构与可解释性分析可提升模型性能与可信度。

authors_text: Jianhao Jiao,Hexiang Wei,Tianshuai Hu,Xiangcheng Hu,Yilong Zhu,Zhijian He,Jin Wu,Jingwen Yu,Xupeng Xie,Huaiyang Huang,Ruoyu Geng,Lujia Wang,Ming Liu
title: FusionPortable: A Multi-Sensor Campus-Scene Dataset for Evaluation of Localization and Mapping Accuracy on Diverse Platforms
title_zh: FusionPortable：用于评估不同平台上的定位和地图精度的多传感器校园场景数据集
comment: IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022, 6 pages, 6 figures. URL: https://ram-lab.com/file/site/multi-sensor-dataset
comments: IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022, 6 pages, 6 figures. URL: https://ram-lab.com/file/site/multi-sensor-dataset
abstract: Combining multiple sensors enables a robot to maximize its perceptual awareness of environments and enhance its robustness to external disturbance, crucial to robotic navigation. This paper proposes the FusionPortable benchmark, a complete multi-sensor dataset with a diverse set of sequences for mobile robots. This paper presents three contributions. We first advance a portable and versatile multi-sensor suite that offers rich sensory measurements: 10Hz LiDAR point clouds, 20Hz stereo frame images, high-rate and asynchronous events from stereo event cameras, 200Hz inertial readings from an IMU, and 10Hz GPS signal. Sensors are already temporally synchronized in hardware. This device is lightweight, self-contained, and has plug-and-play support for mobile robots. Second, we construct a dataset by collecting 17 sequences that cover a variety of environments on the campus by exploiting multiple robot platforms for data collection. Some sequences are challenging to existing SLAM algorithms. Third, we provide ground truth for the decouple localization and mapping performance evaluation. We additionally evaluate state-of-the-art SLAM approaches and identify their limitations. The dataset, consisting of raw sensor easurements, ground truth, calibration data, and evaluated algorithms, will be released: https://ram-lab.com/file/site/multi-sensor-dataset.
summary: Combining multiple sensors enables a robot to maximize its perceptual awareness of environments and enhance its robustness to external disturbance, crucial to robotic navigation. This paper proposes the FusionPortable benchmark, a complete multi-sensor dataset with a diverse set of sequences for mobile robots. This paper presents three contributions. We first advance a portable and versatile multi-sensor suite that offers rich sensory measurements: 10Hz LiDAR point clouds, 20Hz stereo frame images, high-rate and asynchronous events from stereo event cameras, 200Hz inertial readings from an IMU, and 10Hz GPS signal. Sensors are already temporally synchronized in hardware. This device is lightweight, self-contained, and has plug-and-play support for mobile robots. Second, we construct a dataset by collecting 17 sequences that cover a variety of environments on the campus by exploiting multiple robot platforms for data collection. Some sequences are challenging to existing SLAM algorithms. Third, we provide ground truth for the decouple localization and mapping performance evaluation. We additionally evaluate state-of-the-art SLAM approaches and identify their limitations. The dataset, consisting of raw sensor easurements, ground truth, calibration data, and evaluated algorithms, will be released: https://ram-lab.com/file/site/multi-sensor-dataset.
abstract_zh: 组合多个传感器使机器人能够最大限度地提高其对环境的感知能力，并增强其对外部干扰的鲁棒性，这对于机器人导航至关重要。本文提出了 FusionPortable 基准测试，这是一个完整的多传感器数据集，其中包含用于移动机器人的不同序列集。本文提出了三项贡献。我们首先提出了一种便携式多功能多传感器套件，可提供丰富的感官测量：10Hz LiDAR 点云、20Hz 立体帧图像、来自立体事件摄像机的高速率和异步事件、来自 IMU 的 200Hz 惯性读数以及 10Hz GPS 信号。传感器已经在硬件中实现了时间同步。该设备重量轻、独立，并且为移动机器人提供即插即用支持。其次，我们利用多个机器人平台进行数据收集，收集覆盖校园各种环境的 17 个序列，构建数据集。有些序列对现有的 SLAM 算法具有挑战性。第三，我们为解耦定位和映射性能评估提供基本事实。我们还评估了最先进的 SLAM 方法并确定了它们的局限性。该数据集由原始传感器测量、地面实况、校准数据和评估算法组成，将发布：https://ram-lab.com/file/site/multi-sensor-dataset。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FusionPortable基准数据集，用于评估移动机器人在多样化平台上的定位与建图精度。
AI.motivation: 多传感器融合可提升机器人环境感知与抗干扰能力，但现有SLAM算法在复杂场景下存在局限性，亟需多样化数据集进行验证。
AI.method: 开发轻量级多传感器套件（含LiDAR、立体相机、事件相机、IMU、GPS），通过多平台采集17条校园场景序列，并提供同步标注与地面真值。
AI.result: 数据集包含原始传感器数据、标定信息及算法评估结果，揭示了现有SLAM方法在动态遮挡与多传感器异步场景下的性能瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: FusionPortable为多模态SLAM研究提供标准化基准，推动算法在复杂真实环境中的鲁棒性优化。
